source.sqlReaderQuery:
WITH 
StringFields(ID, Vernum, ProjectName, ProjectStatus, ExamTimetablePublishStatus, 
			Sector, ProjectType, Stage, CaseReference, ProjectLocation, ProjectEmailAddress, 
			TwitterAccountName, Region, Easting, Northing, Transboundary, WelshLanguage, 
			ExASize, MapZoomLevel, ProjectDescription, SoS, TenE) AS
       (SELECT 
			Id, VerNum, [8], [23], [26], [17], [18], [19], [10], [2], [11], [15], [22], [12], [13], [28], [24], [20], [14], [9], [21], [27]
       FROM 
			(SELECT Id, VerNum, AttrID, ValStr 
			FROM LLAttrData 
			WHERE 
				DefID = 12361638 
				AND AttrID IN (2, 8, 23, 26, 17, 10, 11, 15, 18, 19, 22, 12, 13, 28, 24, 20, 14, 9, 21, 27)) AS Strings 
			PIVOT (MAX(ValStr) FOR AttrID IN ([2], [8], [23], [26], [17], [10], [11], [15], [18], [19], [22], [12], [13], [28], [24], [20], [14], [9], [21], [27])) AS StringsPivot),

DateFields(ID, Vernum, DateProjectAppearsOnWebsite, DateOfDCOAcceptance, AnticipatedDateOfSubmission, 
			AnticipatedSubmissionDateNonSpecific, DateOfDCOSubmission, DateOfRepresentationPeriodOpen, 
			DateOfRelevantRepresentationClose, DateRRepAppearOnWebsite, ConfirmedStartOfExamination, 
			DateTimeExaminationEnds, Stage4ExtensionToExamCloseDate, Stage5ExtensionToRecommendationDeadline, 
			DateOfRecommendations, ConfirmedDateOfDecision, Stage5ExtensionToDecisionDeadline,
			DateProjectWithdrawn, Section46Notification, DatePINSFirstNotifiedOfProject, 
			ScreeningOpinionSought, ScreeningOpinionIssued, ScopingOpinionSought, 
			ScopingOpinionIssued, DeadlineForAcceptanceDecision, DateSection58NoticeReceived, 
			PreliminaryMeetingStartDate, DeadlineForCloseOfExamination,	DeadlineForSubmissionOfRecommendation, 
			DeadlineForDecision, JRPeriodEndDate, ExtensionToDateRelevantRepresentationsClose
			) AS
       (SELECT 
			Id,VerNum,[3],[13],[5],[4],[12],[15],[16],[18],[21],[22],[24],[27],[25],[28],[30],[6],[11],[2], [7], [8], [9], [10], [14], [19], [20], [23], [26], [29], [31], [17]
       FROM 
			(SELECT Id, VerNum, AttrID, ValDate 
			FROM LLAttrData 
			WHERE 
				DefID = 12361641 
				AND AttrID IN (3, 4, 5, 6, 11, 12, 13, 15, 16, 18, 21, 22, 24, 25, 27, 28, 30, 2, 7, 8,9, 10, 14, 19, 20, 23, 26, 29, 31, 17)) AS Dates 
			PIVOT (MAX(ValDate) FOR AttrID IN ([3], [4], [5], [6], [11], [12], [13], [15], [16], [18], [21], [22], [24], [25], [27], [28], [30], [2], [7], [8], [9], [10], [14], [19], [20], [23], [26], [29], [31], [17])) AS DatesPivot),

TextFields(ID, Vernum, Summary) AS
       (SELECT Id,VerNum,[9]
       FROM 
			(SELECT Id, VerNum, AttrID, CAST(ValLong AS VARCHAR(MAX)) AS TextField 
			FROM LLAttrData 
			WHERE 
				DefID = 12361638 
				AND AttrID IN (9)) AS Texts 
			PIVOT (MAX(TextField) FOR AttrID IN ([9])) AS TextsPivot),

StringFields_Applicant(ID, Vernum, PromoterName, ApplicantFirstName, ApplicantLastName, ApplicantEmailAddress, ApplicantWebAddress, ApplicantPhoneNumber, AddressLine1, AddressLine2, AddressTown, AddressCounty, PostCode) AS
       (SELECT Id, VerNum, [19], [3], [4], [10], [12], [11], [5], [6], [7], [8], [9]
	   FROM 
			(SELECT Id, VerNum, AttrID, ValStr 
			FROM LLAttrData 
			WHERE 
				DefID = 12361642 
				AND AttrID IN (19, 3, 4, 10, 12, 18, 11, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9)) AS Strings 
			PIVOT (MAX(ValStr) FOR AttrID IN ([19], [3], [4], [10], [12], [18], [11], [5], [6], [7], [8], [9])) AS StringsPivot),

TextFields_Applicant(ID, Vernum, ApplicantDescriptionOfProject) AS
       (SELECT Id, VerNum, [18]
       FROM 
			(SELECT Id, VerNum, AttrID, CAST(ValLong AS VARCHAR(MAX)) AS TextField 
			FROM LLAttrData 
			WHERE 
				DefID = 12361642 
				AND AttrID IN (18)) AS Texts 
			PIVOT (MAX(TextField) FOR AttrID IN ([18])) AS TextsPivot),

StringFields_Case_Manager(DataId, ContactID, ContactDetails, TypeOfInvolvement) AS
       (SELECT d.DataId AS DataId, ll1.ValStr AS [ContactID], ll2.ValStr AS [ContactDetails], ll3.ValStr AS [TypeOfInvolvement]
       FROM DTree d
		   INNER JOIN llattrdata ll1 ON d.DataId = ll1.Id
		   INNER JOIN llattrdata ll2 ON d.DataId = ll2.Id
		   INNER JOIN llattrdata ll3 ON d.DataId = ll3.Id
       WHERE
		   ll1.DefId = 95501 AND ll1.AttrId = 20
		   AND ll2.DefId = 95501 AND ll2.AttrId = 19
		   AND ll3.DefId = 95501 AND ll3.AttrId = 3 AND ll3.ValStr = 'Case Manager'
		   AND ll1.ParentKeyId = ll2.ParentKeyId
		   AND ll1.ParentKeyId = ll3.ParentKeyId),

StringFields_Case_Officer(DataId, ContactID, ContactDetails, TypeOfInvolvement) AS
       (SELECT d.DataId AS DataId, ll1.ValStr AS [ContactID], ll2.ValStr AS [ContactDetails], ll3.ValStr AS [TypeOfInvolvement]
       FROM DTree d
		   INNER JOIN llattrdata ll1 ON d.DataId = ll1.Id
		   INNER JOIN llattrdata ll2 ON d.DataId = ll2.Id
		   INNER JOIN llattrdata ll3 ON d.DataId = ll3.Id
       WHERE
		   ll1.DefId = 95501 AND ll1.AttrId = 20
		   AND ll2.DefId = 95501 AND ll2.AttrId = 19
		   AND ll3.DefId = 95501 AND ll3.AttrId = 3 AND ll3.ValStr = 'Case Officer'
		   AND ll1.ParentKeyId = ll2.ParentKeyId
		   AND ll1.ParentKeyId = ll3.ParentKeyId),


StringFields_Inspector(DataId, ContactID, ContactDetails, TypeOfInvolvement) AS
       (SELECT d.DataId AS DataId, ll1.ValStr AS [ContactID], ll2.ValStr AS [ContactDetails], ll3.ValStr AS [TypeOfInvolvement]
       FROM DTree d
		   INNER JOIN llattrdata ll1 ON d.DataId = ll1.Id
		   INNER JOIN llattrdata ll2 ON d.DataId = ll2.Id
		   INNER JOIN llattrdata ll3 ON d.DataId = ll3.Id
       WHERE
		   ll1.DefId = 95501 AND ll1.AttrId = 20
		   AND ll2.DefId = 95501 AND ll2.AttrId = 19
		   AND ll3.DefId = 95501 AND ll3.AttrId = 3 AND ll3.ValStr = 'Inspector'
		   AND ll1.ParentKeyId = ll2.ParentKeyId
		   AND ll1.ParentKeyId = ll3.ParentKeyId)
       
SELECT 
	nsipcase.CreateDate AS CaseCreatedDate,
	s.ProjectName,
	s.ProjectStatus,
	s.ExamTimetablePublishStatus,
	s.Sector,
	s.ProjectType,
	s.Stage,
	s.CaseReference,
	s.ProjectLocation,
	s.ProjectEmailAddress,
	s.TwitterAccountName,
	s.Region,
	s.Easting,
	s.Northing,
	s.Transboundary,
	s.WelshLanguage,
	s.ExASize,
	s.MapZoomLevel,
	s.ProjectDescription,
	s.SoS,
	s.TenE,
	d.DateProjectAppearsOnWebsite,
	d.DateOfDCOAcceptance,
	d.AnticipatedDateOfSubmission,
	d.DateOfDCOSubmission,
	d.DateOfRepresentationPeriodOpen,
	d.DateOfRelevantRepresentationClose,
	d.DateRRepAppearOnWebsite,
	d.ConfirmedStartOfExamination,
	d.DateTimeExaminationEnds,
	d.Stage4ExtensionToExamCloseDate,
	d.Stage5ExtensionToRecommendationDeadline,
	d.DateOfRecommendations,
	d.ConfirmedDateOfDecision,
	d.Stage5ExtensionToDecisionDeadline,
	d.DateProjectWithdrawn,
	d.Section46Notification,
	d.DatePINSFirstNotifiedOfProject,
	d.ScreeningOpinionSought,
	d.ScreeningOpinionIssued,
	d.ScopingOpinionSought,
	d.ScopingOpinionIssued,
	d.DeadlineForAcceptanceDecision,
	d.DateSection58NoticeReceived,
	d.PreliminaryMeetingStartDate,
	d.DeadlineForCloseOfExamination,
	d.DeadlineForSubmissionOfRecommendation,
	d.DeadlineForDecision,
	d.JRPeriodEndDate,
	d.ExtensionToDateRelevantRepresentationsClose,
	t.Summary,
	sa.PromoterName,
	sa.ApplicantFirstName,
	sa.ApplicantLastName,
	sa.AddressLine1,
	sa.AddressLine2,
	sa.AddressTown,
	sa.AddressCounty,
	sa.PostCode,
	sa.ApplicantEmailAddress,
	sa.ApplicantWebAddress,
	sa.ApplicantPhoneNumber,
	ta.ApplicantDescriptionOfProject
FROM 
	Horizon_CaseReference cr 
		INNER JOIN Horizon_TypeOfCase toc ON cr.CaseTypeId = toc.ID
		INNER JOIN DTree nsipcase ON cr.CaseNodeId = nsipcase.DataID
		INNER JOIN StringFields s ON nsipcase.DataID = s.ID
		INNER JOIN DateFields d ON nsipcase.DataID = d.ID
		INNER JOIN TextFields t ON nsipcase.DataID = t.ID
		INNER JOIN StringFields_Applicant sa ON nsipcase.DataID = sa.ID
		INNER JOIN TextFields_Applicant ta ON nsipcase.DataID = ta.ID
WHERE
       toc.CaseworkType = 'NSIP'
ORDER BY
	s.CaseReference

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT
CR.CaseReference,
TOE.[Name] AS TypeOfExamination,
ET.[Name],
ET.[Description],
ET.[DeadlineStartDateTime],
ET.[Date],
ET.[Location]
FROM horizon_ExamTimetable ET
JOIN horizon_CaseReference CR on CR.CaseNodeID = ET.CaseId
JOIN horizon_TypeOfExamination TOE on TOE.ID = ET.ExaminationTypeID
;

activities.name: NSIP_Relevant_Representation
activities.description: SQL query to get Relevant Representation data to be linked to existing NSIP data

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT
C.CaseReference
,C.CaseUniqueId
,C2.[ID] AS ContactID
,C2.[OrganisationName]
,C2.[JobTitle]
,C2.[FullName]
,C2.[PhoneNumber]
,C2.[EmailAddress]
,C2.[BuildingNumber]
,C2.[Street]
,C2.[Town]
,C2.[County]
,C2.[Country]
,C2.[Postcode]
,RR.[ID] AS RelevantRepID
,RR.[AttendPrelimMeeting]
,RR.[DateReceived]
-- Replacing ',' and new line characters with spaces
,REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(CAST(RR.[Notes] AS NVarchar(MAX)),',',' '), CHAR(13), ' '), CHAR(10), ' ') AS Notes
,RR.[AgentContactId]
,RR.[RepresentAtCompAcqHearing]
,RR.[RepresentAtIssueHearing]
,RR.[RepresentAtOpenFloorHearing]
,REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(CAST(RR.[RepresentationOriginal] AS NVarchar(MAX)),',',' '), CHAR(13), ' '), CHAR(10), ' ') AS RepresentationOriginal
,REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(CAST(RR.[RepresentationRedacted] AS NVarchar(MAX)),',',' '), CHAR(13), ' '), CHAR(10), ' ') AS RepresentationRedacted
,RR.[SubmitLaterReps]
,RR.[WebReference]
,RRS.[Name] AS RelevantRepStatus
,RRL.[OwnerOrOccupier]
,RRL.[PowerToSell]
,RRL.[EntitledToClaim]
,RRL.[Other]
,RRL.[DescriptionIfOther]
,RRB.[Name] AS RelRepOnBehalfOf
,RRO.[Name] AS RelRepOrganisation
,COM.[Name] AS PreferredContactMethod
FROM [otcs].[dbo].[Horizon_RelevantRepresentation] RR
LEFT JOIN [otcs].[dbo].[Horizon_CaseReference] C ON RR.CaseId = C.CaseNodeId
LEFT JOIN [otcs].[dbo].[Horizon_RelevantRepContact] C2 ON RR.ContactId = C2.ID
LEFT JOIN [otcs].[dbo].[Horizon_TypeOfRelevantRepState] RRS ON RR.RepresentationStateId = RRS.ID
LEFT JOIN [otcs].[dbo].[Horizon_RelevantRepInterestInLand] RRL ON RR.InterestInLandId = RRL.ID
LEFT JOIN [otcs].[dbo].[Horizon_TypeOfRelRepOnBehalfOf] RRB ON RR.OnBehalfOfId = RRB.ID
LEFT JOIN [otcs].[dbo].[Horizon_TypeOfRelRepOrganisation] RRO ON RR.OrganisationTypeId = RRO.ID
LEFT JOIN [otcs].[dbo].[Horizon_TypeOfCommunicationPreference] COM ON RR.PreferredContactMethodId = COM.ID

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT 
[AdviceNodeId]
,[CaseReference]
,[AdviceReference]
,[AdviceStatus]
,[Section51Advice]
,[EnquirerFirstname]
,[EnquirerLastname]
,[EnquirerOrganisation]
,[EnquiryDate]
,[EnqiryMethod]
,REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(CAST([Enquiry]AS NVarchar(MAX)),',',' '), CHAR(13), ' '), CHAR(10), ' ') AS [Enquiry]
,[AdviceFrom]
,[AdviceDate]
,REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(CAST([Advice]AS NVarchar(MAX)),',',' '), CHAR(13), ' '), CHAR(10), ' ') AS [Advice]
,[AdviceLastModified]
,[AttachmentCount]
,[AttachmentsLastModified]
,[LastPublishedDate]
,[CaseNodeId]
,[WelshLanguage]
,[CaseworkType]
FROM [otcs].[dbo].[Horizon_vw_NSIPAdvice]

source.sqlReaderQuery:
WITH cases as
(
SELECT DISTINCT
      cases.CaseNodeId, 
	  dtree.SubType,  
	  cases.CaseReference, 
	  cases.CaseUniqueId as case_number
      
FROM
      Horizon_CaseReference cases
      INNER JOIN DTree dtree ON cases.CaseNodeId = dtree.DataID
      INNER JOIN Horizon_TypeOfCase t ON cases.CaseTypeId = t.ID
WHERE
	  dtree.OwnerID != -235834 	-- Recycle bin ownerid
	  AND t.CaseworkType IN ('Appeal', 'CommonLand', 'Costs', 'Environment', 'RightsOfWay')
)
,
case_involvement(DataId, ContactID, ContactDetails, TypeOfInvolvement) AS
       (SELECT DISTINCT d.DataId AS DataId, ll1.ValStr AS [ContactID], ll2.ValStr AS [ContactDetails], ll3.ValStr AS [TypeOfInvolvement]
       FROM DTree d
		   INNER JOIN llattrdata ll1 ON d.DataId = ll1.Id
		   INNER JOIN llattrdata ll2 ON d.DataId = ll2.Id
		   INNER JOIN llattrdata ll3 ON d.DataId = ll3.Id
       WHERE
		   ll1.DefId = 95501 AND ll1.AttrId = 20
		   AND ll2.DefId = 95501 AND ll2.AttrId = 19
		   AND ll3.DefId = 95501 AND ll3.AttrId = 3 
		   --exclude PINS staff case involvement roles
		   --AND ll3.ValStr NOT IN ('Case Manager', 'Case Officer', 'Inspector', 'Assistant Case Officer', 'Environmental Services Officer', 'Programme Officer', 'Legal Officer', 'Previous Inspector')
		   AND ll1.ParentKeyId = ll2.ParentKeyId
		   AND ll1.ParentKeyId = ll3.ParentKeyId)

SELECT DISTINCT
	cr.case_number,
	D.CreateDate as case_created_date,
	ci.ContactID,
	ci.TypeOfInvolvement,
	v.ContactType,
	v.FirstName,
	v.LastName,
	v.PostName,
	v.Title,
	v.Salutation,
	v.Suffix,
	v.POBox,
	v.Address1,
	v.Address2,
	v.City,
	v.County,
	v.Postcode,
	v.Country,
	v.TelephoneOffice,
	v.TelephoneMobile,
	v.Fax,
	v.Email,
	v.LPACode,
	v.OrganisationName,
	t.OrganisationTypeName
FROM 
	cases cr
		INNER JOIN DTree D ON cr.CaseNodeId = D.DataID
		INNER JOIN case_involvement ci on D.DataID = ci.DataId
		LEFT JOIN [dbo].[Horizon_vw_AllContacts] v on ci.ContactID =v.Id
		LEFT JOIN Contacts_OrganisationType t on v.OrganisationTypeID = t.ID
--WHERE
--			case_number = 3000079

properties.description:
This is the top level of the source to raw pipeline for Fileshare files, currently being used for SAP HR files.

Description of the default parameters: 
-jsonschema: schema definition for the table to log the file transfer
-db_name: the synapse database for the file transfer log table
-table_name: the name of the table inside -db_name for the file transfer log table
-target_container: the abfss:// file path container of the file transfer log table
-target_folder: the folder within which the delta table will be located
-akv_name: the name of the key vault containing the secret to obtain the connection string to the file share
-secret_name: the name of the secret within akv_name containing the connection string to access the file share
-kv_linked_service: the linked service name of the key vault akv_name
-share_name: the name of the Azure Fileshare
-directory_path: the path within the Azure Fileshare to identify all files within
-sink_sourcetype: The top level folder within odw-raw to transfer the data from Fileshare into
-sink_sourcesystem: The subfolder within sink_sourcetype to transfer the data into

activities.name: source_to_raw_main
activities.description:
This notebook creates the table for the Azure Fileshare transfer logging if the Delta log table does not exist.

This notebook then generates the file paths from Azure Fileshare for the copy activity to copy into raw, for any new or modified files, based on existing information in the log table.

activities.name: NewFilesCheck
activities.description:
True : If no new files are present in the Fileshare this is logged to the app insights instance.

False: For any new files, the Copy activity starts

ifFalseActivities.name: CopySourceToRaw
ifFalseActivities.description: A path inside the Azure Fileshare is passed from the previous notebook activity into this activity and a binary transfer is completed based on the parameters.

ifTrueActivities.name: No_New_Files_Logging
ifTrueActivities.description: Output of the previous notebook activity is "[]" which indicated that no new or modified files are present in the log table of files transferred from source to raw.

activities.name: CopyFilesLoop
activities.description: This loop splits the list of filepaths of new and modified files generated from scanning the Azure Fileshare into individual filepaths

activities.name: CopySourceToRaw
activities.description: Copying data from the datalabs source container into the odw-raw target container via a binary copy.

activities.name: Copy_Outcome_Logging_and_Log_Table_Update
activities.description:
Logs the output of the copy activity 
Updates the log table with filepaths and last modified dates of the transferred files

content.query:
SELECT EmployeeID, EmployeeNumber,IngestionDate,RowID FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_fact] 
WHERE IsActive = 'Y' 
GROUP By EmployeeID, EmployeeNumber,IngestionDate, RowID
HAVING Count(EmployeeID) > 1

SELECT SecureInfoID, Count(*)
 FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[secureinfo_fact]
 GROUP By SecureInfoID
 HAVING Count(*) > 1

SELECT DISTINCT T1.loc, T1.location
 FROM [odw_standardised_db].[dbo].[sap_hr_historic] T1
 INNER JOIN (   SELECT Pers_No, MAX(report_monthend_date) AS Max_Rpt_Monthend_Date
                FROM [odw_standardised_db].[dbo].[sap_hr_historic]
                Group by Pers_No) T2 ON T1.Pers_No = T2.Pers_No AND
                                        T1.report_monthend_date = T2.Max_Rpt_Monthend_Date

 --where T1.Pers_no = 00500003
 --order by T1.Pers_No



 -- 1649 total employees

content.query:
IF NOT EXISTS ( SELECT  *
                FROM    sys.schemas
                WHERE   name = 'mipins' )
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA mipins]');
GO

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_hr_gender

AS

SELECT Distinct Gender FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_dim]

source:
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()
from pyspark.sql.functions import explode, sequence, to_date

beginDate = '1981-01-01'
endDate = '2050-12-31'


(
  spark.sql(f"select explode(sequence(to_date('{beginDate}'), to_date('{endDate}'), interval 1 day)) as calendarDate")
    .createOrReplaceTempView('dates')
%%sql
SELECT * from dates

%%sql
select
  year(calendarDate) * 10000 + month(calendarDate) * 100 + day(calendarDate) as dateInt,
  CalendarDate,
  CalendarDate - day(calendarDate) + 1 AS FirstOfMonth,
  year(calendarDate) AS CalendarYear,
  date_format(calendarDate, 'MMMM') as CalendarMonth,
  month(calendarDate) as MonthOfYear,
  date_format(calendarDate, 'EEEE') as DayName,
  dayofweek(calendarDate) AS DayOfWeek,
  weekday(calendarDate) + 1 as DayOfWeekStartMonday,
  year(current_date)-year(calendarDate) AS AGE,
  case
    when weekday(calendarDate) < 5 then 'Y'
    else 'N'
  end as IsWeekDay,
  dayofmonth(calendarDate) as DayOfMonth,
  case
    when calendarDate = last_day(calendarDate) then 'Y'
    else 'N'
  end as IsLastDayOfMonth,
  dayofyear(calendarDate) as DayOfYear,
  weekofyear(calendarDate) as WeekOfYearIso,
  quarter(calendarDate) as QuarterOfYear,
  /* Use financial periods needed by organization financial calendar */
  case
    when month(calendarDate) < 4 then year(calendarDate) -1
    else year(calendarDate)
  end as FinancialYear,
  case
    when month(calendarDate) < 4 then year(calendarDate) 
    else year(calendarDate) +1
  end as NextFinancialYear,
  CASE
    when quarter(calendarDate) =1 then 4
    else quarter(calendarDate) -1
  END as FinancialQuarter
from
  dates
order by
  calendarDate

%%sql
create or replace table calendar_dim
using delta
location '/odw_harmonised_db/calendar_dim'
as select
  year(calendarDate) * 10000 + month(calendarDate) * 100 + day(calendarDate) as dateInt,
  CalendarDate,
  CalendarDate - day(calendarDate) + 1 AS FirstOfMonth,
  year(calendarDate) AS CalendarYear,
  date_format(calendarDate, 'MMMM') as CalendarMonth,
  month(calendarDate) as MonthOfYear,
  date_format(calendarDate, 'EEEE') as DayName,
  dayofweek(calendarDate) AS DayOfWeek,
  weekday(calendarDate) + 1 as DayOfWeekStartMonday,
  year(current_date)-year(calendarDate) AS AGE,
  case
    when weekday(calendarDate) < 5 then 'Y'
    else 'N'
  end as IsWeekDay,
  dayofmonth(calendarDate) as DayOfMonth,
  case
    when calendarDate = last_day(calendarDate) then 'Y'
    else 'N'
  end as IsLastDayOfMonth,
  dayofyear(calendarDate) as DayOfYear,
  weekofyear(calendarDate) as WeekOfYearIso,
  quarter(calendarDate) as QuarterOfYear,
  /* Use financial periods needed by organization financial calendar */
  case
    when month(calendarDate) < 4 then year(calendarDate) -1
    else year(calendarDate)
  end as FinancialYear,
  case
    when month(calendarDate) < 4 then year(calendarDate) 
    else year(calendarDate) +1
  end as NextFinancialYear,
  CASE
    when quarter(calendarDate) =1 then 4
    else quarter(calendarDate) -1
  END as FinancialQuarter
from
  dates

%%sql
create or replace table calendar_dim_plus
using delta
location '/odw_harmonised_db/calendar_dim_plus'
as select
  year(calendarDate) * 10000 + month(calendarDate) * 100 + day(calendarDate) as dateInt,
  CalendarDate,
  CalendarDate - day(calendarDate) + 1 AS FirstOfMonth,
  year(calendarDate) AS CalendarYear,
  date_format(calendarDate, 'MMMM') as CalendarMonth,
  month(calendarDate) as MonthOfYear,
  date_format(calendarDate, 'EEEE') as DayName,
  dayofweek(calendarDate) AS DayOfWeek,
  weekday(calendarDate) + 1 as DayOfWeekStartMonday,
  year(current_date)-year(calendarDate) AS AGE,
  case
    when weekday(calendarDate) < 5 then 'Y'
    else 'N'
  end as IsWeekDay,
  dayofmonth(calendarDate) as DayOfMonth,
  case
    when calendarDate = last_day(calendarDate) then 'Y'
    else 'N'
  end as IsLastDayOfMonth,
  dayofyear(calendarDate) as DayOfYear,
  weekofyear(calendarDate) as WeekOfYearIso,
  quarter(calendarDate) as QuarterOfYear,
  /* Use financial periods needed by organization financial calendar */
  case
    when month(calendarDate) < 4 then year(calendarDate) -1
    else year(calendarDate)
  end as FinancialYear,
  case
    when month(calendarDate) < 4 then year(calendarDate) 
    else year(calendarDate) +1
  end as NextFinancialYear,
  CASE
    when quarter(calendarDate) =1 then 4
    else quarter(calendarDate) -1
  END as FinancialQuarter,
  concat(FinancialYear,'-',NextFinancialYear) as FinancialPeriod,
  concat(MonthOfYear,'-',CalendarYear) AS MonthANDYear
from
    calendar_dim
spark.sql(f"drop table if exists default.calendar_dim;")

%%sql
-- Build Employee_HR_Hierarchy_Dim table  

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.hr_employee_HR_Hierarchy_Dim (
    EmployeeHRHierarchyID,
    EmployeeID,
    ManagerEmployeeID,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
)

SELECT
    Row_Number() over (order by T3.EmployeeID) AS EmployeeHRHierarchyID,
    T3.EmployeeID AS EmployeeID,
    T4.EmployeeID as ManagerEmployeeID,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T3.EmployeeID,'.'), IFNULL(T4.EmployeeID,'.'))) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.vw_saphr_historic T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_employee_fact T3 ON T1.Pers_No = T3.EmployeeNumber AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_employee_fact T4 ON T1.Pers_No_1 = T4.EmployeeNumber AND T4.IsActive = 'Y'

%%sql

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.hr_record_fact (
    HRRecordID, -- surrogate key
    EmployeeID,
    CoCd,
    CompanyCode,
    PersonnelAreaID,
    PersonnelSubAreaID,
    OrganisationalUnitID,
    ContractID,
    PayBandID,
    CostCenterID,
    PositionID,
    ManagerEmployeeID,
    ManagerPositionID,
    LocationID,
    WorkScheduleID,
    EmployeeGroupID,
    PayrollAreaID,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
    )

SELECT
    Row_Number() over (order by T2.EmployeeID) as HRRecordID,
    T2.EmployeeID AS EmployeeID,
    T1.CoCd,
    T1.Company_Code,
    T3.PersonnelAreaID AS PersonnelAreaID,
    T4.PersonnelSubAreaID AS PersonnelSubAreaID,
    T5.OrganisationUnitID AS OrganisationalUnitID,
    T6.ContractID AS ContractID,
    T7.PayBandID AS PayBandID, -- NULLS occur due to contractors
    T8.CostCenterID AS CostCenterID,
    T9.PositionID AS PositionID,
    T10.ManagerEmployeeID AS ManagerEmployeeID,
    TempMPID.PositionID AS ManagerPositionID,
    T11.LocationID AS LocationID,
    T12.WorkScheduleID AS WorkScheduleID,
    T13.EmployeeGroupID,
    T13b.PayrollAreaID,
    T14.SourceSystemID,
    current_timestamp as IngestionDate,
    NULL as ValidTo,
    md5(concat(T2.EmployeeID, IFNULL(T3.PersonnelAreaID, '.'), IFNULL(T4.PersonnelSubAreaID, '.'), IFNULL(T5.OrganisationUnitID, '.'),IFNULL(T6.ContractID, '.'),
                IFNULL(T7.PayBandID, '.'),IFNULL(T8.CostCenterID, '.'),IFNULL(T9.PositionID, '.'),IFNULL(T10.ManagerEmployeeID, '.'),IFNULL(TempMPID.PositionID, '.'),
                IFNULL(NULL, '.'), IFNULL(T11.LocationID, '.'),IFNULL(T12.WorkScheduleID, '.'),IFNULL(T13.EmployeeGroupID, '.'),IFNULL(T13b.PayrollAreaID, '.'))) as RowID, 
    'Y' as IsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.vw_saphr_historic T1 
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_employee_fact T2 ON T1.Pers_No = T2.EmployeeNumber AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_personnel_area_dim T3 ON T1.PA = T3.PersonnelAreaCode AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_personnel_sub_area_dim T4 ON T1.PSubArea = T4.PersonnelSubAreaCode AND T1.Personnel_SubArea = T4.Description AND T4.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_organisation_unit_dim T5 ON T1.Org_unit = T5.OrganisationUnit and
                                                        T1.Organizational_Unit = T5.Description AND T5.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_contract_dim T6 ON T1.WorkC = T6.ContractCode AND 
                                                CASE 
                                                        WHEN T1.CT IS NULL
                                                        THEN 'N/A'
                                                        ELSE T1.CT
                                                END = T6.ContractTypeCode AND T6.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_payband_dim T7 ON T1.PS_group = T7.PSGroupCode AND T7.IsActive = 'Y' -- NULLS occur due to contractors
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_costcenter_dim T8 ON T1.Cost_Ctr = T8.CostCenterCode AND T8.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_position_dim T9 ON T1.Position= T9.PositionCode AND T9.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_position_dim TempMPID ON T1.Manager_Position = TempMPID.PositionCode AND TempMPID.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_employee_hr_hierarchy_dim T10 ON T2.EmployeeID = T10.EmployeeID AND T10.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_pins_location_dim T11 ON T1.Loc = T11.LocationCode AND T11.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN (
            SELECT T1.EmployeeID, T1.WorkScheduleID
            FROM odw_harmonised_db.hr_absence_dim T1
            INNER JOIN ( SELECT EmployeeID, Max(AbsenceEndDate) as Max_AbsenceEndDate
                         FROM odw_harmonised_db.hr_absence_dim
                         Where IsActive = 'Y'
                         GROUP BY EmployeeID ) T3        ON  T1.EmployeeID = T3.EmployeeID AND
                                                             T1.AbsenceEndDate = T3.Max_AbsenceEndDate
            where IsActive = 'Y'
            GROUP BY T1.EmployeeID, T1.WorkScheduleID
            
    ) T12 ON T2.EmployeeID = T12.EmployeeID  -- NULLS occur as no data for some employees in the absence file

LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_EmployeeGroup_dim T13 ON T1.EEGrp = T13.EEGrp and T13.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_payroll_area_dim T13b ON T1.PArea = T13b.PayrollAreaCode and T13b.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T14 ON "SAP HR" = T14.Description AND T14.IsActive = 'Y'

%%sql
-- Build OrganisationUnit_dim table

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.hr_organisation_unit_dim (
    OrganisationUnitID,
    OrganisationUnit,
    Description,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
)

SELECT
    Row_Number() over (Order By T1.Org_Unit, T1.Organizational_Unit) AS OrganisationUnitID,
    T1.Org_unit as OrganisationUnit,
    T1.Organizational_Unit AS Description,
    First(T2.SourceSystemID) as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.Org_unit,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Organizational_Unit,'.'))) as RowID, -- check this
    'Y' as IsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.vw_saphr_historic T1 
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE T1.Org_Unit is not null
GROUP BY T1.Org_unit, T1.Organizational_Unit

%%sql
-- Build contract_dim table

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.hr_contract_dim

SELECT
    Row_Number() over (order by T1.WorkC NULLS FIRST) AS ContractID,
    T1.WorkC as ContractCode, 
    First(T1.Work_Contract) as Description,
    CASE 
        WHEN T1.CT IS NULL
        THEN 'N/A'
        ELSE T1.CT
    END as ContractTypeCode,
    First(T1.Contract_Type) as ContractType,
    First(T2.SourceSystemID) as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.WorkC,'.'), IFNULL(First(T1.Work_Contract),'.'), IFNULL(T1.CT,'.'), IFNULL(First(T1.Contract_Type),'.'))) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive
FROM odw_standardised_db.vw_saphr_historic T1 
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE T1.WorkC IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY T1.WorkC, T1.CT

                IFNULL(T1.Seniority_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Org_Start_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Fix_Term_End_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Loan_Start_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Loan_End_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Payroll_Area,'.'),

%%sql   

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW odw_standardised_db.vw_addresses

AS

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN LENGTH(Staff_Number) = 6 AND SUBSTR(Staff_Number,1,1) = 5
        THEN CONCAT('00',Staff_Number)
        WHEN LENGTH(Staff_Number) = 6 AND SUBSTR(Staff_Number,1,1) = 4
        THEN CONCAT('50',Staff_Number)        
        ELSE Staff_Number
    END as Staff_Number,
    Street_and_House_Number,
    `2nd_Address_Line`,
    City,
    District,
    Postal_Code,
    Region_State_Province_Count,
    to_timestamp(Start_Date) AS Start_Date,
    to_timestamp(End_Date) AS End_Date,
    Charting_Officer,
    Charting_Officer_for_Inspector,
    Subs_PS_Group,
    Tel_No,
    Personal_Mobile,
    Work_Mobile,
    to_timestamp(Chngd_on) AS Chngd_on,
    ingested_datetime,
    expected_from,
    expected_to

FROM odw_standardised_db.hr_addresses T1
INNER JOIN (SELECT MAX(expected_from) AS Max_expectedfrom FROM odw_standardised_db.hr_addresses) MEF ON T1.expected_from = MEF.Max_expectedfrom

%%sql   

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW odw_standardised_db.vw_email

AS

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN LENGTH(Staff_Number) = 6 AND SUBSTR(Staff_Number,1,1) = 5
        THEN CONCAT('00',Staff_Number)
        WHEN LENGTH(Staff_Number) = 6 AND SUBSTR(Staff_Number,1,1) = 4
        THEN CONCAT('50',Staff_Number)        
        ELSE Staff_Number
    END as Staff_Number,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    email_address,
    text_line_manager,
    lm_e_mail,
    ingested_datetime,
    expected_from,
    expected_to

FROM odw_standardised_db.hr_email T1
INNER JOIN (SELECT MAX(expected_from) AS Max_expectedfrom FROM odw_standardised_db.hr_email) MEF ON T1.expected_from = MEF.Max_expectedfrom

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (horizon tables) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.casework tables)
- **New Data:** where an main Reference in the source does not exist in the target, then NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Reference Fields in source and in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an Reference info in the target exists but the same identifyers don't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View casework_additional_fields_dim is created

%%sql
-- Build casework_additional_fields_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_additional_fields_dim_new

     AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN T3.AdditionalFieldsID
        ELSE NULL
    END as AdditionalFieldsID,
    T1.appealrefnumber AS AppealRefNumber,
    T1.casereference AS CaseReference,
    T1.standardpriority AS StandardPriority,
    T1.importantinformation AS ImportantInformation,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.casereference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.standardpriority,'.'),IFNULL(T1.importantinformation,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields, so needs to be done
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND  md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.casereference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.standardpriority,'.'),IFNULL(T1.importantinformation,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRef
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_additional_fields T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_additional_fields_dim T3 ON T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.casereference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.standardpriority,'.'),IFNULL(T1.importantinformation,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new PositionCode
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    );

- **Changes tolerance levels:** if the total amount to be added and deleted surpasses the tolerance limit, it will interrupt the process of loading the data

# Dataset is created that contains changed data and corresponding target data
- This script combines data that has been updated, Deleted or is new, with corresponding target data
- View **casework_all_appeals_new** is unioned to the target data filter to only those rows where changes have been detected
## View casework_additional_fields_dim_changed_rows is created

%%sql
-- Create new and updated dataset

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_additional_fields_dim_changed_rows

    AS

-- gets updated, deleted and new rows 
SELECT 
    AdditionalFieldsID,
    AppealRefNumber,
    CaseReference,
    StandardPriority,
    ImportantInformation,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive

From casework_additional_fields_dim_new WHERE HistoricIsActive = 'Y' or HistoricIsActive IS NULL

    UNION ALL

-- gets original versions of updated rows so we can update EndDate and set IsActive flag to 'N'
SELECT
    AdditionalFieldsID,
    AppealRefNumber,
    CaseReference,
    StandardPriority,
    ImportantInformation,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
    
FROM odw_harmonised_db.casework_additional_fields_dim
WHERE AppealRefNumber IN (SELECT AppealRefNumber FROM casework_additional_fields_dim_new WHERE AdditionalFieldsID IS NULL) AND IsActive = 'Y';

# View casework_additional_fields_dim_changed_rows is used in a merge (Upsert) statement into the target table
- **WHEN MATCHED** ON the surrogate Key (i.e. AllAppealsID), EndDate is set to today -1 day and the IsActive flag is set to 'N'
- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the surrogate Key, insert rows
## Table odw_harmonised_db.casework_additional_fields_dim is updated

%%sql
-- merge into dim table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.casework_additional_fields_dim AS Target
USING casework_additional_fields_dim_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.AdditionalFieldsID = Target.AdditionalFieldsID

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.ValidTo = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;

# Fix the IDs
- No auto-increment feature is available in delta tables, therefore we need to create new IDs for the inserted rows
- This is done by select the target data and using INSERT OVERWRITE to re-insert the data is a new Row Number
## Table odw_harmonised_db.casework_additional_fields_dim is updated

%%sql
-- Insert new casework_additional_fields_dim

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.casework_additional_fields_dim

SELECT 
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY AppealRefNumber NULLS LAST) AS AdditionalFieldsID,
    AppealRefNumber,
    CaseReference,
    StandardPriority,
    ImportantInformation,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.casework_additional_fields_dim;

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (horizon tables) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.casework tables)
- **New Data:** where an main Reference in the source does not exist in the target, then NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Reference Fields in source and in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an Reference info in the target exists but the same identifyers don't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View casework_advert_details_dim is created

%%sql
-- Build casework_advert_details_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_advert_details_dim_new

     AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN T3.AdvertDetailsID
        ELSE NULL
    END as AdvertDetailsID,
    T1.appealrefnumber AS AppealRefNumber,
    T1.lastmodified AS LastModified,
    T1.signcategory AS SignCategory,
    T1.reasonpublicsafety AS ReasonPublicSafety,
    T1.reasonamenity AS ReasonAmenity,
    T1.outcomepublicsafety AS OutcomePublicSafety,
    T1.outcomeamenity AS OutcomeAmenity,
    T1.signdescription AS SignDescription,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lastmodified,'.'), IFNULL(T1.signcategory,'.'), IFNULL(T1.reasonpublicsafety,'.')
        , IFNULL(T1.reasonamenity,'.'), IFNULL(T1.outcomepublicsafety,'.'), IFNULL(T1.outcomeamenity,'.'), IFNULL(T1.signdescription,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields, so needs to be done
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND  md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lastmodified,'.'), IFNULL(T1.signcategory,'.'), IFNULL(T1.reasonpublicsafety,'.')
        , IFNULL(T1.reasonamenity,'.'), IFNULL(T1.outcomepublicsafety,'.'), IFNULL(T1.outcomeamenity,'.'), IFNULL(T1.signdescription,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRef
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_advert_details T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_advert_details_dim T3 ON T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lastmodified,'.'), IFNULL(T1.signcategory,'.'), IFNULL(T1.reasonpublicsafety,'.')
        , IFNULL(T1.reasonamenity,'.'), IFNULL(T1.outcomepublicsafety,'.'), IFNULL(T1.outcomeamenity,'.'), IFNULL(T1.signdescription,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new PositionCode
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    );

- **Changes tracking:** where it checks the data against active records in harmonised and compares with records to add and records to be set as inactive.
- **Changes tolerance levels:** if the total amount to be added and deleted surpasses the tolerance limit, it will interrupt the process of loading the data

# Dataset is created that contains changed data and corresponding target data
- This script combines data that has been updated, Deleted or is new, with corresponding target data
- View **casework_all_appeals_new** is unioned to the target data filter to only those rows where changes have been detected
## View casework_advert_details_dim_changed_rows is created

%%sql
-- Create new and updated dataset

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_advert_details_dim_changed_rows

    AS

-- gets updated, deleted and new rows 
SELECT 
    AdvertDetailsID,
    AppealRefNumber,
    LastModified,
    SignCategory,
    ReasonPublicSafety,
    ReasonAmenity,
    OutcomePublicSafety,
    OutcomeAmenity,
    SignDescription,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive

From casework_advert_details_dim_new WHERE HistoricIsActive = 'Y' or HistoricIsActive IS NULL

    UNION ALL

-- gets original versions of updated rows so we can update EndDate and set IsActive flag to 'N'
SELECT
    AdvertDetailsID,
    AppealRefNumber,
    LastModified,
    SignCategory,
    ReasonPublicSafety,
    ReasonAmenity,
    OutcomePublicSafety,
    OutcomeAmenity,
    SignDescription,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
    
FROM odw_harmonised_db.casework_advert_details_dim
WHERE AppealRefNumber IN (SELECT AppealRefNumber FROM casework_advert_details_dim_new WHERE AdvertDetailsID IS NULL) AND IsActive = 'Y';

# View casework_advert_details_dim_changed_rows is used in a merge (Upsert) statement into the target table
- **WHEN MATCHED** ON the surrogate Key (i.e. AllAppealsID), EndDate is set to today -1 day and the IsActive flag is set to 'N'
- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the surrogate Key, insert rows
## Table odw_harmonised_db.casework_advert_details_dim is updated

%%sql
-- merge into dim table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.casework_advert_details_dim AS Target
USING casework_advert_details_dim_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.AdvertDetailsID = Target.AdvertDetailsID

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.ValidTo = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;

# Fix the IDs
- No auto-increment feature is available in delta tables, therefore we need to create new IDs for the inserted rows
- This is done by select the target data and using INSERT OVERWRITE to re-insert the data is a new Row Number
## Table odw_harmonised_db.casework_advert_details_dim is updated

%%sql
-- Insert new casework_advert_details_dim

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.casework_advert_details_dim

SELECT 
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY AppealRefNumber NULLS LAST) AS AdvertDetailsID,
    AppealRefNumber,
    LastModified,
    SignCategory,
    ReasonPublicSafety,
    ReasonAmenity,
    OutcomePublicSafety,
    OutcomeAmenity,
    SignDescription,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.casework_advert_details_dim;

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (horizon tables) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.casework tables)
- **New Data:** where an main Reference in the source does not exist in the target, then NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Reference Fields in source and in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an Reference info in the target exists but the same identifyers don't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View casework_all_appeals_additional_data_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build casework_all_appeals_additional_data_dim_new table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_all_appeals_additional_data_dim_new 

     AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.AppealRefNumber IS NULL
        THEN T3.AllAppealsAdditionalDataID
        ELSE NULL
    END as AllAppealsAdditionalDataID,
    T1.appealrefnumber AS AppealRefNumber,
    T1.lastmodified AS LastModified,
    T1.decisiondate AS DecisionDate,
    T1.decisionsubmitdate AS DecisionSubmitDate,
    T1.bespokeindicator AS BespokeIndicator,
    T1.bespoketargetdate AS BespokeTargetDate,
    T1.processingstate AS ProcessingState,
    T1.linkstatus AS LinkStatus,
    T1.casecloseddate AS CaseClosedDate,
    T1.pcsappealwithdrawndate AS PCSAppealWithdrawnDate,
    T1.numberofresidences AS NumberOfResidences,
    T1.appealsdocumentscomplete AS AppealsDocumentsComplete,
    T1.questionnairereceived AS QuestionnaireReceived,
    T1.lpaconditionsreceived AS LPAConditionsReceived,
    T1.lpaconditionsforwarded AS LPAConditionsForwarded,
    T1.statementsdue AS StatementsDue,
    T1.lpastatementsubmitted AS LPAStatementSubmitted,
    T1.lpastatementforwarded AS LPAStatementForwarded,
    T1.appellantstatementsubmitted AS AppellantStatementSubmitted,
    T1.appellantstatementforwarded AS AppellantStatementForwarded,
    T1.finalcommentsdue AS FinalCommentsDue,
    T1.lpacommentssubmitted AS LPACommentsSubmitted,
    T1.lpacommentsforwarded AS LPACommentsForwarded,
    T1.statementofcommongrounddue AS StatementOfCommonGroundDue,
    T1.statementofcommongroundreceived AS StatementOfCommonGroundReceived,
    T1.appellantcommentssubmitted AS AppellantCommentsSubmitted,
    T1.appellantcommentsforwarded AS AppellantCommentsForwarded,
    T1.thirdpartyrepsdue AS ThirdPartyRepsDue,
    T1.thirdpartyrepsforwarded AS ThirdPartyRepsForwarded,
    T1.sitenoticesent AS SiteNoticeSent,
    T1.proofsdue AS ProofsDue,
    T1.lpaproofssubmitted AS LPAProofsSubmitted,
    T1.lpaproofsforwarded AS LPAProofsForwarded,
    T1.appellantsproofssubmitted AS AppellantsProofsSubmitted,
    T1.appellantsproofsforwarded AS AppellantsProofsForwarded,
    T1.areaofsiteinhectares AS AreaOfSiteInHectares,
    T1.dateofdecisionifissued AS DateOfDecisionIfIssued,
    T1.typeofapplication AS TypeOfApplication,
    T1.appealsourceindicator AS AppealSourceIndicator,
    T1.developmentorallegation AS DevelopmentOrAllegation,
    T1.amountdue AS AmountDue,
    T1.sitegreenbelt AS SiteGreenBelt,
    T1.lpaapplicationreference AS LPAApplicationReference,
    T1.lpaapplicationdate AS LPAApplicationDate,
    T1.datenotrecoveredorderecovered AS DateNotRecoveredOrDeRecovered,
    T1.daterecovered AS DateRecovered,
    T1.callindate AS CallInDate,
    T1.caseprocess AS CaseProcess,
    T1.caseworkmarker AS CaseworkMarker,
    T1.costsappliedforindicator AS CostsAppliedForIndicator,
    T1.level AS Level,
    T1.procedureappellant AS ProcedureAppellant,
    T1.procedurelpa AS ProcedureLPA,
    T1.proceduredetermineddate AS ProcedureDeterminedDate,
    T1.targetdate AS TargetDate,
    T1.agriculturalholding AS AgriculturalHolding,
    T1.developmentaffectsettingoflistedbuilding AS DevelopmentAffectSettingOfListedBuilding,
    T1.floorspaceinsquaremetres AS FloorSpaceInSquareMetres,
    T1.sitegridreferenceeasting AS SiteGridReferenceEasting,
    T1.sitegridreferencenorthing AS SiteGridReferenceNorthing,
    T1.historicbuildinggrantmade AS HistoricBuildingGrantMade,
    T1.incarelatestoca AS InCARelatesToCA,
    T1.inspectorneedtoentersite AS InspectorNeedToEnterSite,
    T1.isfloodinganissue AS IsFloodingAnIssue,
    T1.isthesitewithinanaonb AS IsTheSiteWithinAnAONB,
    T1.sitewithinsssi AS SiteWithinSSSI,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lastmodified,'.'), IFNULL(T1.decisiondate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.decisionsubmitdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.bespokeindicator,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.bespoketargetdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.processingstate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.linkstatus,'.'), IFNULL(T1.casecloseddate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.pcsappealwithdrawndate,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.numberofresidences,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealsdocumentscomplete,'.'), IFNULL(T1.questionnairereceived,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaconditionsreceived,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.lpaconditionsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.statementsdue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpastatementsubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpastatementforwarded,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.appellantstatementsubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantstatementforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.finalcommentsdue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpacommentssubmitted,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.lpacommentsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.statementofcommongrounddue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.statementofcommongroundreceived,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantcommentssubmitted,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.appellantcommentsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.thirdpartyrepsdue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.thirdpartyrepsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitenoticesent,'.'), IFNULL(T1.proofsdue,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.lpaproofssubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaproofsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantsproofssubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantsproofsforwarded,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.areaofsiteinhectares,'.'), IFNULL(T1.dateofdecisionifissued,'.'), IFNULL(T1.typeofapplication,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealsourceindicator,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.developmentorallegation,'.'), IFNULL(T1.amountdue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitegreenbelt,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaapplicationreference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaapplicationdate,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.datenotrecoveredorderecovered,'.'), IFNULL(T1.daterecovered,'.'), IFNULL(T1.callindate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.caseprocess,'.'), IFNULL(T1.caseworkmarker,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.costsappliedforindicator,'.'), IFNULL(T1.level,'.'), IFNULL(T1.procedureappellant,'.'), IFNULL(T1.procedurelpa,'.'), IFNULL(T1.proceduredetermineddate,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.targetdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.agriculturalholding,'.'), IFNULL(T1.developmentaffectsettingoflistedbuilding,'.'), IFNULL(T1.floorspaceinsquaremetres,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.sitegridreferenceeasting,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitegridreferencenorthing,'.'), IFNULL(T1.historicbuildinggrantmade,'.'), IFNULL(T1.incarelatestoca,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.inspectorneedtoentersite,'.'), IFNULL(T1.isfloodinganissue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.isthesitewithinanaonb,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitewithinsssi,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lastmodified,'.'), IFNULL(T1.decisiondate,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.decisionsubmitdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.bespokeindicator,'.'), IFNULL(T1.bespoketargetdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.processingstate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.linkstatus,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.casecloseddate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.pcsappealwithdrawndate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.numberofresidences,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealsdocumentscomplete,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.questionnairereceived,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaconditionsreceived,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaconditionsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.statementsdue,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.lpastatementsubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpastatementforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantstatementsubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantstatementforwarded,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.finalcommentsdue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpacommentssubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpacommentsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.statementofcommongrounddue,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.statementofcommongroundreceived,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantcommentssubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantcommentsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.thirdpartyrepsdue,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.thirdpartyrepsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitenoticesent,'.'), IFNULL(T1.proofsdue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaproofssubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaproofsforwarded,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.appellantsproofssubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantsproofsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.areaofsiteinhectares,'.'), IFNULL(T1.dateofdecisionifissued,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.typeofapplication,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealsourceindicator,'.'), IFNULL(T1.developmentorallegation,'.'), IFNULL(T1.amountdue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitegreenbelt,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.lpaapplicationreference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaapplicationdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.datenotrecoveredorderecovered,'.'), IFNULL(T1.daterecovered,'.'), IFNULL(T1.callindate,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.caseprocess,'.'), IFNULL(T1.caseworkmarker,'.'), IFNULL(T1.costsappliedforindicator,'.'), IFNULL(T1.level,'.'), IFNULL(T1.procedureappellant,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.procedurelpa,'.'), IFNULL(T1.proceduredetermineddate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.targetdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.agriculturalholding,'.'), IFNULL(T1.developmentaffectsettingoflistedbuilding,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.floorspaceinsquaremetres,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitegridreferenceeasting,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitegridreferencenorthing,'.'), IFNULL(T1.historicbuildinggrantmade,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.incarelatestoca,'.'), IFNULL(T1.inspectorneedtoentersite,'.'), IFNULL(T1.isfloodinganissue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.isthesitewithinanaonb,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitewithinsssi,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same row, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRefNumber
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive
    

FROM odw_standardised_db.vw_all_additional_appeal T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_all_appeals_additional_data_dim T3 ON T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lastmodified,'.'), IFNULL(T1.decisiondate,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.decisionsubmitdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.bespokeindicator,'.'), IFNULL(T1.bespoketargetdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.processingstate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.linkstatus,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.casecloseddate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.pcsappealwithdrawndate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.numberofresidences,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealsdocumentscomplete,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.questionnairereceived,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaconditionsreceived,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaconditionsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.statementsdue,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.lpastatementsubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpastatementforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantstatementsubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantstatementforwarded,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.finalcommentsdue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpacommentssubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpacommentsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.statementofcommongrounddue,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.statementofcommongroundreceived,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantcommentssubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantcommentsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.thirdpartyrepsdue,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.thirdpartyrepsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitenoticesent,'.'), IFNULL(T1.proofsdue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaproofssubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaproofsforwarded,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.appellantsproofssubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantsproofsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.areaofsiteinhectares,'.'), IFNULL(T1.dateofdecisionifissued,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.typeofapplication,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealsourceindicator,'.'), IFNULL(T1.developmentorallegation,'.'), IFNULL(T1.amountdue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitegreenbelt,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.lpaapplicationreference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaapplicationdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.datenotrecoveredorderecovered,'.'), IFNULL(T1.daterecovered,'.'), IFNULL(T1.callindate,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.caseprocess,'.'), IFNULL(T1.caseworkmarker,'.'), IFNULL(T1.costsappliedforindicator,'.'), IFNULL(T1.level,'.'), IFNULL(T1.procedureappellant,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.procedurelpa,'.'), IFNULL(T1.proceduredetermineddate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.targetdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.agriculturalholding,'.'), IFNULL(T1.developmentaffectsettingoflistedbuilding,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.floorspaceinsquaremetres,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitegridreferenceeasting,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitegridreferencenorthing,'.'), IFNULL(T1.historicbuildinggrantmade,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.incarelatestoca,'.'), IFNULL(T1.inspectorneedtoentersite,'.'), IFNULL(T1.isfloodinganissue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.isthesitewithinanaonb,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitewithinsssi,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same row, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRefNumber
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    );

# Dataset is created that contains changed data and corresponding target data
- This script combines data that has been updated, Deleted or is new, with corresponding target data
- View **casework_all_appeals_additional_data_dim_new** is unioned to the target data filter to only those rows where changes have been detected
## View casework_all_appeals_additional_data_dim_changed_rows is created

%%sql
-- Create new and updated dataset

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_all_appeals_additional_data_dim_changed_rows

    AS

-- gets updated, deleted and new rows 
Select 
    AllAppealsAdditionalDataID,
    AppealRefNumber,
    LastModified,
    DecisionDate,
    DecisionSubmitDate,
    BespokeIndicator,
    BespokeTargetDate,
    ProcessingState,
    LinkStatus,
    CaseClosedDate,
    PCSAppealWithdrawnDate,
    NumberOfResidences,
    AppealsDocumentsComplete,
    QuestionnaireReceived,
    LPAConditionsReceived,
    LPAConditionsForwarded,
    StatementsDue,
    LPAStatementSubmitted,
    LPAStatementForwarded,
    AppellantStatementSubmitted,
    AppellantStatementForwarded,
    FinalCommentsDue,
    LPACommentsSubmitted,
    LPACommentsForwarded,
    StatementOfCommonGroundDue,
    StatementOfCommonGroundReceived,
    AppellantCommentsSubmitted,
    AppellantCommentsForwarded,
    ThirdPartyRepsDue,
    ThirdPartyRepsForwarded,
    SiteNoticeSent,
    ProofsDue,
    LPAProofsSubmitted,
    LPAProofsForwarded,
    AppellantsProofsSubmitted,
    AppellantsProofsForwarded,
    AreaOfSiteInHectares,
    DateOfDecisionIfIssued,
    TypeOfApplication,
    AppealSourceIndicator,
    DevelopmentOrAllegation,
    AmountDue,
    SiteGreenBelt,
    LPAApplicationReference,
    LPAApplicationDate,
    DateNotRecoveredOrDeRecovered,

    CallInDate,
    CaseProcess,
    CaseworkMarker,
    CostsAppliedForIndicator,
    Level,
    ProcedureAppellant,
    ProcedureLPA,
    ProcedureDeterminedDate,
    TargetDate,
    AgriculturalHolding,
    DevelopmentAffectSettingOfListedBuilding,
    FloorSpaceInSquareMetres,
    SiteGridReferenceEasting,
    SiteGridReferenceNorthing,
    HistoricBuildingGrantMade,
    InCARelatesToCA,
    InspectorNeedToEnterSite,
    IsFloodingAnIssue,
    IsTheSiteWithinAnAONB,
    SiteWithinSSSI,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive

From casework_all_appeals_additional_data_dim_new WHERE HistoricIsActive = 'Y' or HistoricIsActive IS NULL

    UNION ALL

-- gets original versions of updated rows so we can update EndDate and set IsActive flag to 'N'
SELECT
    AllAppealsAdditionalDataID,
    AppealRefNumber,
    LastModified,
    DecisionDate,
    DecisionSubmitDate,
    BespokeIndicator,
    BespokeTargetDate,
    ProcessingState,
    LinkStatus,
    CaseClosedDate,
    PCSAppealWithdrawnDate,
    NumberOfResidences,
    AppealsDocumentsComplete,
    QuestionnaireReceived,
    LPAConditionsReceived,
    LPAConditionsForwarded,
    StatementsDue,
    LPAStatementSubmitted,
    LPAStatementForwarded,
    AppellantStatementSubmitted,
    AppellantStatementForwarded,
    FinalCommentsDue,
    LPACommentsSubmitted,
    LPACommentsForwarded,
    StatementOfCommonGroundDue,
    StatementOfCommonGroundReceived,
    AppellantCommentsSubmitted,
    AppellantCommentsForwarded,
    ThirdPartyRepsDue,
    ThirdPartyRepsForwarded,
    SiteNoticeSent,
    ProofsDue,
    LPAProofsSubmitted,
    LPAProofsForwarded,
    AppellantsProofsSubmitted,
    AppellantsProofsForwarded,
    AreaOfSiteInHectares,
    DateOfDecisionIfIssued,
    TypeOfApplication,
    AppealSourceIndicator,
    DevelopmentOrAllegation,
    AmountDue,
    SiteGreenBelt,
    LPAApplicationReference,
    LPAApplicationDate,
    DateNotRecoveredOrDeRecovered,
    DateRecovered,
    CallInDate,
    CaseProcess,
    CaseworkMarker,
    CostsAppliedForIndicator,
    Level,
    ProcedureAppellant,
    ProcedureLPA,
    ProcedureDeterminedDate,
    TargetDate,
    AgriculturalHolding,
    DevelopmentAffectSettingOfListedBuilding,
    FloorSpaceInSquareMetres,

    SiteGridReferenceNorthing,
    HistoricBuildingGrantMade,
    InCARelatesToCA,

    IsFloodingAnIssue,
    IsTheSiteWithinAnAONB,
    SiteWithinSSSI,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
    
FROM odw_harmonised_db.casework_all_appeals_additional_data_dim
WHERE AppealRefNumber IN (SELECT AppealRefNumber FROM casework_all_appeals_additional_data_dim_new WHERE AllAppealsAdditionalDataID IS NULL) AND IsActive = 'Y';

# View casework_all_appeals_additional_data_dim_changed_rows is used in a merge (Upsert) statement into the target table
- **WHEN MATCHED** ON the surrogate Key (i.e. AllAppealsAdditionalDataID), EndDate is set to today -1 day and the IsActive flag is set to 'N'
- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the surrogate Key, insert rows
## Table odw_harmonised_db.casework_all_appeals_additional_data_dim is updated

%%sql
-- merge into dim table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.casework_all_appeals_additional_data_dim AS Target
USING casework_all_appeals_additional_data_dim_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.AllAppealsAdditionalDataID = Target.AllAppealsAdditionalDataID

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.ValidTo = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;

# Fix the IDs
- No auto-increment feature is available in delta tables, therefore we need to create new IDs for the inserted rows
- This is done by select the target data and using INSERT OVERWRITE to re-insert the data is a new Row Number
## Table odw_harmonised_db.casework_all_appeals_additional_data_dim is updated

SELECT

FROM odw_harmonised_db.casework_all_appeals_additional_data_dim;

%%sql

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW  ST1 AS 
SELECT appealrefnumber,lastmodified,decisiondate,decisionsubmitdate,bespokeindicator,bespoketargetdate,processingstate,linkstatus,casecloseddate,pcsappealwithdrawndate,
numberofresidences,appealsdocumentscomplete,questionnairereceived,lpaconditionsreceived,lpaconditionsforwarded,statementsdue,lpastatementsubmitted,lpastatementforwarded,
appellantstatementsubmitted,appellantstatementforwarded,finalcommentsdue,lpacommentssubmitted,lpacommentsforwarded,statementofcommongrounddue,statementofcommongroundreceived,
appellantcommentssubmitted,appellantcommentsforwarded,thirdpartyrepsdue,thirdpartyrepsforwarded,sitenoticesent,proofsdue,lpaproofssubmitted,lpaproofsforwarded,
appellantsproofssubmitted,appellantsproofsforwarded,areaofsiteinhectares,dateofdecisionifissued,typeofapplication,appealsourceindicator,developmentorallegation,
amountdue,sitegreenbelt,lpaapplicationreference,lpaapplicationdate,datenotrecoveredorderecovered,daterecovered,callindate
