GROUP BY appealrefnumber,lastmodified,decisiondate,decisionsubmitdate,bespokeindicator,bespoketargetdate,processingstate,linkstatus,casecloseddate,pcsappealwithdrawndate,
numberofresidences,appealsdocumentscomplete,questionnairereceived,lpaconditionsreceived,lpaconditionsforwarded,statementsdue,lpastatementsubmitted,lpastatementforwarded,
appellantstatementsubmitted,appellantstatementforwarded,finalcommentsdue,lpacommentssubmitted,lpacommentsforwarded,statementofcommongrounddue,statementofcommongroundreceived,
appellantcommentssubmitted,appellantcommentsforwarded,thirdpartyrepsdue,thirdpartyrepsforwarded,sitenoticesent,proofsdue,lpaproofssubmitted,lpaproofsforwarded,
appellantsproofssubmitted,appellantsproofsforwarded,areaofsiteinhectares,dateofdecisionifissued,typeofapplication,appealsourceindicator,developmentorallegation,
amountdue,sitegreenbelt,lpaapplicationreference,lpaapplicationdate,datenotrecoveredorderecovered,daterecovered,callindate;

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW ST2
AS SELECT appealrefnumber,caseprocess,caseworkmarker,costsappliedforindicator,level,procedureappellant,procedurelpa,proceduredetermineddate,targetdate,agriculturalholding,
developmentaffectsettingoflistedbuilding,floorspaceinsquaremetres,sitegridreferenceeasting,sitegridreferencenorthing,historicbuildinggrantmade,incarelatestoca,
inspectorneedtoentersite,isfloodinganissue,isthesitewithinanaonb,sitewithinsssi
FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_add_additional_data
GROUP BY appealrefnumber,caseprocess,caseworkmarker,costsappliedforindicator,level,procedureappellant,procedurelpa,proceduredetermineddate,targetdate,agriculturalholding,
developmentaffectsettingoflistedbuilding,floorspaceinsquaremetres,sitegridreferenceeasting,sitegridreferencenorthing,historicbuildinggrantmade,incarelatestoca,
inspectorneedtoentersite,isfloodinganissue,isthesitewithinanaonb,sitewithinsssi;

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW TempAdditional AS SELECT
    ST1.*,
    ST2.caseprocess,
    ST2.caseworkmarker,
    ST2.costsappliedforindicator,
    ST2.level,
    ST2.procedureappellant,
    ST2.procedurelpa,
    ST2.proceduredetermineddate,
    ST2.targetdate,
    ST2.agriculturalholding,
    ST2.developmentaffectsettingoflistedbuilding,
    ST2.floorspaceinsquaremetres,
    ST2.sitegridreferenceeasting,
    ST2.sitegridreferencenorthing,
    ST2.historicbuildinggrantmade,
    ST2.incarelatestoca,
    ST2.inspectorneedtoentersite,
    ST2.isfloodinganissue,
    ST2.isthesitewithinanaonb,
    ST2.sitewithinsssi
    FROM ST1 FULL JOIN ST2 on ST1.appealrefnumber = ST2.appealrefnumber;

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (horizon tables) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.casework tables)
- **New Data:** where an main Reference in the source does not exist in the target, then NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Reference Fields in source and in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an Reference info in the target exists but the same identifyers don't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View casework_all_appeals_additional_data_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build casework_all_appeals_additional_data_dim_new table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_all_appeals_additional_data_dim_new 

     AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.AppealRefNumber IS NULL
        THEN T3.AllAppealsAdditionalDataID
        ELSE NULL
    END as AllAppealsAdditionalDataID,
    T1.appealrefnumber AS AppealRefNumber,
    T1.lastmodified AS LastModified,
    T1.decisiondate AS DecisionDate,
    T1.decisionsubmitdate AS DecisionSubmitDate,
    T1.bespokeindicator AS BespokeIndicator,
    T1.bespoketargetdate AS BespokeTargetDate,
    T1.processingstate AS ProcessingState,
    T1.linkstatus AS LinkStatus,
    T1.casecloseddate AS CaseClosedDate,
    T1.pcsappealwithdrawndate AS PCSAppealWithdrawnDate,
    T1.numberofresidences AS NumberOfResidences,
    T1.appealsdocumentscomplete AS AppealsDocumentsComplete,
    T1.questionnairereceived AS QuestionnaireReceived,
    T1.lpaconditionsreceived AS LPAConditionsReceived,
    T1.lpaconditionsforwarded AS LPAConditionsForwarded,
    T1.statementsdue AS StatementsDue,
    T1.lpastatementsubmitted AS LPAStatementSubmitted,
    T1.lpastatementforwarded AS LPAStatementForwarded,
    T1.appellantstatementsubmitted AS AppellantStatementSubmitted,
    T1.appellantstatementforwarded AS AppellantStatementForwarded,
    T1.finalcommentsdue AS FinalCommentsDue,
    T1.lpacommentssubmitted AS LPACommentsSubmitted,
    T1.lpacommentsforwarded AS LPACommentsForwarded,
    T1.statementofcommongrounddue AS StatementOfCommonGroundDue,
    T1.statementofcommongroundreceived AS StatementOfCommonGroundReceived,
    T1.appellantcommentssubmitted AS AppellantCommentsSubmitted,
    T1.appellantcommentsforwarded AS AppellantCommentsForwarded,
    T1.thirdpartyrepsdue AS ThirdPartyRepsDue,
    T1.thirdpartyrepsforwarded AS ThirdPartyRepsForwarded,
    T1.sitenoticesent AS SiteNoticeSent,
    T1.proofsdue AS ProofsDue,
    T1.lpaproofssubmitted AS LPAProofsSubmitted,
    T1.lpaproofsforwarded AS LPAProofsForwarded,
    T1.appellantsproofssubmitted AS AppellantsProofsSubmitted,
    T1.appellantsproofsforwarded AS AppellantsProofsForwarded,
    T1.areaofsiteinhectares AS AreaOfSiteInHectares,
    T1.dateofdecisionifissued AS DateOfDecisionIfIssued,
    T1.typeofapplication AS TypeOfApplication,
    T1.appealsourceindicator AS AppealSourceIndicator,
    T1.developmentorallegation AS DevelopmentOrAllegation,
    T1.amountdue AS AmountDue,
    T1.sitegreenbelt AS SiteGreenBelt,
    T1.lpaapplicationreference AS LPAApplicationReference,
    T1.lpaapplicationdate AS LPAApplicationDate,
    T1.datenotrecoveredorderecovered AS DateNotRecoveredOrDeRecovered,
    T1.daterecovered AS DateRecovered,
    T1.callindate AS CallInDate,
    T1.caseprocess AS CaseProcess,
    T1.caseworkmarker AS CaseworkMarker,
    T1.costsappliedforindicator AS CostsAppliedForIndicator,
    T1.level AS Level,
    T1.procedureappellant AS ProcedureAppellant,
    T1.procedurelpa AS ProcedureLPA,
    T1.proceduredetermineddate AS ProcedureDeterminedDate,
    T1.targetdate AS TargetDate,
    T1.agriculturalholding AS AgriculturalHolding,
    T1.developmentaffectsettingoflistedbuilding AS DevelopmentAffectSettingOfListedBuilding,
    T1.floorspaceinsquaremetres AS FloorSpaceInSquareMetres,
    T1.sitegridreferenceeasting AS SiteGridReferenceEasting,
    T1.sitegridreferencenorthing AS SiteGridReferenceNorthing,
    T1.historicbuildinggrantmade AS HistoricBuildingGrantMade,
    T1.incarelatestoca AS InCARelatesToCA,
    T1.inspectorneedtoentersite AS InspectorNeedToEnterSite,
    T1.isfloodinganissue AS IsFloodingAnIssue,
    T1.isthesitewithinanaonb AS IsTheSiteWithinAnAONB,
    T1.sitewithinsssi AS SiteWithinSSSI,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lastmodified,'.'), IFNULL(T1.decisiondate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.decisionsubmitdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.bespokeindicator,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.bespoketargetdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.processingstate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.linkstatus,'.'), IFNULL(T1.casecloseddate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.pcsappealwithdrawndate,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.numberofresidences,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealsdocumentscomplete,'.'), IFNULL(T1.questionnairereceived,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaconditionsreceived,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.lpaconditionsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.statementsdue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpastatementsubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpastatementforwarded,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.appellantstatementsubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantstatementforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.finalcommentsdue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpacommentssubmitted,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.lpacommentsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.statementofcommongrounddue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.statementofcommongroundreceived,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantcommentssubmitted,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.appellantcommentsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.thirdpartyrepsdue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.thirdpartyrepsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitenoticesent,'.'), IFNULL(T1.proofsdue,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.lpaproofssubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaproofsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantsproofssubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantsproofsforwarded,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.areaofsiteinhectares,'.'), IFNULL(T1.dateofdecisionifissued,'.'), IFNULL(T1.typeofapplication,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealsourceindicator,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.developmentorallegation,'.'), IFNULL(T1.amountdue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitegreenbelt,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaapplicationreference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaapplicationdate,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.datenotrecoveredorderecovered,'.'), IFNULL(T1.daterecovered,'.'), IFNULL(T1.callindate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.caseprocess,'.'), IFNULL(T1.caseworkmarker,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.costsappliedforindicator,'.'), IFNULL(T1.level,'.'), IFNULL(T1.procedureappellant,'.'), IFNULL(T1.procedurelpa,'.'), IFNULL(T1.proceduredetermineddate,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.targetdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.agriculturalholding,'.'), IFNULL(T1.developmentaffectsettingoflistedbuilding,'.'), IFNULL(T1.floorspaceinsquaremetres,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.sitegridreferenceeasting,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitegridreferencenorthing,'.'), IFNULL(T1.historicbuildinggrantmade,'.'), IFNULL(T1.incarelatestoca,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.inspectorneedtoentersite,'.'), IFNULL(T1.isfloodinganissue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.isthesitewithinanaonb,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitewithinsssi,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lastmodified,'.'), IFNULL(T1.decisiondate,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.decisionsubmitdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.bespokeindicator,'.'), IFNULL(T1.bespoketargetdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.processingstate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.linkstatus,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.casecloseddate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.pcsappealwithdrawndate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.numberofresidences,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealsdocumentscomplete,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.questionnairereceived,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaconditionsreceived,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaconditionsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.statementsdue,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.lpastatementsubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpastatementforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantstatementsubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantstatementforwarded,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.finalcommentsdue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpacommentssubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpacommentsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.statementofcommongrounddue,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.statementofcommongroundreceived,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantcommentssubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantcommentsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.thirdpartyrepsdue,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.thirdpartyrepsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitenoticesent,'.'), IFNULL(T1.proofsdue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaproofssubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaproofsforwarded,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.appellantsproofssubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantsproofsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.areaofsiteinhectares,'.'), IFNULL(T1.dateofdecisionifissued,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.typeofapplication,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealsourceindicator,'.'), IFNULL(T1.developmentorallegation,'.'), IFNULL(T1.amountdue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitegreenbelt,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.lpaapplicationreference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaapplicationdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.datenotrecoveredorderecovered,'.'), IFNULL(T1.daterecovered,'.'), IFNULL(T1.callindate,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.caseprocess,'.'), IFNULL(T1.caseworkmarker,'.'), IFNULL(T1.costsappliedforindicator,'.'), IFNULL(T1.level,'.'), IFNULL(T1.procedureappellant,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.procedurelpa,'.'), IFNULL(T1.proceduredetermineddate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.targetdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.agriculturalholding,'.'), IFNULL(T1.developmentaffectsettingoflistedbuilding,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.floorspaceinsquaremetres,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitegridreferenceeasting,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitegridreferencenorthing,'.'), IFNULL(T1.historicbuildinggrantmade,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.incarelatestoca,'.'), IFNULL(T1.inspectorneedtoentersite,'.'), IFNULL(T1.isfloodinganissue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.isthesitewithinanaonb,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitewithinsssi,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same row, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRefNumber
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive
    

FROM TempAdditional T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_all_appeals_additional_data_dim T3 ON T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lastmodified,'.'), IFNULL(T1.decisiondate,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.decisionsubmitdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.bespokeindicator,'.'), IFNULL(T1.bespoketargetdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.processingstate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.linkstatus,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.casecloseddate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.pcsappealwithdrawndate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.numberofresidences,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealsdocumentscomplete,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.questionnairereceived,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaconditionsreceived,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaconditionsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.statementsdue,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.lpastatementsubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpastatementforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantstatementsubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantstatementforwarded,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.finalcommentsdue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpacommentssubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpacommentsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.statementofcommongrounddue,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.statementofcommongroundreceived,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantcommentssubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantcommentsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.thirdpartyrepsdue,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.thirdpartyrepsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitenoticesent,'.'), IFNULL(T1.proofsdue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaproofssubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaproofsforwarded,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.appellantsproofssubmitted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellantsproofsforwarded,'.'), IFNULL(T1.areaofsiteinhectares,'.'), IFNULL(T1.dateofdecisionifissued,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.typeofapplication,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealsourceindicator,'.'), IFNULL(T1.developmentorallegation,'.'), IFNULL(T1.amountdue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitegreenbelt,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.lpaapplicationreference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaapplicationdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.datenotrecoveredorderecovered,'.'), IFNULL(T1.daterecovered,'.'), IFNULL(T1.callindate,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.caseprocess,'.'), IFNULL(T1.caseworkmarker,'.'), IFNULL(T1.costsappliedforindicator,'.'), IFNULL(T1.level,'.'), IFNULL(T1.procedureappellant,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.procedurelpa,'.'), IFNULL(T1.proceduredetermineddate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.targetdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.agriculturalholding,'.'), IFNULL(T1.developmentaffectsettingoflistedbuilding,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.floorspaceinsquaremetres,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitegridreferenceeasting,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitegridreferencenorthing,'.'), IFNULL(T1.historicbuildinggrantmade,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.incarelatestoca,'.'), IFNULL(T1.inspectorneedtoentersite,'.'), IFNULL(T1.isfloodinganissue,'.'), IFNULL(T1.isthesitewithinanaonb,'.'), IFNULL(T1.sitewithinsssi,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same row, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRefNumber
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    );

# View casework_all_appeals_additional_data_dim_changed_rows is used in a merge (Upsert) statement into the target table
- **WHEN MATCHED** ON the surrogate Key (i.e. AllAppealsAdditionalDataID), EndDate is set to today -1 day and the IsActive flag is set to 'N'
- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the surrogate Key, insert rows
## Table odw_harmonised_db.casework_all_appeals_additional_data_dim is updated

%%sql
-- merge into dim table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.casework_all_appeals_additional_data_dim AS Target
USING casework_all_appeals_additional_data_dim_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.AllAppealsAdditionalDataID = Target.AllAppealsAdditionalDataID

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.ValidTo = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (horizon tables) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.casework tables)
- **New Data:** where an main Reference in the source does not exist in the target, then NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Reference Fields in source and in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an Reference info in the target exists but the same identifyers don't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View casework_all_appeals_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build casework_all_appeals_dim_new table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_all_appeals_dim_new

     AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.AppealRefNumber IS NULL
        THEN T3.AllAppealsID
        ELSE NULL
    END as AllAppealsID,
    T1.appealrefnumber AS AppealRefNumber,
    T1.lastmodified AS LastModified,
    T1.procedurecode AS ProcedureCode,
    T1.decisioncod AS DecisionCode,
    T1.linkedappeal AS LinkedAppeal,
    T10.LPAID AS LPAID,
    T1.applicationtype AS ApplicationType,
    T1.appealtypereason AS AppealTypeReason,
    T1.appealtypereasonid AS AppealTypeReasonID,
    T1.appealtypegroup AS AppealTypeGroup,
    T1.appealtype AS AppealType,
    T1.rcrissue1 AS RCRIssue1,
    T1.appealrecdate AS AppealRecDate,
    T1.appealstartdate AS AppealStartDate,
    T1.appealdecideddate AS AppealDecidedDate,
    T1.appealwithdrawndate AS AppealWithdrawnDate,
    T1.appealturnedawaydate AS AppealTurnedAwayDate,
    T1.appeallapseddate AS AppealLapsedDate,
    T1.redetermined AS Redetermined,
    T1.jurisdiction AS Jurisdiction,
    T1.daysinabeyance AS DaysInAbeyance,
    T1.leadcase AS LeadCase,
    T1.leadcaseworktype AS LeadCaseworkType,
    T1.leadproceduretype AS LeadProcedureType,
    T1.developmenttype AS DevelopmentType,
    T1.caseofficerName AS CaseOfficerName,
    T1.caseofficerlogin AS CaseOfficerLogin,
    T1.leadcaseofficername AS LeadCaseOfficerName,
    T1.leadcaseofficelogin AS LeadCaseOfficeLogin,
    T1.currentactivetaskgrp AS CurrentActiveTaskGrp,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lastmodified,'.'), IFNULL(T1.procedurecode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.decisioncod,'.'), IFNULL(T1.linkedappeal,'.'), IFNULL(T10.LPAID,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.applicationtype,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealtypereason,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealtypereasonid,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealtypegroup,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealtype,'.'), IFNULL(T1.rcrissue1,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.appealrecdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealstartdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealdecideddate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealwithdrawndate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealturnedawaydate,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.appeallapseddate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.redetermined,'.'), IFNULL(T1.jurisdiction,'.'), IFNULL(T1.daysinabeyance,'.'), IFNULL(T1.leadcase,'.'), IFNULL(T1.leadcaseworktype,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.leadproceduretype,'.'), IFNULL(T1.developmenttype,'.'), IFNULL(T1.caseofficerName,'.'), IFNULL(T1.caseofficerlogin,'.'), IFNULL(T1.leadcaseofficername,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.leadcaseofficelogin,'.'), IFNULL(T1.currentactivetaskgrp,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields, so needs to be done
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND  md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lastmodified,'.'), IFNULL(T1.procedurecode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.decisioncod,'.'), IFNULL(T1.linkedappeal,'.'), IFNULL(T10.LPAID,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.applicationtype,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealtypereason,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealtypereasonid,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealtypegroup,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealtype,'.'), IFNULL(T1.rcrissue1,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.appealrecdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealstartdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealdecideddate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealwithdrawndate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealturnedawaydate,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.appeallapseddate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.redetermined,'.'), IFNULL(T1.jurisdiction,'.'), IFNULL(T1.daysinabeyance,'.'), IFNULL(T1.leadcase,'.'), IFNULL(T1.leadcaseworktype,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.leadproceduretype,'.'), IFNULL(T1.developmenttype,'.'), IFNULL(T1.caseofficerName,'.'), IFNULL(T1.caseofficerlogin,'.'), IFNULL(T1.leadcaseofficername,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.leadcaseofficelogin,'.'), IFNULL(T1.currentactivetaskgrp,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRef
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.vw_all_appeals T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_local_planning_authority_fact T10 ON T1.lpacode = T10.LPACode AND T10.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_all_appeals_dim T3 ON T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lastmodified,'.'), IFNULL(T1.procedurecode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.decisioncod,'.'), IFNULL(T1.linkedappeal,'.'), IFNULL(T10.LPAID,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.applicationtype,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealtypereason,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealtypereasonid,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealtypegroup,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealtype,'.'), IFNULL(T1.rcrissue1,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.appealrecdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealstartdate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealdecideddate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealwithdrawndate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealturnedawaydate,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.appeallapseddate,'.'), IFNULL(T1.redetermined,'.'), IFNULL(T1.jurisdiction,'.'), IFNULL(T1.daysinabeyance,'.'), IFNULL(T1.leadcase,'.'), IFNULL(T1.leadcaseworktype,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.leadproceduretype,'.'), IFNULL(T1.developmenttype,'.'), IFNULL(T1.caseofficerName,'.'), IFNULL(T1.caseofficerlogin,'.'), IFNULL(T1.leadcaseofficername,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.leadcaseofficelogin,'.'), IFNULL(T1.currentactivetaskgrp,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new PositionCode
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    );

# Run tests to check integrity of data by numbers

- **Changes tracking:** where it checks the data against active records in harmonised and compares with records to add and records to be set as inactive.
- **Changes tolerance levels:** if the total amount to be added and deleted surpasses the tolerance limit, it will interrupt the process of loading the data

# Dataset is created that contains changed data and corresponding target data
- This script combines data that has been updated, Deleted or is new, with corresponding target data
- View **casework_all_appeals_new** is unioned to the target data filter to only those rows where changes have been detected
## View casework_all_appeals_dim_changed_rows is created

%%sql
-- Create new and updated dataset

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_all_appeals_dim_changed_rows

    AS

-- gets updated, deleted and new rows 
Select 
    AllAppealsID,
    AppealRefNumber,
    LastModified,
    ProcedureCode,
    DecisionCode,
    LinkedAppeal,
    LPAID,
    ApplicationType,
    AppealTypeReason,
    AppealTypeReasonID,
    AppealTypeGroup,
    AppealType,
    RCRIssue1,
    AppealRecDate,
    AppealStartDate,
    AppealDecidedDate,
    AppealWithdrawnDate,
    AppealTurnedAwayDate,
    AppealLapsedDate,
    Redetermined,
    Jurisdiction,
    DaysInAbeyance,
    LeadCase,
    LeadCaseworkType,
    LeadProcedureType,
    DevelopmentType,
    CaseOfficerName,
    CaseOfficerLogin,
    LeadCaseOfficerName,
    LeadCaseOfficeLogin,
    CurrentActiveTaskGrp,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive

From casework_all_appeals_dim_new WHERE HistoricIsActive = 'Y' or HistoricIsActive IS NULL

    UNION ALL

-- gets original versions of updated rows so we can update EndDate and set IsActive flag to 'N'
SELECT
    AllAppealsID,
    AppealRefNumber,
    LastModified,
    ProcedureCode,
    DecisionCode,
    LinkedAppeal,
    LPAID,
    ApplicationType,
    AppealTypeReason,
    AppealTypeReasonID,
    AppealTypeGroup,
    AppealType,
    RCRIssue1,
    AppealRecDate,
    AppealStartDate,
    AppealDecidedDate,
    AppealWithdrawnDate,
    AppealTurnedAwayDate,
    AppealLapsedDate,
    Redetermined,
    Jurisdiction,
    DaysInAbeyance,
    LeadCase,
    LeadCaseworkType,
    LeadProcedureType,
    DevelopmentType,
    CaseOfficerName,
    CaseOfficerLogin,
    LeadCaseOfficerName,
    LeadCaseOfficeLogin,
    CurrentActiveTaskGrp,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
    
FROM odw_harmonised_db.casework_all_appeals_dim
WHERE AppealRefNumber IN (SELECT AppealRefNumber FROM casework_all_appeals_dim_new WHERE AllAppealsID IS NULL) AND IsActive = 'Y';

# View casework_all_appeals_dim_changed_rows is used in a merge (Upsert) statement into the target table
- **WHEN MATCHED** ON the surrogate Key (i.e. AllAppealsID), EndDate is set to today -1 day and the IsActive flag is set to 'N'
- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the surrogate Key, insert rows
## Table odw_harmonised_db.casework_all_appeals_dim is updated

%%sql
-- merge into dim table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.casework_all_appeals_dim AS Target
USING casework_all_appeals_dim_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.AllAppealsID = Target.AllAppealsID

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.ValidTo = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;

# Fix the IDs
- No auto-increment feature is available in delta tables, therefore we need to create new IDs for the inserted rows
- This is done by select the target data and using INSERT OVERWRITE to re-insert the data is a new Row Number
## Table odw_harmonised_db.casework_all_appeals_dim is updated

%%sql
-- Insert new casework_all_appeals_dim

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.casework_all_appeals_dim

SELECT 
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY AllAppealsID NULLS LAST) AS AllAppealsID,
    AppealRefNumber,
    LastModified,
    ProcedureCode,
    DecisionCode,
    LinkedAppeal,
    LPAID,
    ApplicationType,
    AppealTypeReason,
    AppealTypeReasonID,
    AppealTypeGroup,
    AppealType,
    RCRIssue1,
    AppealRecDate,
    AppealStartDate,
    AppealDecidedDate,
    AppealWithdrawnDate,
    AppealTurnedAwayDate,
    AppealLapsedDate,
    Redetermined,
    Jurisdiction,
    DaysInAbeyance,
    LeadCase,
    LeadCaseworkType,
    LeadProcedureType,
    DevelopmentType,
    CaseOfficerName,
    CaseOfficerLogin,
    LeadCaseOfficerName,
    LeadCaseOfficeLogin,
    CurrentActiveTaskGrp,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.casework_all_appeals_dim;

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (horizon tables) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.casework tables)
- **New Data:** where an main Reference in the source does not exist in the target, then NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Reference Fields in source and in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an Reference info in the target exists but the same identifyers don't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View casework_application_sub_type_case_name_dim is created

%%sql
-- Build casework_application_sub_type_case_name_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_application_sub_type_case_name_dim_new

     AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appeal_reference_number IS NULL
        THEN T3.ApplicationSubTypeCaseNameID
        ELSE NULL
    END as ApplicationSubTypeCaseNameID,
    T1.appeal_reference_number AS AppealRefNumber,
    T1.application_sub_type AS ApplicationSubType,
    T1.case_name AS CaseName,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appeal_reference_number,'.'), IFNULL(T1.application_sub_type,'.'), IFNULL(T1.case_name,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields, so needs to be done
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appeal_reference_number = T3.AppealRefNumber AND  md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appeal_reference_number,'.'), IFNULL(T1.application_sub_type,'.'), IFNULL(T1.case_name,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRef
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appeal_reference_number IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_app_sub_type_case_name T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_application_sub_type_case_name_dim T3 ON T1.appeal_reference_number = T3.AppealRefNumber AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appeal_reference_number = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appeal_reference_number,'.'), IFNULL(T1.application_sub_type,'.'), IFNULL(T1.case_name,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new PositionCode
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appeal_reference_number IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    );

- **Changes tracking:** where it checks the data against active records in harmonised and compares with records to add and records to be set as inactive.
- **Changes tolerance levels:** if the total amount to be added and deleted surpasses the tolerance limit, it will interrupt the process of loading the data

## View casework_case_dates_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build casework_case_dates_dim_new table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_case_dates_dim_new

     AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN T3.CaseDatesID
        ELSE NULL
    END as CaseDatesID,
    T1.appealrefnumber AS AppealRefNumber,
    T1.casereference AS CaseReference,
    T1.validitystatusdate AS ValidityStatusDate,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.casereference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.validitystatusdate,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields, so needs to be done
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND  md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.casereference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.validitystatusdate,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRef
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_case_dates T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_case_dates_dim T3 ON T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.casereference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.validitystatusdate,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new PositionCode
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    );

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (horizon tables) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.casework tables)
- **New Data:** where an main Reference in the source does not exist in the target, then NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Reference Fields in source and in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an Reference info in the target exists but the same identifyers don't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

%%sql
-- Build casework_case_info_dim_new table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_case_info_dim_new

     AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN T3.CaseInfoID
        ELSE NULL
    END as CaseInfoID,
    T1.appealrefnumber AS AppealRefNumber,
    T1.casereference AS CaseReference,
    T1.Validity AS Validity,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.casereference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.validity,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields, so needs to be done
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND  md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.casereference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.validity,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRef
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_case_info T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_case_info_dim T3 ON T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.casereference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.validity,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new PositionCode
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    );

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (horizon tables) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.casework tables)
- **New Data:** where an main Reference in the source does not exist in the target, then NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Reference Fields in source and in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an Reference info in the target exists but the same identifyers don't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View casework_enforcement_grounds_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build casework_enforcement_grounds_dim_new table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_enforcement_grounds_dim_new

     AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN T3.EnforcementGroundsID
        ELSE NULL
    END as EnforcementGroundsID,
    T1.appealrefnumber AS AppealRefNumber,
    T1.lastmodified AS LastModified,
    T1.groundforappeal AS GroundForAppeal,
    T1.groundletter AS GroundLetter,
    T1.groundforappealstartdate AS GroundForAppealStartDate,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lastmodified,'.'), IFNULL(T1.groundforappeal,'.'), IFNULL(T1.groundletter,'.')
        , IFNULL(T1.groundforappealstartdate,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields, so needs to be done
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND  md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lastmodified,'.'), 
            IFNULL(T1.groundforappeal,'.'), IFNULL(T1.groundletter,'.'), IFNULL(T1.groundforappealstartdate,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRef
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_enforcement_grounds_for_appeal T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_enforcement_grounds_dim T3 ON T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lastmodified,'.'), 
                IFNULL(T1.groundforappeal,'.'), IFNULL(T1.groundletter,'.'), IFNULL(T1.groundforappealstartdate,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new PositionCode
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    );

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_enforcement_grounds_for_appeal;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM casework_enforcement_grounds_dim_new;
SELECT * FROM casework_enforcement_grounds_dim_new;

%%sql
-- Build casework_event_dim_new table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_event_dim_new

     AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN T3.EventID
        ELSE NULL
    END as EventID,
    T1.appealrefnumber AS AppealRefNumber,
    T1.casereference AS CaseReference,
    T1.chartstatus AS ChartStatus,
    T1.parentkeyid AS ParentKeyID,
    T1.startdateofevent AS StartDateOfEvent,
    T1.starttimeofevent AS StartTimeOfEvent,
    T1.enddateofevent AS EndDateOfEvent,
    T1.actualduration AS ActualDuration,
    T1.estpreptime AS EstPrepTime,
    T1.estsittime AS EstSitTime,
    T1.estreptime AS EstRepTime,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.casereference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.chartstatus,'.'), IFNULL(T1.parentkeyid,'.'), IFNULL(T1.startdateofevent,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.starttimeofevent,'.'),IFNULL(T1.enddateofevent,'.'), IFNULL(T1.actualduration,'.'), IFNULL(T1.estpreptime,'.'), IFNULL(T1.estsittime,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.estreptime,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields, so needs to be done
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND  md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.casereference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.chartstatus,'.'), IFNULL(T1.parentkeyid,'.'), IFNULL(T1.startdateofevent,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.starttimeofevent,'.'),IFNULL(T1.enddateofevent,'.'), IFNULL(T1.actualduration,'.'), IFNULL(T1.estpreptime,'.'), IFNULL(T1.estsittime,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.estreptime,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRef
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_event T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_event_dim T3 ON T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.casereference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.chartstatus,'.'), IFNULL(T1.parentkeyid,'.'), IFNULL(T1.startdateofevent,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.starttimeofevent,'.'),IFNULL(T1.enddateofevent,'.'), IFNULL(T1.actualduration,'.'), IFNULL(T1.estpreptime,'.'), IFNULL(T1.estsittime,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.estreptime,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new PositionCode
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )

- **Deleted data:** where an Reference info in the target exists but the same identifyers don't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View casework_event_fact_new is created

%%sql
-- Build casework_event_fact_new table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_event_fact_new

     AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT DISTINCT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN T3.EventID
        ELSE NULL
    END AS EventID,
    T4.EventID AS EventDimensionID,
    T1.eventtype AS EventType,
    to_timestamp(T1.dateeventrequested) AS DateEventRequested,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T4.EventID,'.'), IFNULL(T1.eventtype,'.'), IFNULL(T1.dateeventrequested,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields, so needs to be done
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T4.AppealRefNumber AND  md5(concat(IFNULL(T4.EventID,'.'), IFNULL(T1.eventtype,'.'), 
        IFNULL(T1.dateeventrequested,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T4.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRef
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_event T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_event_dim T4 ON T1.appealrefnumber = T4.AppealRefNumber AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_event_fact T3 ON T3.EventDimensionID = T4.EventID AND T1.appealrefnumber = T4.AppealRefNumber AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T4.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T4.EventID,'.'), IFNULL(T1.eventtype,'.'), 
                IFNULL(T1.dateeventrequested,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                -- WHEN T4.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new PositionCode
                WHEN T4.EventID IS NULL -- new PositionCode

                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T3.EventDimensionID IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    )
;

    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_event;
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM casework_event_fact_new;
    SELECT * FROM casework_event_fact_new WHERE DateEventRequested IS NOT NULL;

# Dataset is created that contains changed data and corresponding target data
- This script combines data that has been updated, Deleted or is new, with corresponding target data
- View **casework_all_appeals_new** is unioned to the target data filter to only those rows where changes have been detected
## View casework_event_fact_changed_rows is created

%%sql
-- Create new and updated dataset

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_event_fact_changed_rows

    AS

-- gets updated, deleted and new rows 
Select 
    EventID,
    EventDimensionID,
    EventType,
    DateEventRequested,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive

From casework_event_fact_new WHERE HistoricIsActive = 'Y' or HistoricIsActive IS NULL

    UNION ALL

-- gets original versions of updated rows so we can update EndDate and set IsActive flag to 'N'
SELECT
    EventID,
    EventDimensionID,
    EventType,
    DateEventRequested,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
    
FROM odw_harmonised_db.casework_event_fact
WHERE EventDimensionID IN (SELECT EventDimensionID FROM casework_event_fact_new WHERE EventID IS NULL) AND IsActive = 'Y';

# View casework_event_fact_changed_rows is used in a merge (Upsert) statement into the target table
- **WHEN MATCHED** ON the surrogate Key (i.e. AllAppealsID), EndDate is set to today -1 day and the IsActive flag is set to 'N'
- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the surrogate Key, insert rows
## Table odw_harmonised_db.casework_event_fact is updated

%%sql
-- merge into dim table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.casework_event_fact AS Target
USING casework_event_fact_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.EventID = Target.EventID

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.ValidTo = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;

# Fix the IDs
- No auto-increment feature is available in delta tables, therefore we need to create new IDs for the inserted rows
- This is done by select the target data and using INSERT OVERWRITE to re-insert the data is a new Row Number
## Table odw_harmonised_db.casework_event_fact is updated

%%sql
-- Insert new casework_event_fact

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.casework_event_fact

SELECT 
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY EventDimensionID NULLS LAST) AS EventID,
    EventDimensionID,
    EventType,
    DateEventRequested,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.casework_event_fact;

- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Reference Fields in source and in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an Reference info in the target exists but the same identifyers don't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View casework_hedgerow_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build casework_hedgerow_dim_new table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_hedgerow_dim_new

     AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT DISTINCT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.full_ref IS NULL
        THEN T3.HedgerowID
        ELSE NULL
    END AS HedgerowID,
    T1.ref_year AS RefYear,
    T1.identifier AS Identifier,
    T1.full_ref AS FullRef,
    T1.horizn_ref AS HorizonRef,
    T1.processing_state AS ProcessingState,
    T10.LPAID AS LPAID,
    T1.receipt_date AS ReceiptDate,
    T1.name_of_appellant AS NameOfAppellant,
    T1.agent AS Agent,
    T1.site_address AS SiteAddress,

    T1.appeal_type AS AppealType,
    T1.withdrawn_or_rejected AS WithdrawnOrRejected,
    T1.date_wd_or_r AS DateWithdrawnOrRejected,
    T1.acknow_date AS AcknowDate,
    T1.valid_date AS ValidDate,
    T1.start_date AS StartDate,
    T1.2_week_date AS TwoWeekDate,
    T1.6_week_date AS SixWeekDate,
    T1.9_week_date AS NineWeekDate,
    T1.questionnaire_received AS QuestionnaireReceived,
    T1.inspector AS Inspector,
    T1.procedure AS Procedure,
    T1.event_date AS EventDate,
    T1.date_sent_to_inspector AS DateSentToInspector,
    T1.date_rec_from_insp AS DateRecFromInspector,
    T1.decision AS Decision,
    T1.reader_sent_to AS ReaderOrSentTo,
    T1.date_decision_issued AS DateDecisionIssued,
    T1.target_date AS TargetDate,
    T1.notes AS Notes,
    T1.put_away AS PutAway,
    T1.pa_barcode AS PABarcode,
    T1.ready_for_event AS ReadyForEvent,
    T1.receipt_to_start_average AS ReceiptToStartAverage,
    T1.start_to_event_average AS StartToEventAverage,
    T1.event_to_decision_average AS EventToDecisionAverage,
    T1.receipt_to_decision_average AS ReceiptToDecisionAverage,
    T1.handle_time_in_weeks AS HandleTimeInWeeks,
    T1.decision_month AS DecisionMonth,
    T1.open_or_closed AS OpenOrClosed,
    T1.old_case_off_not_to_be_used AS OldCaseOffNotToBeUsed,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.ref_year,'.'), IFNULL(T1.identifier,'.'), IFNULL(T1.full_ref,'.'), IFNULL(T1.horizn_ref,'.'), IFNULL(T1.processing_state,'.'), IFNULL(T10.LPAID,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.receipt_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.name_of_appellant,'.'), IFNULL(T1.agent,'.'), IFNULL(T1.site_address,'.'), IFNULL(T1.postcode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.corr,'.'), IFNULL(T1.case_officer,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.appeal_type,'.'), IFNULL(T1.withdrawn_or_rejected,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_wd_or_r,'.'), IFNULL(T1.acknow_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.valid_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.start_date,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.2_week_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.6_week_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.9_week_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.questionnaire_received,'.'), IFNULL(T1.inspector,'.'), IFNULL(T1.procedure,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.event_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_sent_to_inspector,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_rec_from_insp,'.'), IFNULL(T1.decision,'.'), IFNULL(T1.reader_sent_to,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_decision_issued,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.target_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.notes,'.'), IFNULL(T1.put_away,'.'), IFNULL(T1.pa_barcode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.ready_for_event,'.'), IFNULL(T1.receipt_to_start_average,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.start_to_event_average,'.'), IFNULL(T1.event_to_decision_average,'.'), IFNULL(T1.receipt_to_decision_average,'.'), IFNULL(T1.handle_time_in_weeks,'.'), IFNULL(T1.decision_month,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.open_or_closed,'.'), IFNULL(T1.old_case_off_not_to_be_used,'.'))) AS RowID,  -- this hash should contain all the defining fields, so needs to be done
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.full_ref = T3.FullRef AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.ref_year,'.'), IFNULL(T1.identifier,'.'), IFNULL(T1.full_ref,'.'), IFNULL(T1.horizn_ref,'.'), IFNULL(T1.processing_state,'.'), IFNULL(T10.LPAID,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.receipt_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.name_of_appellant,'.'), IFNULL(T1.agent,'.'), IFNULL(T1.site_address,'.'), IFNULL(T1.postcode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.corr,'.'), IFNULL(T1.case_officer,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.appeal_type,'.'), IFNULL(T1.withdrawn_or_rejected,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_wd_or_r,'.'), IFNULL(T1.acknow_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.valid_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.start_date,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.2_week_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.6_week_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.9_week_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.questionnaire_received,'.'), IFNULL(T1.inspector,'.'), IFNULL(T1.procedure,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.event_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_sent_to_inspector,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_rec_from_insp,'.'), IFNULL(T1.decision,'.'), IFNULL(T1.reader_sent_to,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_decision_issued,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.target_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.notes,'.'), IFNULL(T1.put_away,'.'), IFNULL(T1.pa_barcode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.ready_for_event,'.'), IFNULL(T1.receipt_to_start_average,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.start_to_event_average,'.'), IFNULL(T1.event_to_decision_average,'.'), IFNULL(T1.receipt_to_decision_average,'.'), IFNULL(T1.handle_time_in_weeks,'.'), IFNULL(T1.decision_month,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.open_or_closed,'.'), IFNULL(T1.old_case_off_not_to_be_used,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.FullRef IS NULL -- new AppealRef
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.full_ref IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.vw_hedgerow T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_local_planning_authority_fact T10 ON t10.LPAName = t1.lpa AND T10.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_hedgerow_dim T3 ON T1.full_ref = T3.FullRef AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.full_ref = T3.FullRef AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.ref_year,'.'), IFNULL(T1.identifier,'.'), IFNULL(T1.full_ref,'.'), IFNULL(T1.horizn_ref,'.'), IFNULL(T1.processing_state,'.'), IFNULL(T10.LPAID,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.receipt_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.name_of_appellant,'.'), IFNULL(T1.agent,'.'), IFNULL(T1.site_address,'.'), IFNULL(T1.postcode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.corr,'.'), IFNULL(T1.case_officer,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.appeal_type,'.'), IFNULL(T1.withdrawn_or_rejected,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_wd_or_r,'.'), IFNULL(T1.acknow_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.valid_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.start_date,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.2_week_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.6_week_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.9_week_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.questionnaire_received,'.'), IFNULL(T1.inspector,'.'), IFNULL(T1.procedure,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.event_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_sent_to_inspector,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_rec_from_insp,'.'), IFNULL(T1.decision,'.'), IFNULL(T1.reader_sent_to,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_decision_issued,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.target_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.notes,'.'), IFNULL(T1.put_away,'.'), IFNULL(T1.pa_barcode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.ready_for_event,'.'), IFNULL(T1.receipt_to_start_average,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.start_to_event_average,'.'), IFNULL(T1.event_to_decision_average,'.'), IFNULL(T1.receipt_to_decision_average,'.'), IFNULL(T1.handle_time_in_weeks,'.'), IFNULL(T1.decision_month,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.open_or_closed,'.'), IFNULL(T1.old_case_off_not_to_be_used,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.FullRef IS NULL -- new PositionCode
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.full_ref IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    );
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM odw_harmonised_db.casework_hedgerow_dim;
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM odw_standardised_db.vw_hedgerow;
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM casework_hedgerow_dim_new;
    SELECT * FROM casework_hedgerow_dim_new;

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (horizon tables) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.casework tables)
- **New Data:** where an main Reference in the source does not exist in the target, then NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Reference Fields in source and in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an Reference info in the target exists but the same identifyers don't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View casework_high_hedges_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build casework_high_hedges_dim_new table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_high_hedges_dim_new

     AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.full_ref IS NULL
        THEN T3.HighHedgesID
        ELSE NULL
    END as HighHedgesID,
    T1.ref AS Ref,
    T1.full_ref AS FullRef,
    T1.linked_with AS LinkedWith,
    T1.horizon_ref AS HorizonRef,
    T1.processing_state AS ProcessingState,
    T1.rejected_withdrawn AS RejectedOrWithdrawn,
    T1.date_withdrawn_rejected AS DateWithdrawnOrRejected,
    T1.case_officer AS CaseOfficer,
    T1.date_received AS DateReceived,
    T10.LPAID AS LPAID,
    T1.appellant AS Appellant,
    T1.agent AS Agent,
    T1.status AS Status,
    T1.1st_line_of_address AS FirstLineOfAddress,
    T1.site_post_code AS SitePostCode,
    T1.other_party AS OtherParty,
    T1.lpa_decision AS LPADecision,
    T1.valid_date AS ValidDate,
    T1.start_date AS StartDate,
    T1.docs_copied AS DocsCopied,
    T1.q_due AS QDue,
    T1.qu_rec AS QuRec,
    T1.notification_of_site_visit AS NotificationOfSiteVisit,
    T1.date_of_sv AS DateOfSV,
    T1.time_of_sv AS TimeOfSV,
    T1.inspector AS Inspector,
    T1.date_sent_to_inspector AS DateSentToInspector,
    T1.date_returned_from_inspector AS DateReturnedFromInspector,
    T1.reader AS Reader,
    T1.pins_decision AS PINSDecision,
    T1.date_of_decision AS DateOfDecision,
    T1.comments AS Comments,
    T1.pa_date AS PADate,
    T1.pa_barcode AS PABarcode,
    T1.target_80_within_24_weeks_from_receipt_to_decision_target_relates_to_cases_received_on_or_after_1_april_2011 AS Target,
    T1.hande_time_in_weeks AS HandeTimeInWeeks,
    T1.decision_month AS DecisionMonth,
    T1.receipt_to_start AS ReceiptToStart,
    T1.start_to_event AS StartToEvent,
    T1.event_to_decision AS EventToDecision,
    T1.receipt_to_decision AS ReceiptToDecision,
    T1.open_or_closed AS OpenOrClosed,
    T1.ready_for_event AS ReadyForEvent,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.full_ref,'.'), IFNULL(T1.linked_with,'.'), IFNULL(T1.horizon_ref ,'.'), IFNULL(T1.processing_state,'.'), IFNULL(T1.rejected_withdrawn,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.date_withdrawn_rejected,'.'), IFNULL(T1.case_officer,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_received,'.'), IFNULL(T10.LPAID,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellant,'.'), IFNULL(T1.agent,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.status,'.'), IFNULL(T1.1st_line_of_address,'.'), IFNULL(T1.site_post_code,'.'), IFNULL(T1.other_party,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpa_decision,'.'), IFNULL(T1.valid_date,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.start_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.docs_copied,'.'), IFNULL(T1.q_due,'.'), IFNULL(T1.qu_rec,'.'), IFNULL(T1.notification_of_site_visit,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_of_sv,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.time_of_sv,'.'), IFNULL(T1.inspector,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_sent_to_inspector,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_returned_from_inspector,'.'), IFNULL(T1.reader,'.'), IFNULL(T1.pins_decision,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.date_of_decision,'.'), IFNULL(T1.comments,'.'), IFNULL(T1.pa_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.pa_barcode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.target_80_within_24_weeks_from_receipt_to_decision_target_relates_to_cases_received_on_or_after_1_april_2011,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.hande_time_in_weeks,'.'), IFNULL(T1.decision_month,'.'), IFNULL(T1.receipt_to_start,'.'), IFNULL(T1.start_to_event,'.'), IFNULL(T1.event_to_decision,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.receipt_to_decision,'.'), IFNULL(T1.open_or_closed,'.'), IFNULL(T1.ready_for_event,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields, so needs to be done
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.full_ref = T3.FullRef AND  md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.full_ref,'.'), IFNULL(T1.linked_with,'.'), IFNULL(T1.horizon_ref ,'.'), IFNULL(T1.processing_state,'.'), IFNULL(T1.rejected_withdrawn,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.date_withdrawn_rejected,'.'), IFNULL(T1.case_officer,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_received,'.'), IFNULL(T10.LPAID,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellant,'.'), IFNULL(T1.agent,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.status,'.'), IFNULL(T1.1st_line_of_address,'.'), IFNULL(T1.site_post_code,'.'), IFNULL(T1.other_party,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpa_decision,'.'), IFNULL(T1.valid_date,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.start_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.docs_copied,'.'), IFNULL(T1.q_due,'.'), IFNULL(T1.qu_rec,'.'), IFNULL(T1.notification_of_site_visit,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_of_sv,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.time_of_sv,'.'), IFNULL(T1.inspector,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_sent_to_inspector,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_returned_from_inspector,'.'), IFNULL(T1.reader,'.'), IFNULL(T1.pins_decision,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.date_of_decision,'.'), IFNULL(T1.comments,'.'), IFNULL(T1.pa_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.pa_barcode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.target_80_within_24_weeks_from_receipt_to_decision_target_relates_to_cases_received_on_or_after_1_april_2011,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.hande_time_in_weeks,'.'), IFNULL(T1.decision_month,'.'), IFNULL(T1.receipt_to_start,'.'), IFNULL(T1.start_to_event,'.'), IFNULL(T1.event_to_decision,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.receipt_to_decision,'.'), IFNULL(T1.open_or_closed,'.'), IFNULL(T1.ready_for_event,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.FullRef IS NULL -- new AppealRef
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.full_ref IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.vw_high_hedge T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_local_planning_authority_fact T10 ON t10.LPAName = t1.lpa AND T10.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_high_hedges_dim T3 ON T1.full_ref = T3.FullRef AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.full_ref = T3.FullRef AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.full_ref,'.'), IFNULL(T1.linked_with,'.'), IFNULL(T1.horizon_ref ,'.'), IFNULL(T1.processing_state,'.'), IFNULL(T1.rejected_withdrawn,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.date_withdrawn_rejected,'.'), IFNULL(T1.case_officer,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_received,'.'), IFNULL(T10.LPAID,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appellant,'.'), IFNULL(T1.agent,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.status,'.'), IFNULL(T1.1st_line_of_address,'.'), IFNULL(T1.site_post_code,'.'), IFNULL(T1.other_party,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpa_decision,'.'), IFNULL(T1.valid_date,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.start_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.docs_copied,'.'), IFNULL(T1.q_due,'.'), IFNULL(T1.qu_rec,'.'), IFNULL(T1.notification_of_site_visit,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_of_sv,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.time_of_sv,'.'), IFNULL(T1.inspector,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_sent_to_inspector,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_returned_from_inspector,'.'), IFNULL(T1.reader,'.'), IFNULL(T1.pins_decision,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.date_of_decision,'.'), IFNULL(T1.comments,'.'), IFNULL(T1.pa_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.pa_barcode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.target_80_within_24_weeks_from_receipt_to_decision_target_relates_to_cases_received_on_or_after_1_april_2011,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.hande_time_in_weeks,'.'), IFNULL(T1.decision_month,'.'), IFNULL(T1.receipt_to_start,'.'), IFNULL(T1.start_to_event,'.'), IFNULL(T1.event_to_decision,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.receipt_to_decision,'.'), IFNULL(T1.open_or_closed,'.'), IFNULL(T1.ready_for_event,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.FullRef IS NULL -- new full_ref
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.full_ref IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    );

- **New Data:** where an main Reference in the source does not exist in the target, then NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Reference Fields in source and in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an Reference info in the target exists but the same identifyers don't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View casework_inspector_cases_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build casework_inspector_cases_dim_new table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_inspector_cases_dim_new

     AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN T3.InspectorCasesID
        ELSE NULL
    END as InspectorCasesID,
    T1.appealrefnumber AS AppealRefNumber,
    T1.casereference AS CaseReference,
    T1.typeofinvolvement AS TypeOfInvolvement,
    T1.inspectorname AS InspectorName,
    T1.contactID AS ContactID,
    T1.parentkeyid AS ParentKeyID,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.casereference,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields, so needs to be done
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND  md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.casereference,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRef
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_inspector_cases T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_inspector_cases_dim T3 ON T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.casereference,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new PositionCode
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    );

- **Changes tolerance levels:** if the total amount to be added and deleted surpasses the tolerance limit, it will interrupt the process of loading the data

# Dataset is created that contains changed data and corresponding target data
- This script combines data that has been updated, Deleted or is new, with corresponding target data
- View **casework_all_appeals_new** is unioned to the target data filter to only those rows where changes have been detected
## View casework_inspector_cases_dim_changed_rows is created

%%sql
-- Create new and updated dataset

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_inspector_cases_dim_changed_rows

    AS

-- gets updated, deleted and new rows 
Select 
    InspectorCasesID,
    AppealRefNumber,
    CaseReference,
    TypeOfInvolvement,
    InspectorName,
    ContactID,
    ParentKeyID,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive

From casework_inspector_cases_dim_new WHERE HistoricIsActive = 'Y' or HistoricIsActive IS NULL

    UNION ALL

-- gets original versions of updated rows so we can update EndDate and set IsActive flag to 'N'
SELECT
    InspectorCasesID,
    AppealRefNumber,
    CaseReference,
    TypeOfInvolvement,
    InspectorName,
    ContactID,
    ParentKeyID,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
    
FROM odw_harmonised_db.casework_inspector_cases_dim
WHERE AppealRefNumber IN (SELECT AppealRefNumber FROM casework_inspector_cases_dim_new WHERE AllAppealsID IS NULL) AND IsActive = 'Y';

# View casework_inspector_cases_dim_changed_rows is used in a merge (Upsert) statement into the target table
- **WHEN MATCHED** ON the surrogate Key (i.e. AllAppealsID), EndDate is set to today -1 day and the IsActive flag is set to 'N'
- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the surrogate Key, insert rows
## Table odw_harmonised_db.casework_inspector_cases_dim is updated

%%sql
-- merge into dim table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.casework_inspector_cases_dim AS Target
USING casework_inspector_cases_dim_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.InspectorCasesID = Target.InspectorCasesID

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.ValidTo = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;

# Fix the IDs
- No auto-increment feature is available in delta tables, therefore we need to create new IDs for the inserted rows
- This is done by select the target data and using INSERT OVERWRITE to re-insert the data is a new Row Number
## Table odw_harmonised_db.casework_inspector_cases_dim is updated

%%sql
-- Insert new casework_inspector_cases_dim

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.casework_inspector_cases_dim

SELECT 
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY AllAppealsID NULLS LAST) AS InspectorCasesID,
    AppealRefNumber,
    CaseReference,
    TypeOfInvolvement,
    InspectorName,
    ContactID,
    ParentKeyID,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.casework_inspector_cases_dim;

- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Reference Fields in source and in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an Reference info in the target exists but the same identifyers don't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

    IFNULL(T1.associated_file_4,'.'), IFNULL(T1.associated_file_5,'.'), IFNULL(T1.associated_file_6,'.'), IFNULL(T1.associated_file_7,'.'), IFNULL(T1.associated_file_8,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.associated_file_9,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_costs_report_despatched,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date_costs_order_originated,'.'), IFNULL(T1.notes,'.'), IFNULL(T1.oma_stance,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.recharged_to_defra,'.'), IFNULL(T1.name_of_applicant,'.'), IFNULL(T1.decision_clear_for_despatch,'.'), IFNULL(T1.pdac_etl_date,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.FPSNumber IS NULL -- new PositionCode
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.fps_number IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    );

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (sap hr) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.casework_local_planning_authority_dim)
- **New Data:** where a Pers_No in the source does not exist as an EmployeeNumber in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Pers_No in source and EmployeeNumber in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an EmployeeNumber in the target exists but the same Pers_No doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View casework_local_planning_authority_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build casework_local_planning_authority_dim table -- merge

-- Notes - Addresses are only supplied for Inspectors - need to check inspector count against addresses data

-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_local_planning_authority_dim_new 

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.lpa_code IS NULL
        THEN T3.LocalPlanningAuthorityID
        ELSE NULL
    END as LocalPlanningAuthorityID, -- surrogate key
    T4.LPAID AS LPAID,
    T1.lpa_code AS LPACode,
    T1.lpa_name AS LPAName,
    T1.lpa_county LPACounty,
    T1.lpa_country LPACountry,
    T1.lpa_governmental_office AS LPAGovernmentalOffice,
    T1.lpa_latitude AS LPALatitude,
    T1.lpa_longitude AS LPALongitude,
    T1.type_short AS TypeShort,
    T1.type_long AS TypeLong,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP as IngestionDate,
    NULL as ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T4.LPAID,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpa_code, '.'), IFNULL(T1.lpa_name, '.'),IFNULL(T1.lpa_county, '.'), IFNULL(T1.lpa_country,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.lpa_governmental_office,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpa_latitude,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpa_longitude,'.'), IFNULL(T1.type_short,'.'), IFNULL(T1.type_long,'.'))) as RowID, 
    'Y' as IsActive, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_local_planning_authority T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description and T2.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_local_planning_authority_fact T4 ON T1.lpa_code = T4.LPACode AND T4.IsActive = 'Y' 
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_local_planning_authority_dim T3 ON T1.lpa_code = T3.LPACode AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.lpa_code = T3.LPACode AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T4.LPAID,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpa_code, '.'), IFNULL(T1.lpa_name, '.'),IFNULL(T1.lpa_county, '.'), IFNULL(T1.lpa_country,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T1.lpa_governmental_office,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpa_latitude,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpa_longitude,'.'), IFNULL(T1.type_short,'.'), IFNULL(T1.type_long,'.')))  <> T3.RowID     
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T3.LocalPlanningAuthorityID IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.lpa_code IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )
;

- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (sap hr) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.casework_local_planning_authority_fact)
- **New Data:** where a Pers_No in the source does not exist as an EmployeeNumber in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
