## View casework_local_planning_authority_fact_new is created

%%sql
-- Build casework_local_planning_authority_fact table -- merge

-- Notes - Addresses are only supplied for Inspectors - need to check inspector count against addresses data

-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_local_planning_authority_fact_new 

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT DISTINCT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.lpa_code IS NULL
        THEN T3.LPAID
        ELSE NULL
    END as LPAID, -- surrogate key
    T1.lpa_code AS LPACode,
    T1.lpa_name AS LPAName,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP as IngestionDate,
    NULL as ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.lpa_code,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpa_name, '.'))) as RowID, 
    'Y' as IsActive, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_local_planning_authority T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description and T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_local_planning_authority_fact T3 ON T1.lpa_code = T3.LPACode AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.lpa_code = T3.LPACode AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.lpa_code,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpa_name, '.')))  <> T3.RowID     
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T3.LPAID IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.lpa_code IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )
;

    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.casework_local_planning_authority_fact
WHERE LPACode IN (SELECT LPACode FROM casework_local_planning_authority_fact_new WHERE LPAID IS NULL) AND IsActive = 'Y';

# View casework_local_planning_authority_fact_changed_rows is used in a merge (Upsert) statement into the target table
- **WHEN MATCHED** ON the Business Key (i.e. Pers_No from SAP HR), EndDate is set to today -1 day and the IsActive flag is set to 'N'
- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the business key, insert rows
## Table odw_harmonised.casework_local_planning_authority_fact is updated

%%sql
-- merge into fact table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.casework_local_planning_authority_fact AS Target
USING casework_local_planning_authority_fact_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.LPAID = Target.LPAID

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.ValidTo = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;

# Fix the IDs
- No auto-increment feature is available in delta tables, therefore we need to create new IDs for the inserted rows
- This is done by select the target data and using INSERT OVERWRITE to re-insert the data is a new Row Number
## Table odw_harmonised.casework_local_planning_authority_fact is updated

%%sql
-- Insert new casework_local_planning_authority_fact

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.casework_local_planning_authority_fact

SELECT 
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY LPACode NULLS LAST) AS LPAID,
    LPACode,
    LPAName,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.casework_local_planning_authority_fact;

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (horizon tables) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.casework tables)
- **New Data:** where an main Reference in the source does not exist in the target, then NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Reference Fields in source and in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an Reference info in the target exists but the same identifyers don't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

%%sql
-- Build casework_local_plans_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_local_plans_dim_new

     AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.hz_ref IS NULL
        THEN T3.LocalPlansID
        ELSE NULL
    END as LocalPlansID,
    T1.hz_ref AS HZRef,
    T1.ldf_no AS LDFNo,
    T1.region AS Region,
    T10.LPAID AS LPAID,
    T1.title AS Title,
    T1.dpd_type AS DPDType,
    T1.grade AS Grade,
    T1.actual_publication_date_reg_19 AS ActualPublicationDateReg19,
    T1.actual_publication_notes AS ActualPublicationNotes,
    T1.actual_submission_date_reg_22 AS ActualSubmissionDateReg22,
    T1.actual_submission_notes AS ActualSubmissionNotes,
    T1.five_year_supply_of_land AS FiveYearSupplyOfLand,
    T1.inspector_s AS InspectorS,
    T1.mentor_named_contact AS MentorOrNamedContact,
    T1.programme_officer AS ProgrammeOfficer,
    T1.date_of_appointment AS DateOfAppointment,
    T1.date_of_appointment_notes AS DateOfAppointmentNotes,
    T1.actual_hearing_start_date AS ActualHearingStartDate,
    T1.actual_hearing_start_notes AS ActualHearingStartNotes,
    T1.hearings_close_date AS HearingsCloseDate,
    T1.hearings_close_notes AS HearingsCloseNotes,
    T1.prep_days AS PrepDays,
    T1.hearing_days AS HearingDays,
    T1.sv_days AS SVDays,
    T1.travel_days AS TravelDays,
    T1.reptg_days AS ReptgDays,
    T1.total_days AS TotalDays,
    T1.days_ldf_ref AS DaysLDFRef,
    T1.date_given_to_lpa_for_receipt_of_fact_check AS DateGivenToLPAForReceiptOfFactCheck,
    T1.date_given_to_lpa_for_receipt_of_fact_check_notes AS DateGivenToLPAForReceiptOfFactCheckNotes,
    T1.draft_report_sent_to_qa_group_date AS DraftReportSentToQAGroupDate,
    T1.draft_report_sent_to_qa_group_notes AS DraftReportSentToQAGroupNotes,
    T1.qa_panel AS QAPanel,
    T1.fact_check_report_received_from_insp_date AS FactCheckReportReceivedFromINSPDate,
    T1.fact_check_report_received_from_insp_notes AS FactCheckReportReceivedFromINSPNotes,
    T1.fact_check_report_dispatch_date AS FactCheckReportDispatchDate,
    T1.fact_check_report_dispatch_notes AS FactCheckReportDispatchNotes,
    T1.final_report_issued_date AS FinalReportIssuedDate,
    T1.final_report_issued_notes AS FinalReportIssuedNotes,
    T1.adoption_date AS AdoptionDate,
    T1.adoption_notes AS AdoptionNotes,
    T1.withdrawn_date AS WithdrawnDate,
    T1.withdrawn_notes AS WithdrawnNotes,
    T1.status AS Status,
    T1.total_weeks AS TotalWeeks,
    T1.hearing_close_to_final_report AS HearingClosetoFinalReport,
    T1.notes AS Notes,
    T1.submission_date AS SubmissionDate,
    T1.reports_issued AS ReportsIssued,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.hz_ref,'.'), IFNULL(T1.ldf_no,'.'), IFNULL(T1.region,'.'),IFNULL(T1.lpa,'.'),IFNULL(T1.title,'.'),IFNULL(T1.dpd_type,'.'),IFNULL(T1.grade,'.'),IFNULL(T1.actual_publication_date_reg_19,'.'),IFNULL(T1.actual_publication_notes,'.'),IFNULL(T1.actual_submission_date_reg_22,'.'),IFNULL(T1.actual_submission_notes,'.'),IFNULL(T1.five_year_supply_of_land,'.'),IFNULL(T1.inspector_s,'.'),IFNULL(T1.mentor_named_contact,'.'),IFNULL(T1.programme_officer,'.'),IFNULL(T1.date_of_appointment,'.'),IFNULL(T1.date_of_appointment_notes,'.'),IFNULL(T1.actual_hearing_start_date,'.'),IFNULL(T1.actual_hearing_start_notes,'.'),IFNULL(T1.hearings_close_date,'.'),IFNULL(T1.hearings_close_notes,'.'),IFNULL(T1.prep_days,'.'),IFNULL(T1.hearing_days,'.'),IFNULL(T1.sv_days,'.'),IFNULL(T1.travel_days,'.'),IFNULL(T1.reptg_days,'.'),IFNULL(T1.total_days,'.'),IFNULL(T1.days_ldf_ref,'.'),IFNULL(T1.date_given_to_lpa_for_receipt_of_fact_check,'.'),IFNULL(T1.status,'.'),IFNULL(T1.total_weeks,'.'),IFNULL(T1.hearing_close_to_final_report,'.'),IFNULL(T1.notes,'.'),IFNULL(T1.lpa_lookup,'.'),IFNULL(T1.submission_date,'.'),IFNULL(T1.reports_issued,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields, so needs to be done
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.hz_ref = T3.HZRef AND  md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.hz_ref,'.'), IFNULL(T1.ldf_no,'.'), IFNULL(T1.region,'.'),IFNULL(T1.lpa,'.'),IFNULL(T1.title,'.'),IFNULL(T1.dpd_type,'.'),IFNULL(T1.grade,'.'),IFNULL(T1.actual_publication_date_reg_19,'.'),IFNULL(T1.actual_publication_notes,'.'),IFNULL(T1.actual_submission_date_reg_22,'.'),IFNULL(T1.actual_submission_notes,'.'),IFNULL(T1.five_year_supply_of_land,'.'),IFNULL(T1.inspector_s,'.'),IFNULL(T1.mentor_named_contact,'.'),IFNULL(T1.programme_officer,'.'),IFNULL(T1.date_of_appointment,'.'),IFNULL(T1.date_of_appointment_notes,'.'),IFNULL(T1.actual_hearing_start_date,'.'),IFNULL(T1.actual_hearing_start_notes,'.'),IFNULL(T1.hearings_close_date,'.'),IFNULL(T1.hearings_close_notes,'.'),IFNULL(T1.prep_days,'.'),IFNULL(T1.hearing_days,'.'),IFNULL(T1.sv_days,'.'),IFNULL(T1.travel_days,'.'),IFNULL(T1.reptg_days,'.'),IFNULL(T1.total_days,'.'),IFNULL(T1.days_ldf_ref,'.'),IFNULL(T1.date_given_to_lpa_for_receipt_of_fact_check,'.'),IFNULL(T1.status,'.'),IFNULL(T1.total_weeks,'.'),IFNULL(T1.hearing_close_to_final_report,'.'),IFNULL(T1.notes,'.'),IFNULL(T1.lpa_lookup,'.'),IFNULL(T1.submission_date,'.'),IFNULL(T1.reports_issued,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.HZRef IS NULL -- new AppealRef
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.hz_ref IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM casework_local_plans_grouped T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_local_planning_authority_fact T10 ON LOWER(ltrim(left(t10.LPAName, 4))) = LOWER(ltrim(left(t1.lpa, 4))) AND T10.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_local_plans_dim T3 ON T1.hz_ref = T3.HZRef AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'

WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.hz_ref = T3.HZRef AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.hz_ref,'.'), IFNULL(T1.ldf_no,'.'), IFNULL(T1.region,'.'),IFNULL(T1.lpa,'.'),IFNULL(T1.title,'.'),IFNULL(T1.dpd_type,'.'),IFNULL(T1.grade,'.'),IFNULL(T1.actual_publication_date_reg_19,'.'),IFNULL(T1.actual_publication_notes,'.'),IFNULL(T1.actual_submission_date_reg_22,'.'),IFNULL(T1.actual_submission_notes,'.'),IFNULL(T1.five_year_supply_of_land,'.'),IFNULL(T1.inspector_s,'.'),IFNULL(T1.mentor_named_contact,'.'),IFNULL(T1.programme_officer,'.'),IFNULL(T1.date_of_appointment,'.'),IFNULL(T1.date_of_appointment_notes,'.'),IFNULL(T1.actual_hearing_start_date,'.'),IFNULL(T1.actual_hearing_start_notes,'.'),IFNULL(T1.hearings_close_date,'.'),IFNULL(T1.hearings_close_notes,'.'),IFNULL(T1.prep_days,'.'),IFNULL(T1.hearing_days,'.'),IFNULL(T1.sv_days,'.'),IFNULL(T1.travel_days,'.'),IFNULL(T1.reptg_days,'.'),IFNULL(T1.total_days,'.'),IFNULL(T1.days_ldf_ref,'.'),IFNULL(T1.date_given_to_lpa_for_receipt_of_fact_check,'.'),IFNULL(T1.status,'.'),IFNULL(T1.total_weeks,'.'),IFNULL(T1.hearing_close_to_final_report,'.'),IFNULL(T1.notes,'.'),IFNULL(T1.lpa_lookup,'.'),IFNULL(T1.submission_date,'.'),IFNULL(T1.reports_issued,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.HZRef IS NULL -- new PositionCode
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.hz_ref IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    );
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM casework_local_plans_grouped;
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM casework_local_plans_dim_new;
    SELECT COUNT(HZRef) FROM casework_local_plans_dim_new;
    SELECT * FROM casework_local_plans_dim_new;

- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the surrogate Key, insert rows
## Table odw_harmonised_db.casework_local_plans_dim is updated

%%sql
-- merge into dim table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.casework_local_plans_dim AS Target
USING casework_local_plans_dim_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.LocalPlansID = Target.LocalPlansID

-- For Updates existing rows

    UPDATE SET
    Target.ValidTo = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;

    DraftReportSentToQAGroupNotes,
    QAPanel,
    FactCheckReportReceivedFromINSPDate,
    FactCheckReportReceivedFromINSPNotes,
    FactCheckReportDispatchDate,
    FactCheckReportDispatchNotes,
    FinalReportIssuedDate,
    FinalReportIssuedNotes,
    AdoptionDate,
    AdoptionNotes,
    WithdrawnDate,
    WithdrawnNotes,
    Status,
    TotalWeeks,
    HearingClosetoFinalReport,
    Notes,
    SubmissionDate,
    ReportsIssued,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.casework_local_plans_dim;

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (horizon tables) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.casework tables)
- **New Data:** where an main Reference in the source does not exist in the target, then NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Reference Fields in source and in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an Reference info in the target exists but the same identifyers don't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View casework_lpa_responsibility_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build casework_lpa_responsibility_dim_new table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_lpa_responsibility_dim_new 

     AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.LPACode IS NULL
        THEN T3.LPAResponsibilityID
        ELSE NULL
    END as LPAResponsibilityID,
    T1.lpacode AS LPACode,
    T1.lpaname AS LPAName,
    T1.appealtype AS AppealType,
    T1.login AS Login,
    T1.employeeid AS EmployeeID,
    T1.caseofficername AS CaseOfficerName,
    T1.workflow AS Workflow,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.lpacode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaname,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealtype,'.'), IFNULL(T1.login,'.'), IFNULL(T1.employeeid,'.'), IFNULL(T1.caseofficername,'.'), IFNULL(T1.workflow,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.lpacode = T3.LPACode AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.lpacode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaname,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealtype,'.'), IFNULL(T1.login,'.'), IFNULL(T1.employeeid,'.'), IFNULL(T1.caseofficername,'.'), IFNULL(T1.workflow,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same row, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.LPACode IS NULL -- new LPACode
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.lpacode IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_lpa_responsibility T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_lpa_responsibility_dim T3 ON T1.lpacode = T3.LPACode AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.lpacode = T3.LPACode AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.lpacode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lpaname,'.'), IFNULL(T1.appealtype,'.'), IFNULL(T1.login,'.'), IFNULL(T1.employeeid,'.'), IFNULL(T1.caseofficername,'.'), IFNULL(T1.workflow,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same row, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.LPACode IS NULL -- new LPACode
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.lpacode IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    );

    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM casework_local_plans_grouped;
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM casework_local_plans_dim_new;
    SELECT COUNT(HZRef) FROM casework_local_plans_dim_new;

# Run tests to check integrity of data by numbers
- This script checks for the total number of current codes in the harmonised table, and compare against the numbers for new data to be added and data to be set as inactive.
- **Changes tracking:** where it checks the data against active records in harmonised and compares with records to add and records to be set as inactive.
- **Changes tolerance levels:** if the total amount to be added and deleted surpasses the tolerance limit, it will interrupt the process of loading the data

# Source_Number_Pandas = Source_Number.toPandas()
# Current_Number_Pandas =  Current_Number.toPandas()
# New_Data_Number_Pandas = New_Data_Number.toPandas()

# Run tests to check integrity of data by comparison of codes
- This script checks for the total list of current codes in the harmonised table, and compare against the list for new data to be added and data to be set as inactive.
- **Changes tracking:** where it checks the data against active records in harmonised and compares with records to add and records to be set as inactive.

# Dataset is created that contains changed data and corresponding target data
- This script combines data that has been updated, Deleted or is new, with corresponding target data
- View **casework_lpa_responsibility_dim_new** is unioned to the target data filter to only those rows where changes have been detected
## View casework_lpa_responsibility_dim_changed_rows is created

%%sql
-- Create new and updated dataset

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_lpa_responsibility_dim_changed_rows

    AS

-- gets updated, deleted and new rows 
Select 
    LPAResponsibilityID,
    LPACode,
    LPAName,
    AppealType,
    Login,
    EmployeeID,
    CaseOfficerName,
    Workflow,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive

From casework_lpa_responsibility_dim_new WHERE HistoricIsActive = 'Y' or HistoricIsActive IS NULL

    UNION ALL

-- gets original versions of updated rows so we can update EndDate and set IsActive flag to 'N'
SELECT
    LPAResponsibilityID,
    LPACode,
    LPAName,
    AppealType,
    Login,
    EmployeeID,
    CaseOfficerName,
    Workflow,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
    
FROM odw_harmonised_db.casework_lpa_responsibility_dim
WHERE LPACode IN (SELECT LPACode FROM casework_lpa_responsibility_dim_new WHERE LPAResponsibilityID IS NULL) AND IsActive = 'Y';

# View casework_lpa_responsibility_dim_changed_rows is used in a merge (Upsert) statement into the target table
- **WHEN MATCHED** ON the surrogate Key (i.e. LPAResponsibilityID), EndDate is set to today -1 day and the IsActive flag is set to 'N'
- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the surrogate Key, insert rows
## Table odw_harmonised_db.casework_lpa_responsibility_dim is updated

%%sql
-- merge into dim table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.casework_lpa_responsibility_dim AS Target
USING casework_lpa_responsibility_dim_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.LPAResponsibilityID = Target.LPAResponsibilityID

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.ValidTo = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;

# Fix the IDs
- No auto-increment feature is available in delta tables, therefore we need to create new IDs for the inserted rows
- This is done by select the target data and using INSERT OVERWRITE to re-insert the data is a new Row Number
## Table odw_harmonised_db.casework_lpa_responsibility_dim is updated

%%sql
-- Insert new casework_lpa_responsibility_dim

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.casework_lpa_responsibility_dim

SELECT 
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY LPAResponsibilityID NULLS LAST) AS LPAResponsibilityID,
    LPACode,
    LPAName,
    AppealType,
    Login,
    EmployeeID,
    CaseOfficerName,
    Workflow,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.casework_lpa_responsibility_dim;
This last cell is just to check count of rows between source and target on first load, to be deleted!

source:
# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (horizon tables) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.casework tables)
- **New Data:** where an main Reference in the source does not exist in the target, then NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Reference Fields in source and in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an Reference info in the target exists but the same identifyers don't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View casework_nsip_advice_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build casework_nsip_advice_dim_new table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_nsip_advice_dim_new 
AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.advicenodeid IS NULL
        THEN T3.NSIPAdviceID
        ELSE NULL
    END                                         AS NSIPAdviceID,
    T1.advicenodeid                             AS AdviceNodeID,
    T1.casereference                            AS CaseReference,
    T1.advicereference                          AS AdviceReference,
    T1.advicestatus                             AS AdviceStatus,
    T1.section51advice                          AS Section51Advice,
    T1.enquirerfirstname                        AS EnquirerFirstName,
    T1.enquirerlastname                         AS EnquirerLastName,
    T1.enquirerorganisation                     AS EnquirerOrganisation,
    T1.enquirydate                              AS EnquiryDate,
    T1.enqirymethod                            AS EnquiryMethod,
    T1.enquiry                                  AS Enquiry,
    T1.advicefrom                               AS AdviceFrom,
    T1.advicedate                               AS AdviceDate,
    T1.advice                                   AS Advice,
    T1.advicelastmodified                       AS AdviceLastModified,
    T1.attachmentcount                          AS AttachmentCount,
    T1.attachmentslastmodified                   AS AttachmentLastModified,
    T1.lastpublisheddate                        AS LastPublishedDate,
    T1.casenodeid                               AS CaseNodeID,
    T1.welshlanguage                            AS WelshLanguage,
    T1.caseWorktype                             AS CaseWorkType,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP                           AS IngestionDate,
    NULL                                        AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.advicenodeid,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.casereference,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.advicereference,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.advicestatus,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.section51advice,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.enquirerfirstname,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.enquirerlastname,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.enquirerorganisation,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.enquirydate,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.enqirymethod,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.enquiry,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.advicefrom,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.advicedate,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.advice,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.advicelastmodified,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.attachmentcount,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.attachmentslastmodified,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.lastpublisheddate,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.casenodeid,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.welshlanguage,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.caseWorktype,'.')))           AS RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields
    'Y' AS IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.advicenodeid = T3.AdviceNodeID 
        AND 
        md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.advicenodeid,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.casereference,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.advicereference,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.advicestatus,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.section51advice,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.enquirerfirstname,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.enquirerlastname,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.enquirerorganisation,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.enquirydate,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.enqirymethod,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.enquiry,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.advicefrom,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.advicedate,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.advice,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.advicelastmodified,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.attachmentcount,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.attachmentslastmodified,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.lastpublisheddate,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.casenodeid,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.welshlanguage,'.'),	
        IFNULL(T1.caseWorktype,'.')))
        <> T3.RowID   -- same row, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.AdviceNodeID IS NULL -- new AdviceNodeID
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.advicenodeid IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive AS HistoricIsActive
FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_nsip_advice T1

LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2   
    ON "Casework" = T2.Description      
        AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'

FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_nsip_advice_dim T3 
    ON T1.advicenodeid = T3.AdviceNodeID      
        AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.advicenodeid = T3.AdviceNodeID 
                AND  
                md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.advicenodeid,'.'),	
                IFNULL(T1.casereference,'.'),	
                IFNULL(T1.advicereference,'.'),	
                IFNULL(T1.advicestatus,'.'),	
                IFNULL(T1.section51advice,'.'),	
                IFNULL(T1.enquirerfirstname,'.'),	
                IFNULL(T1.enquirerlastname,'.'),	
                IFNULL(T1.enquirerorganisation,'.'),	
                IFNULL(T1.enquirydate,'.'),	
                IFNULL(T1.enqirymethod,'.'),	
                IFNULL(T1.enquiry,'.'),	
                IFNULL(T1.advicefrom,'.'),	
                IFNULL(T1.advicedate,'.'),	
                IFNULL(T1.advice,'.'),	
                IFNULL(T1.advicelastmodified,'.'),	
                IFNULL(T1.attachmentcount,'.'),	
                IFNULL(T1.attachmentslastmodified,'.'),	
                IFNULL(T1.lastpublisheddate,'.'),	
                IFNULL(T1.casenodeid,'.'),	
                IFNULL(T1.welshlanguage,'.'),	
                IFNULL(T1.caseWorktype,'.')))
                <> T3.RowID  -- same row, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.AdviceNodeID IS NULL -- new AdviceNodeID
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.AdviceNodeID IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )

# Run tests to check integrity of data by numbers
- This script checks for the total number of current codes in the harmonised table, and compare against the numbers for new data to be added and data to be set as inactive.
- **Changes tracking:** where it checks the data against active records in harmonised and compares with records to add and records to be set as inactive.
- **Changes tolerance levels:** if the total amount to be added and deleted surpasses the tolerance limit, it will interrupt the process of loading the data

# from pyspark.sql import SparkSession

%%sql
-- Create new and updated dataset

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_nsip_advice_dim_changed_rows
AS

-- gets updated, deleted and new rows 
SELECT 
    NSIPAdviceID,
    AdviceNodeID,
    CaseReference,
    AdviceReference,
    AdviceStatus,
    Section51Advice,
    EnquirerFirstName,
    EnquirerLastName,
    EnquirerOrganisation,
    EnquiryDate,
    EnquiryMethod,
    Enquiry,
    AdviceFrom,

    WelshLanguage,
    CaseWorkType,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,

    IsActive
FROM casework_nsip_advice_dim_new 
WHERE HistoricIsActive = 'Y' 
    OR HistoricIsActive IS NULL
UNION ALL
-- gets original versions of updated rows so we can update EndDate and set IsActive flag to 'N'
SELECT
    NSIPAdviceID,
    AdviceNodeID,
    CaseReference,
    AdviceReference,
    AdviceStatus,
    Section51Advice,
    EnquirerFirstName,
    EnquirerLastName,
    EnquirerOrganisation,

    CaseWorkType,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
    
FROM odw_harmonised_db.casework_nsip_advice_dim
WHERE AdviceNodeID IN 
(
    SELECT AdviceNodeID 
    FROM casework_nsip_advice_dim_new 
    WHERE NSIPAdviceID IS NULL
) 
AND IsActive = 'Y';

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (horizon tables) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.casework tables)
- **New Data:** where an main Reference in the source does not exist in the target, then NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Reference Fields in source and in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an Reference info in the target exists but the same identifyers don't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View casework_nsip_examination_timetable_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build casework_nsip_examination_timetable_dim_new table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_nsip_examination_timetable_dim_new 

     AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.CaseReference IS NULL
        THEN T3.NSIPExaminationTimetableID
        ELSE NULL
    END as NSIPExaminationTimetableID,
    T1.casereference AS CaseReference,
    T1.typeofexamination AS TypeOfExamination,
    T1.name AS Name,
    T1.description AS Description,
    T1.deadlinestartdatetime AS DeadlineStartDateTime,
    T1.date AS Date,
    T1.location AS Location,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.casereference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.typeofexamination,'.'), IFNULL(T1.name,'.'), IFNULL(T1.description,'.'), IFNULL(T1.deadlinestartdatetime,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.location,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.casereference = T3.CaseReference AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.casereference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.typeofexamination,'.'), IFNULL(T1.name,'.'), IFNULL(T1.description,'.'), IFNULL(T1.deadlinestartdatetime,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.location,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same row, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.CaseReference IS NULL -- new CaseReference
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.casereference IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_examination_timetable T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_nsip_examination_timetable_dim T3 ON T1.casereference = T3.CaseReference AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.casereference = T3.CaseReference AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.casereference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.typeofexamination,'.'), IFNULL(T1.name,'.'), IFNULL(T1.description,'.'), IFNULL(T1.deadlinestartdatetime,'.'), IFNULL(T1.date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.location,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same row, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.CaseReference IS NULL -- new CaseReference
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.casereference IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )

- **Changes tracking:** where it checks the data against active records in harmonised and compares with records to add and records to be set as inactive.
- **Changes tolerance levels:** if the total amount to be added and deleted surpasses the tolerance limit, it will interrupt the process of loading the data

# Dataset is created that contains changed data and corresponding target data
- This script combines data that has been updated, Deleted or is new, with corresponding target data
- View **casework_all_appeals_new** is unioned to the target data filter to only those rows where changes have been detected
## View casework_nsip_project_info_internal_dim_changed_rows is created

%%sql
-- Create new and updated dataset

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_nsip_project_info_internal_dim_changed_rows

    AS

-- gets updated, deleted and new rows 
SELECT 
    NSIPProjectInfoInternalID,
    CaseCreatedDate,
    ProjectName,
    ProjectStatus,
    ExamTimetablePublishStatus,
    Sector,
    ProjectType,
    Stage,
    CaseReference,

    MapZoomLevel,

    SoS,
    TenE,
    DateProjectAppearsOnWebsite,
    DateOfDCOAcceptance,
    AnticipatedDateOfSubmission,
    DateOfDCOSubmission,
    DateOfRepresentationPeriodOpen,
    DateOfRelevantRepresentationClose,
    DateRRepAppearOnWebsite,
    ConfirmedStartOfExamination,
    DateTimeExaminationEnds,
    Stage4ExtensionToExamCloseDate,
    Stage5ExtensionToRecommendationDeadline,
    DateOfRecommendations,
    ConfirmedDateOfDecision,
    Stage5ExtensionToDecisionDeadline,
    DateProjectWithdrawn,
    Section46Notification,
    DatePINSFirstNotifiedOfProject,
    ScreeningOpinionSought,
    ScreeningOpinionIssued,
    ScopingOpinionSought,
    ScopingOpinionIssued,
    DeadlineForAcceptanceDecision,
    DateSection58NoticeReceived,
    PreliminaryMeetingStartDate,
    DeadlineForCloseOfExamination,
    DeadlineForSubmissionOfRecommendation,
    DeadlineForDecision,
    JRPeriodEndDate,
    ExtensionToDateRelevantRepresentationsClose,
    Summary,
    PromoterName,
    ApplicantFirstName,
    ApplicantLastName,
    AddressLine1,
    AddressLine2,
    AddressTown,
    AddressCounty,
    PostCode,
    ApplicantEmailAddress,
    ApplicantWebAddress,
    ApplicantPhoneNumber,
    ApplicantDescriptionOfProject,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
    

From casework_nsip_project_info_internal_dim_new WHERE HistoricIsActive = 'Y' or HistoricIsActive IS NULL

    UNION ALL

-- gets original versions of updated rows so we can update EndDate and set IsActive flag to 'N'
SELECT
    NSIPProjectInfoInternalID,
    CaseCreatedDate,
    ProjectName,
    ProjectStatus,
    ExamTimetablePublishStatus,
    Sector,
    ProjectType,
    Stage,
    CaseReference,
    ProjectLocation,

    SoS,
    TenE,
    DateProjectAppearsOnWebsite,
    DateOfDCOAcceptance,
    AnticipatedDateOfSubmission,
    DateOfDCOSubmission,
    DateOfRepresentationPeriodOpen,
    DateOfRelevantRepresentationClose,
    DateRRepAppearOnWebsite,
    ConfirmedStartOfExamination,
    DateTimeExaminationEnds,
    Stage4ExtensionToExamCloseDate,
    Stage5ExtensionToRecommendationDeadline,
    DateOfRecommendations,
    ConfirmedDateOfDecision,
    Stage5ExtensionToDecisionDeadline,
    DateProjectWithdrawn,
    Section46Notification,
    DatePINSFirstNotifiedOfProject,
    ScreeningOpinionSought,
    ScreeningOpinionIssued,
    ScopingOpinionSought,
    ScopingOpinionIssued,
    DeadlineForAcceptanceDecision,
    DateSection58NoticeReceived,
    PreliminaryMeetingStartDate,
    DeadlineForCloseOfExamination,
    DeadlineForSubmissionOfRecommendation,
    DeadlineForDecision,
    JRPeriodEndDate,
    ExtensionToDateRelevantRepresentationsClose,
    Summary,
    PromoterName,
    ApplicantFirstName,
    ApplicantLastName,
    AddressLine1,
    AddressLine2,
    AddressTown,
    AddressCounty,
    PostCode,
    ApplicantEmailAddress,
    ApplicantWebAddress,
    ApplicantPhoneNumber,
    ApplicantDescriptionOfProject,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
    
FROM odw_harmonised_db.casework_nsip_project_info_internal_dim
WHERE CaseReference IN (SELECT CaseReference FROM casework_nsip_project_info_internal_dim_new WHERE NSIPProjectInfoInternalID IS NULL) AND IsActive = 'Y';

# View casework_nsip_project_info_internal_dim_changed_rows is used in a merge (Upsert) statement into the target table
- **WHEN MATCHED** ON the surrogate Key (i.e. AllAppealsID), EndDate is set to today -1 day and the IsActive flag is set to 'N'
- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the surrogate Key, insert rows
## Table odw_harmonised_db.casework_nsip_project_info_internal_dim is updated

%%sql
-- merge into dim table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.casework_nsip_project_info_internal_dim AS Target
USING casework_nsip_project_info_internal_dim_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.NSIPProjectInfoInternalID = Target.NSIPProjectInfoInternalID

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.ValidTo = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;

- No auto-increment feature is available in delta tables, therefore we need to create new IDs for the inserted rows

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (horizon tables) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.casework tables)
- **New Data:** where an main Reference in the source does not exist in the target, then NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Reference Fields in source and in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an Reference info in the target exists but the same identifyers don't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View casework_nsip_redactions_dim is created

%%sql
-- Build casework_nsip_redactions_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_nsip_redactions_dim_new

     AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.case_reference IS NULL
        THEN T3.NSIPRedactionsID
        ELSE NULL
    END as NSIPRedactionsID,
    T1.case_reference AS CaseReference,
    T1.num_redactions AS NumberOfRedactions,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.case_reference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.case_reference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.num_redactions,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields, so needs to be done
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.case_reference = T3.CaseReference AND  md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.case_reference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.case_reference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.num_redactions,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.CaseReference IS NULL -- new AppealRef
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.case_reference IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_nsip_redactions T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_nsip_redactions_dim T3 ON T1.case_reference = T3.CaseReference AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.case_reference = T3.CaseReference AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.case_reference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.case_reference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.num_redactions,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.CaseReference IS NULL -- new PositionCode
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.case_reference IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    );

    AS

    NumberOfRedactions,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,

From casework_nsip_redactions_dim_new WHERE HistoricIsActive = 'Y' or HistoricIsActive IS NULL

SELECT
    NSIPRedactionsID,
    CaseReference,
    NumberOfRedactions,

    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,

- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the surrogate Key, insert rows

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (horizon tables) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.casework tables)
- **New Data:** where an main Reference in the source does not exist in the target, then NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Reference Fields in source and in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an Reference info in the target exists but the same identifyers don't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View casework_nsip_relevant_representation_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build casework_nsip_relevant_representation_dim_new table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_nsip_relevant_representation_dim_new 

     AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.ContactID IS NULL
        THEN T3.NSIPRelevantRepresentationID
        ELSE NULL
    END as NSIPRelevantRepresentationID,
    T1.casereference AS CaseReference,
    T1.caseuniqueid AS CaseUniqueId,
    T1.contactid AS ContactID,
    T1.organisationname AS OrganisationName,
    T1.jobtitle AS JobTitle,
    T1.fullname AS FullName,
    T1.phonenumber AS PhoneNumber,
    T1.emailaddress AS EmailAddress,
    T1.buildingnumber AS BuildingNumber,
    T1.street AS Street,
    T1.town AS Town,
    T1.county AS County,
    T1.country AS Country,
    T1.postcode AS Postcode,
    T1.relevantrepid AS RelevantRepID,
    T1.attendprelimmeeting AS AttendPrelimMeeting,
    T1.datereceived AS DateReceived,
    T1.notes AS Notes,
    T1.agentcontactid AS AgentContactId,
    T1.representatcompacqhearing AS RepresentAtCompAcqHearing,
    T1.representatissuehearing AS RepresentAtIssueHearing,
    T1.representatopenfloorhearing AS RepresentAtOpenFloorHearing,
    T1.representationoriginal AS RepresentationOriginal,
    T1.representationredacted AS RepresentationRedacted,
    T1.submitlaterreps AS SubmitLaterReps,
    T1.webreference AS WebReference,
    T1.relevantrepstatus AS RelevantRepStatus,
    T1.owneroroccupier AS OwnerOrOccupier,
    T1.powertosell AS PowerToSell,
    T1.entitledtoclaim AS EntitledToClaim,
    T1.other AS Other,
    T1.descriptionifother AS DescriptionIfOther,
    T1.relreponbehalfof AS RelRepOnBehalfOf,
    T1.relreporganisation AS RelRepOrganisation,
    T1.preferredcontactmethod AS PreferredContactMethod,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.casereference,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.caseuniqueid,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.contactid,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.organisationname,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.jobtitle,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.fullname,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.phonenumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.emailaddress,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.buildingnumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.street,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.town,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.county,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.country,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.postcode,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.relevantrepid,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.attendprelimmeeting,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datereceived,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.notes,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.agentcontactid,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.representatcompacqhearing,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.representatissuehearing,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.representatopenfloorhearing,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.representationoriginal,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.representationredacted,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.submitlaterreps,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.webreference,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.relevantrepstatus,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.owneroroccupier,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.powertosell,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.entitledtoclaim,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.other,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.descriptionifother,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.relreponbehalfof,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.relreporganisation,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.preferredcontactmethod,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.contactid = T3.ContactID AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.casereference,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.caseuniqueid,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.contactid,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.organisationname,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.jobtitle,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.fullname,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.phonenumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.emailaddress,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.buildingnumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.street,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.town,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.county,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.country,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.postcode,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.relevantrepid,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.attendprelimmeeting,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datereceived,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.notes,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.agentcontactid,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.representatcompacqhearing,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.representatissuehearing,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.representatopenfloorhearing,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.representationoriginal,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.representationredacted,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.submitlaterreps,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.webreference,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.relevantrepstatus,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.owneroroccupier,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.powertosell,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.entitledtoclaim,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.other,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.descriptionifother,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.relreponbehalfof,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.relreporganisation,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.preferredcontactmethod,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same row, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.ContactID IS NULL -- new ContactID
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.contactid IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_nsip_relevant_representation T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_nsip_relevant_representation_dim T3 ON T1.contactid = T3.ContactID AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.contactid = T3.ContactID AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.casereference,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.caseuniqueid,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.contactid,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.organisationname,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.jobtitle,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.fullname,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.phonenumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.emailaddress,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.buildingnumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.street,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.town,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.county,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.country,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.postcode,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.relevantrepid,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.attendprelimmeeting,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datereceived,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.notes,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.agentcontactid,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.representatcompacqhearing,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.representatissuehearing,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.representatopenfloorhearing,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.representationoriginal,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.representationredacted,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.submitlaterreps,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.webreference,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.relevantrepstatus,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.owneroroccupier,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.powertosell,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.entitledtoclaim,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.other,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.descriptionifother,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.relreponbehalfof,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.relreporganisation,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.preferredcontactmethod,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same row, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.ContactID IS NULL -- new ContactID
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.contactid IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (horizon tables) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.casework tables)
- **New Data:** where an main Reference in the source does not exist in the target, then NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Reference Fields in source and in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an Reference info in the target exists but the same identifyers don't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View casework_special_circumstance_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build casework_special_circumstance_dim_new table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_special_circumstance_dim_new

     AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN T3.SpecialCircumstanceID
        ELSE NULL
    END as SpecialCircumstanceID,
    T1.appealrefnumber AS AppealRefNumber,
    T1.lastmodified AS LastModified,
    T1.specialcircumstance AS SpecialCircumstance,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lastmodified,'.'), IFNULL(T1.specialcircumstance,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields, so needs to be done
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND  md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lastmodified,'.'), IFNULL(T1.specialcircumstance,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRef
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_special_circumstance T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_special_circumstance_dim T3 ON T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.lastmodified,'.'), IFNULL(T1.specialcircumstance,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new PositionCode
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    );

- **Changes tolerance levels:** if the total amount to be added and deleted surpasses the tolerance limit, it will interrupt the process of loading the data

    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.datecostsreportdespatched,'.'), IFNULL(T1.datedecisionreportreceivedinpins,'.'), IFNULL(T1.datepublicationprocedurecompleted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.datereturnedfromreader,'.'), IFNULL(T1.datesenttoreader,'.'), IFNULL(T1.orderrejectedorreturned,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.datecostsreportdespatched,'.'), IFNULL(T1.datedecisionreportreceivedinpins,'.'), IFNULL(T1.datepublicationprocedurecompleted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.datereturnedfromreader,'.'), IFNULL(T1.datesenttoreader,'.'), IFNULL(T1.orderrejectedorreturned,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same row, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRefNumber
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_specialist_case_dates T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_specialist_case_dates_dim T3 ON T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'), IFNULL(T1.datecostsreportdespatched,'.'), IFNULL(T1.datedecisionreportreceivedinpins,'.'), IFNULL(T1.datepublicationprocedurecompleted,'.'), IFNULL(T1.datereturnedfromreader,'.'), IFNULL(T1.datesenttoreader,'.'), IFNULL(T1.orderrejectedorreturned,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same row, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRefNumber
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (horizon tables) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.casework tables)
- **New Data:** where an main Reference in the source does not exist in the target, then NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Reference Fields in source and in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an Reference info in the target exists but the same identifyers don't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

     AS

    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,

    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.act,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.appealagainst,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.applicationsubtype,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.deccref,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.decisionclearfordespatch,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.eprtype,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.nfa,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.omastance,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.regulation,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.regulator,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.sch6notice,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.section,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.sladatemet,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.targetdatemet,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields

        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.act,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.appealagainst,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.applicationsubtype,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.deccref,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.decisionclearfordespatch,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.eprtype,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.nfa,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.omastance,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.regulation,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.regulator,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.sch6notice,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.section,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.sladatemet,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.targetdatemet,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same row, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRefNumber
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_specialist_case_string T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_specialist_case_string_dim T3 ON T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.act,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.appealagainst,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.applicationsubtype,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.deccref,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.decisionclearfordespatch,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.eprtype,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.nfa,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.omastance,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.regulation,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.regulator,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.sch6notice,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.section,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.sladatemet,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.targetdatemet,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same row, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRefNumber
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )

FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_specialist_coastal_access_dim T3 ON T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.admissible,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.neresponsereceived,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.dateneresponsereceived,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.strikeafairbalance,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same row, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRefNumber
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (horizon tables) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.casework tables)
- **New Data:** where an main Reference in the source does not exist in the target, then NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Reference Fields in source and in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an Reference info in the target exists but the same identifyers don't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View casework_specialist_environment_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build casework_specialist_environment_dim_new table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_specialist_environment_dim_new 

     AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.AppealRefNumber IS NULL
        THEN T3.SpecialistEnvironmentID
        ELSE NULL
    END as SpecialistEnvironmentID,
    T1.appealrefnumber AS AppealRefNumber,
    T1.appealdeadline AS AppealDeadline,
    T1.acknowledged AS Acknowledged,
    T1.notificationofsv AS NotificationOfSV,
    T1.paduedate AS PADueDate,
    T1.padate AS PADate,
    T1.casefiledocumentsdue AS CaseFileDocumentsDue,
    T1.reportdue AS ReportDue,
    T1.datedueinogdsladate AS DateDueInOGDSLADate,
    T1.datesenttoogdcouncil AS DateSentToOGDCouncil,
    T1.f17acir1received AS F17ACIR1Received,
    T1.sladatemet AS SLADateMet,
    T1.dateofnfa AS DateOfNFA,
    T1.dateoftargetdateonint4ctocharthori AS DateOfTargetDateOnINT4CToChartHOrI,
    T1.documentsdue AS DocumentsDue,
    T1.documentsreceived AS DocumentsReceived,
    T1.datedueinpins AS DateDueInPINS,
    T1.inspectorestimateddateafterinquiryclose AS InspectorEstimatedDateAfterInquiryClose,
    T1.achievedtarget AS AchievedTarget,
    T1.prelimdocumentsinfo AS PrelimDocumentsInfo,
    T1.prelimdocumentsdate AS PrelimDocumentsDate,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.appealdeadline,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.acknowledged,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.notificationofsv,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.paduedate,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.padate,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.casefiledocumentsdue,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.reportdue,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datedueinogdsladate,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datesenttoogdcouncil,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.f17acir1received,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.sladatemet,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.dateofnfa,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.dateoftargetdateonint4ctocharthori,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.documentsdue,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.documentsreceived,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datedueinpins,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.inspectorestimateddateafterinquiryclose,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.achievedtarget,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.prelimdocumentsinfo,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.prelimdocumentsdate,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.appealdeadline,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.acknowledged,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.notificationofsv,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.paduedate,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.padate,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.casefiledocumentsdue,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.reportdue,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datedueinogdsladate,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datesenttoogdcouncil,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.f17acir1received,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.sladatemet,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.dateofnfa,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.dateoftargetdateonint4ctocharthori,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.documentsdue,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.documentsreceived,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datedueinpins,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.inspectorestimateddateafterinquiryclose,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.achievedtarget,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.prelimdocumentsinfo,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.prelimdocumentsdate,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same row, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRefNumber
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_specialist_environment T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_specialist_environment_dim T3 ON T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.appealdeadline,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.acknowledged,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.notificationofsv,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.paduedate,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.padate,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.casefiledocumentsdue,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.reportdue,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datedueinogdsladate,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datesenttoogdcouncil,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.f17acir1received,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.sladatemet,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.dateofnfa,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.dateoftargetdateonint4ctocharthori,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.documentsdue,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.documentsreceived,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datedueinpins,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.inspectorestimateddateafterinquiryclose,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.achievedtarget,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.prelimdocumentsinfo,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.prelimdocumentsdate,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same row, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRefNumber
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )

    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datenoticeofmotionreceived,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.tsolreference,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datenoticeofmotionsenttoinspector,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.dateinspectorscommentsreceived,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datecasefilesenttolegal,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datepins1commentssenttolegal,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.judgement,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.dateofjudgement,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.filereturnedforredetermination,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datenoticeofmotionreceived,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.tsolreference,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datenoticeofmotionsenttoinspector,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.dateinspectorscommentsreceived,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datecasefilesenttolegal,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datepins1commentssenttolegal,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.judgement,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.dateofjudgement,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.filereturnedforredetermination,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same row, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRefNumber
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_specialist_high_court T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_specialist_high_court_dim T3 ON T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datenoticeofmotionreceived,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.tsolreference,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datenoticeofmotionsenttoinspector,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.dateinspectorscommentsreceived,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datecasefilesenttolegal,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datepins1commentssenttolegal,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.judgement,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.dateofjudgement,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.filereturnedforredetermination,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same row, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRefNumber
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )

# Dataset is created that contains changed data and corresponding target data
- This script combines data that has been updated, Deleted or is new, with corresponding target data
- View **casework_specialist_high_court_dim_new** is unioned to the target data filter to only those rows where changes have been detected
## View casework_specialist_high_court_dim_changed_rows is created

%%sql
-- Create new and updated dataset

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_specialist_high_court_dim_changed_rows

    AS

-- gets updated, deleted and new rows 
Select 
    SpecialistHighCourtID,
    AppealRefNumber,
    DateNoticeOfMotionReceived,
    TSOLReference,
    DateNoticeOfMotionSentToInspector,
    DateInspectorsCommentsReceived,
    DateCaseFileSentToLegal,
    DatePINS1CommentsSentToLegal,
    Judgement,
    DateOfJudgement,
    FileReturnedForReDetermination,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive

From casework_specialist_high_court_dim_new WHERE HistoricIsActive = 'Y' or HistoricIsActive IS NULL

    UNION ALL

-- gets original versions of updated rows so we can update EndDate and set IsActive flag to 'N'
SELECT
    SpecialistHighCourtID,
    AppealRefNumber,
    DateNoticeOfMotionReceived,
    TSOLReference,
    DateNoticeOfMotionSentToInspector,
    DateInspectorsCommentsReceived,
    DateCaseFileSentToLegal,
    DatePINS1CommentsSentToLegal,
    Judgement,
    DateOfJudgement,
    FileReturnedForReDetermination,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
    
FROM odw_harmonised_db.casework_specialist_high_court_dim
WHERE AppealRefNumber IN (SELECT AppealRefNumber FROM casework_specialist_high_court_dim_new WHERE SpecialistHighCourtID IS NULL) AND IsActive = 'Y';

# View casework_specialist_high_court_dim_changed_rows is used in a merge (Upsert) statement into the target table
- **WHEN MATCHED** ON the surrogate Key (i.e. SpecialistHighCourtID), EndDate is set to today -1 day and the IsActive flag is set to 'N'
- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the surrogate Key, insert rows
## Table odw_harmonised_db.casework_specialist_high_court_dim is updated

%%sql
-- merge into dim table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.casework_specialist_high_court_dim AS Target
USING casework_specialist_high_court_dim_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.SpecialistHighCourtID = Target.SpecialistHighCourtID

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.ValidTo = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (horizon tables) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.casework tables)
- **New Data:** where an main Reference in the source does not exist in the target, then NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Reference Fields in source and in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an Reference info in the target exists but the same identifyers don't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View casework_specialist_modifications_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build casework_specialist_modifications_dim_new table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_specialist_modifications_dim_new 

     AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.AppealRefNumber IS NULL
        THEN T3.SpecialistModificationsID
        ELSE NULL
    END as SpecialistModificationsID,
    T1.appealrefnumber AS AppealRefNumber,
    T1.modifydate AS ModifyDate,
    T1.modificationentry AS ModificationEntry,
    T1.modificationnumber AS ModificationNumber,
    T1.dateproposedmodsadvertised AS DateProposedModsAdvertised,
    T1.dateobjectionperiodends AS DateObjectionPeriodEnds,
    T1.procedureconfirmedstartdate AS ProcedureConfirmedStartDate,
    T1.datelocalinquiryrequested AS DateLocalInquiryRequested,
    T1.lastsittingday AS LastSittingDay,
    T1.datetoreader AS DateToReader,
    T1.datereturnedfromreader AS DateReturnedFromReader,
    T1.decisionorrecommendation AS DecisionOrRecommendation,
    T1.receiptdateofdecision AS ReceiptDateOfDecision,
    T1.datedecisiondespatched AS DateDecisionDespatched,
    T1.reader AS Reader,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.modifydate,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.modificationentry,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.modificationnumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.dateproposedmodsadvertised,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.dateobjectionperiodends,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.procedureconfirmedstartdate,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datelocalinquiryrequested,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.lastsittingday,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datetoreader,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datereturnedfromreader,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.decisionorrecommendation,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.receiptdateofdecision,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datedecisiondespatched,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.reader,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.modifydate,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.modificationentry,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.modificationnumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.dateproposedmodsadvertised,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.dateobjectionperiodends,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.procedureconfirmedstartdate,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datelocalinquiryrequested,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.lastsittingday,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datetoreader,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datereturnedfromreader,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.decisionorrecommendation,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.receiptdateofdecision,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datedecisiondespatched,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.reader,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same row, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRefNumber
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_specialist_modifications T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_specialist_modifications_dim T3 ON T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.modifydate,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.modificationentry,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.modificationnumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.dateproposedmodsadvertised,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.dateobjectionperiodends,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.procedureconfirmedstartdate,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datelocalinquiryrequested,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.lastsittingday,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datetoreader,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datereturnedfromreader,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.decisionorrecommendation,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.receiptdateofdecision,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.datedecisiondespatched,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.reader,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same row, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRefNumber
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )

    T1.expirydate AS ExpiryDate,
    T1.proposallettersent AS ProposalLetterSent,
    T1.inquiryhearingrequested AS InquiryHearingRequested,
    T1.filetoinspector AS FileToInspector,
    T1.filereturned AS FileReturned,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.typeofnotice,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.noticereceivedfromlpa,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.dateofpurchasenotice,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.dateofresponsenotice,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.expirydate,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.proposallettersent,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.inquiryhearingrequested,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.filetoinspector,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.filereturned,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.typeofnotice,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.noticereceivedfromlpa,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.dateofpurchasenotice,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.dateofresponsenotice,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.expirydate,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.proposallettersent,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.inquiryhearingrequested,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.filetoinspector,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.filereturned,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same row, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRefNumber
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_specialist_purchase_notice T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_specialist_purchase_notice_dim T3 ON T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.typeofnotice,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.noticereceivedfromlpa,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.dateofpurchasenotice,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.dateofresponsenotice,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.expirydate,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.proposallettersent,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.inquiryhearingrequested,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.filetoinspector,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.filereturned,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same row, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRefNumber
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
