# Dataset is created that contains changed data and corresponding target data
- This script combines data that has been updated, Deleted or is new, with corresponding target data
- View **casework_specialist_purchase_notice_dim_new** is unioned to the target data filter to only those rows where changes have been detected
## View casework_specialist_purchase_notice_dim_changed_rows is created

%%sql
-- Create new and updated dataset

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_specialist_purchase_notice_dim_changed_rows

    AS

-- gets updated, deleted and new rows 
Select 
    SpecialistPurchaseNoticeID,
    AppealRefNumber,
    TypeOfNotice,
    NoticeReceivedFromLPA,
    DateOfPurchaseNotice,
    DateOfResponseNotice,
    ExpiryDate,
    ProposalLetterSent,
    InquiryHearingRequested,
    FileToInspector,
    FileReturned,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive

From casework_specialist_purchase_notice_dim_new WHERE HistoricIsActive = 'Y' or HistoricIsActive IS NULL

    UNION ALL

-- gets original versions of updated rows so we can update EndDate and set IsActive flag to 'N'
SELECT
    SpecialistPurchaseNoticeID,
    AppealRefNumber,
    TypeOfNotice,
    NoticeReceivedFromLPA,
    DateOfPurchaseNotice,
    DateOfResponseNotice,
    ExpiryDate,
    ProposalLetterSent,
    InquiryHearingRequested,
    FileToInspector,
    FileReturned,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
    
FROM odw_harmonised_db.casework_specialist_purchase_notice_dim
WHERE AppealRefNumber IN (SELECT AppealRefNumber FROM casework_specialist_purchase_notice_dim_new WHERE SpecialistPurchaseNoticeID IS NULL) AND IsActive = 'Y';

# View casework_specialist_purchase_notice_dim_changed_rows is used in a merge (Upsert) statement into the target table
- **WHEN MATCHED** ON the surrogate Key (i.e. SpecialistPurchaseNoticeID), EndDate is set to today -1 day and the IsActive flag is set to 'N'
- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the surrogate Key, insert rows
## Table odw_harmonised_db.casework_specialist_purchase_notice_dim is updated

%%sql
-- merge into dim table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.casework_specialist_purchase_notice_dim AS Target
USING casework_specialist_purchase_notice_dim_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.SpecialistPurchaseNoticeID = Target.SpecialistPurchaseNoticeID

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.ValidTo = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (horizon tables) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.casework tables)
- **New Data:** where an main Reference in the source does not exist in the target, then NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Reference Fields in source and in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an Reference info in the target exists but the same identifyers don't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

%%sql
-- Build casework_specialist_recharge_dim_new table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casework_specialist_recharge_dim_new 

     AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.AppealRefNumber IS NULL
        THEN T3.SpecialistRechargeID
        ELSE NULL
    END as SpecialistRechargeID,
    T1.appealrefnumber AS AppealRefNumber,
    T1.rechargedto AS RechargedTo,
    T1.cr1formraised AS CR1FormRaised,
    T1.cr1formcomplete AS CR1FormComplete,
    T1.amount AS Amount,
    T1.sap5formraised AS SAP5FormRaised,
    T1.comment AS Comment,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.rechargedto,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.cr1formraised,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.cr1formcomplete,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.amount,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.sap5formraised,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.comment,'.'))) as RowID, -- this hash should contain all the defining fields
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.rechargedto,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.cr1formraised,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.cr1formcomplete,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.amount,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.sap5formraised,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.comment,'.'))) <> T3.RowID   -- same row, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRefNumber
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.horizon_specialist_recharge T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Casework" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.casework_specialist_recharge_dim T3 ON T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber = T3.AppealRefNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.appealrefnumber,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.rechargedto,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.cr1formraised,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.cr1formcomplete,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.amount,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.sap5formraised,'.'),	IFNULL(T1.comment,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same row, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.AppealRefNumber IS NULL -- new AppealRefNumber
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.appealrefnumber IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )

                THEN 'Y'

%%sql

    LPAID,
    AppealReferenceNumber,
    RejectedOrWithdrawn,

FROM odw_harmonised_db.casework_tpo_dim
WHERE AppealReferenceNumber IN (SELECT AppealReferenceNumber FROM casework_tpo_dim_new WHERE TPOID IS NULL) AND IsActive = 'Y';

- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the surrogate Key, insert rows

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (sap hr) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_case_casemarking_bridge)
- **New Data:** where a Pers_No in the source does not exist as an EmployeeNumber in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Pers_No in source and EmployeeNumber in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an EmployeeNumber in the target exists but the same Pers_No doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View checkmark_case_casemarking_bridge_new is created

%%sql  

-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW checkmark_case_casemarking_bridge_new 

    AS

-- gets data that matches of CaseReference and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.CaseReference IS NULL
        THEN T5.CasemarkingBridgeID
        ELSE NULL
    END as CasemarkingBridgeID, -- surrogate 
    T1.CasemarkingFactID AS CasemarkingID,
    T6.CaseID AS CaseFactID,
    T1.CaseReference,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.CaseReference,'.'),IFNULL(T1.CasemarkingFactID,'.'))) AS RowID,
    'Y' AS IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.CaseReference = T5.CaseReference AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.CaseReference,'.'),IFNULL(T1.CasemarkingFactID,'.'))) <> T5.RowID-- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T5.CaseReference IS NULL -- new comment
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.CaseReference IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T1.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_casemarking_fact T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_case_casemarking_bridge T5 ON T1.CaseReference = T5.CaseReference AND T5.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_case_fact T6 ON T1.CaseReference = T6.CaseReference AND T6.IsActive = 'Y'


WHERE
    (
        
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.CaseReference = T5.CaseReference AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.CaseReference,'.'),IFNULL(T1.CasemarkingFactID,'.'))) <> T5.RowID    -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T5.CaseReference IS NULL -- new employee
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.CaseReference IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    )

%%sql

    AS

-- gets data that matches of CaseReference and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T5.CaseReference IS NULL
        THEN T1.CaseID
        ELSE NULL
    END as CaseID, -- surrogate 
    T5.DocumentsReferenceID AS DocumentsID,
    
    T5.CaseReference, -- source system id
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T5.CaseReference,'.'), IFNULL(T5.DocumentsReferenceID,'.'))) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.CaseReference = T5.CaseReference AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T5.CaseReference,'.'), IFNULL(T5.DocumentsReferenceID,'.'))) <> T5.RowID    -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T5.CaseReference IS NULL -- new comment
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.CaseReference IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T5.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_case_fact T1
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_documents_dim T5 ON T1.CaseReference = T5.CaseReference AND T5.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'


WHERE
    (
        
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.CaseReference = T5.CaseReference AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T5.CaseReference,'.'), IFNULL(T5.DocumentsReferenceID,'.'))) <> T5.RowID    -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T5.CaseReference IS NULL -- new employee
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.CaseReference IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    )

# Dataset is created that contains changed data and corresponding target data
- This script combines data that has been updated, Deleted or is new, with corresponding target data
- View **checkmark_case_fact_new** is unioned to the target data filter to only those rows where changes have been detected
## View checkmark_case_fact_changed_rows is created

%%sql

-- Create new and updated dataset

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW checkmark_case_fact_changed_rows

    AS

-- gets updated, deleted and new rows 

Select 
    CaseID, -- surrogate 
    DocumentsID,
    CaseReference, -- source system id
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
From checkmark_case_fact_new WHERE HistoricIsActive = 'Y' or HistoricIsActive IS NULL

    UNION ALL

-- gets original versions of updated rows so we can update EndDate and set IsActive flag to 'N'

SELECT
    CaseID, -- surrogate 
    DocumentsID,
    CaseReference, -- source system id
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_case_fact
WHERE CaseReference IN (SELECT CaseReference FROM checkmark_case_fact_new WHERE CaseID IS NULL) AND IsActive = 'Y';

# View checkmark_case_fact_changed_rows is used in a merge (Upsert) statement into the target table
- **WHEN MATCHED** ON the Business Key (i.e. Pers_No from SAP HR), EndDate is set to today -1 day and the IsActive flag is set to 'N'
- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the business key, insert rows
## Table checkmark_case_fact.employee_dim is updated

%%sql
-- merge into fact table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_case_fact AS Target
USING checkmark_case_fact_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.CaseReference = Target.CaseReference

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.ValidTo = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;

# Fix the IDs
- No auto-increment feature is available in delta tables, therefore we need to create new IDs for the inserted rows
- This is done by select the target data and using INSERT OVERWRITE to re-insert the data is a new Row Number
## Table odw_harmonised.checkmark_case_fact is updated

%%sql
-- Insert new CaseID

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_case_fact

SELECT 
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CaseID NULLS LAST) AS CaseID, -- surrogate key
    DocumentsID,
    CaseReference, -- source system id
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_case_fact;

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (sap hr) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_case_reading_case_bridge)
- **New Data:** where a Pers_No in the source does not exist as an EmployeeNumber in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Pers_No in source and EmployeeNumber in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an EmployeeNumber in the target exists but the same Pers_No doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View checkmark_case_reading_case_bridge_new is created

%%sql  

-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW checkmark_case_reading_case_bridge_new 

    AS

-- gets data that matches of CaseReference and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.CaseReference IS NULL
        THEN T5.ReadingCaseBridgeID
        ELSE NULL
    END as ReadingCaseBridgeID, -- surrogate
    T6.ReadingCaseID,
    T1.CaseID,
    T1.CaseReference,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.CaseReference,'.'),IFNULL(T1.CaseID,'.'),IFNULL(T6.ReadingCaseID,'.'))) AS RowID,
    'Y' AS IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.CaseReference = T5.CaseReference AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.CaseReference,'.'),IFNULL(T1.CaseID,'.'),IFNULL(T6.ReadingCaseID,'.'))) <> T5.RowID-- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T5.CaseReference IS NULL -- new comment
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.CaseReference IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T1.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_case_fact T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_case_reading_case_bridge T5 ON T1.CaseReference = T5.CaseReference AND T5.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_reading_case_fact T6 ON T1.CaseReference = T6.CaseReference AND T6.IsActive = 'Y'


WHERE
    (
        
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.CaseReference = T5.CaseReference AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.CaseReference,'.'),IFNULL(T1.CaseID,'.'),IFNULL(T6.ReadingCaseID,'.'))) <> T5.RowID    -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T5.CaseReference IS NULL -- new employee
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.CaseReference IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    )

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (checkmark) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.comment_fact)
- **New Data:** where a CasemarkingID in the source does not exist as an id in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on CasemarkingID in source and id in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an id in the target exists but the same CasemarkingID doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View comment_type_reference_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build comment_type_reference_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW casemarking_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN T3.CasemarkingDimID
        ELSE NULL
    END AS CasemarkingDimID, -- surrogate key

    T1.id AS CasemarkingID,
    T1.case_reference AS CaseReference,
    T1.overall_mark AS OverallMark,
    T1.amendments_timeliness_mark AS AmendmentsTimeliness,
    T1.complexity AS Complexity,
    T1.conditions_mark AS ConditionsMark,
    T1.conditions_detail AS ConditionsDetail,
    T1.coverage_mark AS CoverageMark,
    T1.coverage_detail AS CoverageDetail,
    T1.ground_a_mark AS GroundAMark,
    T1.ground_a_iit_level AS GroundAIITLevel,
    T1.invalid_nullity AS InvalidNullity,
    T1.invalid_nullity_mark AS InvalidNullityMark,
    T1.legal_grounds_mark AS LegalGroundsMark,
    T1.legal_grounds_considered AS LegalGroundsConsidered,
    T1.non_legal_grounds_mark AS NonLegalGroundsMark,
    T1.non_legal_grounds_considered AS NonLegalGroundsConsidered,
    T1.other_grounds_affecting_complexity AS OtherGroundsAffectingComplexity,
    T1.outcome AS Outcome,
    T1.overall_case_level_for_iit_progression AS OverallCaseLevelForIITProgression,
    T1.presentation_accuracy_mark AS PresentationAccuracyMark,
    T1.presentation_accuracy_detail AS PresentationAccuracyDetail,
    T1.structure_reasoning_mark AS StructureReasoningMark,
    T1.structure_reasoning_detail AS StructureReasoningDetail,
    T1.timeliness_mark AS TimelinessMark,
    T1.reading_complete_notification_needed AS ReadingCompleteNotificationNeeded,    
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID, -- NOT CORRECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.overall_mark,'.'),IFNULL(T1.amendments_timeliness_mark,'.'),IFNULL(T1.complexity,'.'),IFNULL(T1.outcome,'.'))) AS RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id = T3.CasemarkingID AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.overall_mark,'.'),IFNULL(T1.amendments_timeliness_mark,'.'),IFNULL(T1.complexity,'.'),IFNULL(T1.outcome,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.CasemarkingID IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData,
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM casemarking_grouped T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Checkmark" = T2.Description
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_casemarking_dim T3 ON T1.id = T3.CasemarkingID and T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (-- flags new data        
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.ID = T3.CasemarkingID AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.overall_mark,'.'),IFNULL(T1.amendments_timeliness_mark,'.'),IFNULL(T1.complexity,'.'),IFNULL(T1.outcome,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T3.CasemarkingID IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        -- flags deleted data
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.id IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )

# Run tests to check integrity of data by numbers
- This script checks for the total number of current codes in the harmonised table, and compare against the numbers for new data to be added and data to be set as inactive.
- **Changes tracking:** where it checks the data against active records in harmonised and compares with records to add and records to be set as inactive.
- **Changes tolerance levels:** if the total amount to be added and deleted surpasses the tolerance limit, it will interrupt the proces of loading the data

## View SXO_dim_changed_rows is created

%%sql
-- Create new and updated dataset

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY  VIEW casemarking_dim_changed_rows

    AS

-- gets updated, deleted and new rows 

Select 
    CasemarkingDimID, -- surrogate key
    CasemarkingID,
    CaseReference,
    OverallMark,
    AmendmentsTimeliness,
    Complexity,
    ConditionsMark,
    ConditionsDetail,
    CoverageMark,
    CoverageDetail,
    GroundAMark,
    GroundAIITLevel,
    InvalidNullity,
    InvalidNullityMark,
    LegalGroundsMark,
    LegalGroundsConsidered,
    NonLegalGroundsMark,
    NonLegalGroundsConsidered,
    OtherGroundsAffectingComplexity,
    Outcome,
    OverallCaseLevelForIITProgression,
    PresentationAccuracyMark,
    PresentationAccuracyDetail,
    StructureReasoningMark,
    StructureReasoningDetail,
    TimelinessMark,
    ReadingCompleteNotificationNeeded,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
From casemarking_dim_new WHERE HistoricIsActive = 'Y' or HistoricIsActive IS NULL

    UNION ALL

-- gets original versions of updated rows so we can update EndDate and set IsActive flag to 'N'

SELECT
    CasemarkingDimID, -- surrogate key
    CasemarkingID,
    CaseReference,
    OverallMark,
    AmendmentsTimeliness,
    Complexity,

    StructureReasoningMark,
    StructureReasoningDetail,
    TimelinessMark,
    ReadingCompleteNotificationNeeded,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive  
FROM odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_casemarking_dim
WHERE CaseReference IN (SELECT CaseReference FROM casemarking_dim_new WHERE CasemarkingID IS NULL)
AND IsActive = 'Y';

- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the business key, insert rows

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (sap hr) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_casemarking_fact)
- **New Data:** where a Pers_No in the source does not exist as an EmployeeNumber in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Pers_No in source and EmployeeNumber in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an EmployeeNumber in the target exists but the same Pers_No doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View checkmark_casemarking_fact_new is created

%%sql  

-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW checkmark_casemarking_fact_new 

    AS

-- gets data that matches of CaseReference and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.CaseReference IS NULL
        THEN T5.CasemarkingFactID
        ELSE NULL
    END as CasemarkingFactID, -- surrogate 
    T1.CasemarkingDimID,
    
    T1.InvalidNullity AS InvalidNullityReferenceID,
    T1.StructureReasoningDetail AS StructureReasoningReferenceID,
    T1.Complexity AS ComplexityReferenceID,
    T1.PresentationAccuracyDetail AS PresentationAccuracyReferenceID,
    T1.Outcome AS OutcomeReferenceID,
    T1.GroundAIITLevel AS GroundsReferenceID,
    T1.ConditionsDetail AS ConditionsReferenceID,
    T1.CoverageDetail AS CoverageReferenceID ,
    T1.CaseReference, -- source system id
    
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.CaseReference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.InvalidNullity ,'.'),IFNULL(T1.StructureReasoningDetail,'.'),IFNULL(T1.Complexity,'.'),IFNULL(T1.PresentationAccuracyDetail,'.'),IFNULL(T1.Outcome,'.'),IFNULL(T1.GroundAIITLevel,'.'),IFNULL(T1.ConditionsDetail,'.'),IFNULL(T1.CoverageDetail,'.'))) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.CaseReference = T5.CaseReference AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.CaseReference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.InvalidNullity ,'.'),IFNULL(T1.StructureReasoningDetail,'.'),IFNULL(T1.Complexity,'.'),IFNULL(T1.PresentationAccuracyDetail,'.'),IFNULL(T1.Outcome,'.'),IFNULL(T1.GroundAIITLevel,'.'),IFNULL(T1.ConditionsDetail,'.'),IFNULL(T1.CoverageDetail,'.'))) <> T5.RowID-- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T5.CaseReference IS NULL -- new comment
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.CaseReference IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T1.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_casemarking_dim T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_casemarking_fact T5 ON T1.CaseReference = T5.CaseReference AND T1.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_invalid_nullity_reference_dim TINV ON TINV.InvalidNullityReferenceID = T5.InvalidNullityReferenceID AND T5.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_structure_reasoning_detail_reference_dim TSRRD ON TSRRD.StructureReasoningDetailReferenceID = T5.StructureReasoningReferenceID AND T5.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_complexity_reference_dim TCOMP ON TCOMP.ComplexityReferenceID = T5.ComplexityReferenceID AND T5.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_presentation_accuracy_detail_reference_dim TPADR ON TPADR.PresentationAccuracyDetailReferenceID = T5.PresentationAccuracyReferenceID AND T5.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_outcome_reference_dim TOR ON TOR.OutcomeReferenceID = T5.OutcomeReferenceID AND T5.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_grounds_reference_dim TGR ON TGR.GroundsReferenceID = T5.GroundsReferenceID AND T5.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_conditions_reference_dim TCON ON TCON.ConditionsReferenceID = T5.ConditionsReferenceID AND T5.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_coverage_reference_dim TCOV ON TCOV.CoverageReferenceID = T5.CoverageReferenceID AND T5.IsActive = 'Y'



WHERE
    (
        
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.CaseReference = T5.CaseReference AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.CaseReference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.InvalidNullity ,'.'),IFNULL(T1.StructureReasoningDetail,'.'),IFNULL(T1.Complexity,'.'),IFNULL(T1.PresentationAccuracyDetail,'.'),IFNULL(T1.Outcome,'.'),IFNULL(T1.GroundAIITLevel,'.'),IFNULL(T1.ConditionsDetail,'.'),IFNULL(T1.CoverageDetail,'.'))) <> T5.RowID    -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T5.CaseReference IS NULL -- new employee
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.CaseReference IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    )

From checkmark_casemarking_fact_new WHERE HistoricIsActive = 'Y' or HistoricIsActive IS NULL

SELECT

    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_casemarking_fact
WHERE CaseReference IN (SELECT CaseReference FROM checkmark_casemarking_fact_new WHERE CasemarkingFactID IS NULL) AND IsActive = 'Y';

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (checkmark) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.comment_fact)
- **New Data:** where a TypeId in the source does not exist as an id in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on TypeId in source and id in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an id in the target exists but the same TypeId doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View comment_type_reference_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build comment_state_reference_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW comment_state_reference_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN T3.CommentStateReferenceID
        ELSE NULL
    END AS CommentStateReferenceID, -- surrogate key
    T1.id AS StateID,
    T1.value AS Value,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID, -- NOT CORRECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) AS RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id = T3.StateID AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.StateID IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData,
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM comment_state_reference_grouped T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Checkmark" = T2.Description
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_comment_state_reference_dim T3 ON T1.id = T3.StateID and T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (-- flags new data        
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.ID = T3.StateID AND md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T3.StateID IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        -- flags deleted data
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.id IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (checkmark) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.comment_fact)
- **New Data:** where a TypeId in the source does not exist as an id in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on TypeId in source and id in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an id in the target exists but the same TypeId doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View comment_type_reference_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build comment_type_reference_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW comment_type_reference_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN T3.CommentTypeReferenceID
        ELSE NULL
    END AS CommentTypeReferenceID, -- surrogate key
    T1.id AS TypeID,
    T1.value AS Value,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID, -- NOT CORRECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) AS RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id = T3.TypeID AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.TypeID IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData,
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM comment_type_reference_grouped T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Checkmark" = T2.Description
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_comment_type_reference_dim T3 ON T1.id = T3.TypeID and T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (-- flags new data        
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.ID = T3.TypeID AND md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T3.TypeID IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        -- flags deleted data
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.id IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (sap hr) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_comments_case_bridge)
- **New Data:** where a Pers_No in the source does not exist as an EmployeeNumber in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Pers_No in source and EmployeeNumber in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an EmployeeNumber in the target exists but the same Pers_No doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View checkmark_comments_case_bridge_new is created

%%sql  

-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW checkmark_comments_case_bridge_new 

    AS

-- gets data that matches of CaseReference and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.CaseReference IS NULL
        THEN T5.CommentsCaseBridgeID
        ELSE NULL
    END as CommentsCaseBridgeID, -- surrogate 
    T1.CommentsID,
    T6.CaseID,
    T1.StateReferenceID,
    T1.TypeReferenceID,
    T1.CaseReference,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.CaseReference,'.'),IFNULL(T1.CommentsID,'.'),IFNULL(T1.StateReferenceID,'.'),IFNULL(T1.TypeReferenceID,'.'))) AS RowID,
    'Y' AS IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.CaseReference = T5.CaseReference AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.CaseReference,'.'),IFNULL(T1.CommentsID,'.'),IFNULL(T1.StateReferenceID,'.'),IFNULL(T1.TypeReferenceID,'.'))) <> T5.RowID-- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T5.CaseReference IS NULL -- new comment
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.CaseReference IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T1.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_comments_fact T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_comments_case_bridge T5 ON T1.CaseReference = T5.CaseReference AND T5.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_case_fact T6 ON T1.CaseReference = T6.CaseReference AND T6.IsActive = 'Y'


WHERE
    (
        
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.CaseReference = T5.CaseReference AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.CaseReference,'.'),IFNULL(T1.CommentsID,'.'),IFNULL(T1.StateReferenceID,'.'),IFNULL(T1.TypeReferenceID,'.'))) <> T5.RowID    -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T5.CaseReference IS NULL -- new employee
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.CaseReference IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    )

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (checkmark) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.comment_fact)
- **New Data:** where a CommentsID in the source does not exist as an id in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on CommentsID in source and id in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an id in the target exists but the same CommentsID doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View comment_type_reference_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build comment_type_reference_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW comments_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN T3.CommentsDimID
        ELSE NULL
    END AS CommentsDimID, -- surrogate key
    T1.id AS CommentsID,
    T1.case_reference AS CaseReference,
    T1.type AS Type,
    T1.state AS State,
    T1.author AS Author,
    T1.comment AS Comment,
    T1.timestamp AS Timestamp,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID, -- NOT CORRECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.author,'.'),IFNULL(T1.case_reference,'.'),IFNULL(T1.comment,'.'),IFNULL(T1.timestamp,'.'))) AS RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id = T3.CommentsDimID AND md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.author,'.'),IFNULL(T1.case_reference,'.'),IFNULL(T1.comment,'.'),IFNULL(T1.timestamp,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.CommentsDimID IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData,
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM comments_grouped T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Checkmark" = T2.Description
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_comments_dim T3 ON T1.id = T3.CommentsDimID and T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (-- flags new data        
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.ID = T3.CommentsDimID AND md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.author,'.'),IFNULL(T1.case_reference,'.'),IFNULL(T1.comment,'.'),IFNULL(T1.timestamp,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T3.CommentsDimID IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        -- flags deleted data
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.id IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (sap hr) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_comments_fact)
- **New Data:** where a Pers_No in the source does not exist as an EmployeeNumber in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Pers_No in source and EmployeeNumber in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an EmployeeNumber in the target exists but the same Pers_No doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View checkmark_comments_fact_new is created

%%sql  

-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW checkmark_comments_fact_new 

    AS

-- gets data that matches of CaseReference and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T5.CaseReference IS NULL
        THEN T1.CommentsID
        ELSE NULL
    END as CommentsID, -- surrogate 
    T5.CommentsDimID,
    T5.CaseReference, -- source system id
    T5.State AS StateReferenceID,
    T5.Type AS TypeReferenceID,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.CaseReference,'.'), IFNULL(T5.State,'.'), IFNULL(T5.Type,'.'), IFNULL(T5.CaseReference,'.'))) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.CaseReference = T5.CaseReference AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.CaseReference,'.'), IFNULL(T5.State,'.'), IFNULL(T5.Type,'.'), IFNULL(T5.CaseReference,'.'))) <> T5.RowID    -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T5.CaseReference IS NULL -- new comment
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.CaseReference IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T5.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_comments_fact T1
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_comments_dim T5 ON T1.CaseReference = T5.CaseReference AND T5.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_comment_state_reference_dim T4 ON T1.StateReferenceID = T4.CommentStateReferenceID AND T4.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_comment_type_reference_dim T3 ON T1.TypeReferenceID = T3.CommentTypeReferenceID AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'


WHERE
    (
        
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.CaseReference = T5.CaseReference AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.CaseReference,'.'), IFNULL(T5.State,'.'), IFNULL(T5.Type,'.'), IFNULL(T5.CaseReference,'.'))) <> T5.RowID    -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T5.CaseReference IS NULL -- new employee
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.CaseReference IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    )

- **New Data:** where a ComplexityID in the source does not exist as an id in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'

## View comment_type_reference_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build comment_type_reference_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW complexity_reference_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN T3.ComplexityReferenceID
        ELSE NULL
    END AS ComplexityReferenceID, -- surrogate key
    T1.id AS ComplexityID,
    T1.value AS Value,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID, -- NOT CORRECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) AS RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id = T3.ComplexityID AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.ComplexityID IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData,
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM complexity_reference_grouped T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Checkmark" = T2.Description
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_complexity_reference_dim T3 ON T1.id = T3.ComplexityID and T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (-- flags new data        
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.ID = T3.ComplexityID AND md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T3.ComplexityID IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        -- flags deleted data
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.id IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )

- View **SXO_dim_new** is unioned to the target data filter to only those rows where changes have been detected
## View SXO_dim_changed_rows is created

%%sql
-- Create new and updated dataset

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY  VIEW complexity_reference_dim_changed_rows

    AS

-- gets updated, deleted and new rows 

Select
    ComplexityReferenceID,
    ComplexityID,
    Value, 
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
From complexity_reference_dim_new WHERE HistoricIsActive = 'Y' or HistoricIsActive IS NULL

    UNION ALL

-- gets original versions of updated rows so we can update EndDate and set IsActive flag to 'N'

SELECT
    ComplexityReferenceID,
    ComplexityID,
    Value,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_complexity_reference_dim
WHERE Value IN (SELECT Value FROM complexity_reference_dim_new WHERE ComplexityID IS NULL)
AND IsActive = 'Y';

# View SXO_dim_changed_rows is used in a merge (Upsert) statement into the target table
- **WHEN MATCHED** ON the Business Key (i.e. SxO from Personal Characteristics), EndDate is set to today -1 day and the IsActive flag is set to 'N'
- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the business key, insert rows
## Table odw_harmonised.SXO_dim is updated

%%sql

-- merge into fact table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_complexity_reference_dim AS Target
USING complexity_reference_dim_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.ComplexityID = Target.ComplexityID

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.ValidTo = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;

    ValidTo,

    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_complexity_reference_dim;

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (checkmark) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.comment_fact)
- **New Data:** where a ConditionsMarkID in the source does not exist as an id in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on ConditionsMarkID in source and id in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an id in the target exists but the same ConditionsMarkID doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View comment_type_reference_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build comment_type_reference_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW conditions_reference_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN T3.ConditionsReferenceID
        ELSE NULL
    END AS ConditionsReferenceID, -- surrogate key
    T1.id AS ConditionsMarkID,
    T1.value AS Value,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID, -- NOT CORRECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) AS RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id = T3.ConditionsMarkID AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.ConditionsMarkID IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData,
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM conditions_reference_grouped T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Checkmark" = T2.Description
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_conditions_reference_dim T3 ON T1.id = T3.ConditionsMarkID and T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (-- flags new data        
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.ID = T3.ConditionsMarkID AND md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T3.ConditionsMarkID IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        -- flags deleted data
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.id IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (checkmark) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.comment_fact)
- **New Data:** where a TypeId in the source does not exist as an id in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on TypeId in source and id in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an id in the target exists but the same TypeId doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View comment_type_reference_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build comment_state_reference_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW documents_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN T3.DocumentsReferenceID
        ELSE NULL
    END AS DocumentsReferenceID, -- surrogate key
    T1.id AS DocumentsID,
    T1.case_reference AS CaseReference,
    T1.document_type AS DocumentType,
    T1.previous_type AS PreviousType,
    T1.blob_url AS BlobURL,
    T1.filename AS Filename,
    T1.document_version AS DocumentVersion,
    T1.type_code AS TypeCode,
    T1.description AS Description,
    T1.key_points AS KeyPoints,
    T1.date_modified AS DateModified,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID, -- NOT CORRECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.case_reference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.document_type,'.'), IFNULL(T1.blob_url,'.'),IFNULL(T1.filename,'.'), IFNULL(T1.document_version,'.'), IFNULL(T1.description,'.'),IFNULL(T1.key_points,'.'))) AS RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id = T3.DocumentsID AND md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.case_reference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.document_type,'.'), IFNULL(T1.blob_url,'.'),IFNULL(T1.filename,'.'), IFNULL(T1.document_version,'.'), IFNULL(T1.description,'.'),IFNULL(T1.key_points,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.DocumentsID IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData,
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM documents_grouped T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Checkmark" = T2.Description
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_documents_dim T3 ON T1.id = T3.DocumentsID and T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (-- flags new data        
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.ID = T3.DocumentsID AND md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.case_reference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.document_type,'.'), IFNULL(T1.blob_url,'.'),IFNULL(T1.filename,'.'), IFNULL(T1.document_version,'.'), IFNULL(T1.description,'.'),IFNULL(T1.key_points,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T3.DocumentsID IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        -- flags deleted data
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.id IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )

            THEN 'Y'

- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on InspectorManagerID in source and id in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'

%%sql
-- Build comment_type_reference_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW inspector_manager_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN T3.InspectorManagerDimID
        ELSE NULL
    END AS InspectorManagerDimID, -- surrogate key
    T1.id AS InspectorManagerID,
    T1.email AS Email,
    T1.name AS Name,
    T1.type AS Type,
    T1.specialism AS Specialism,
    T1.report_list AS ReportList,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID, -- NOT CORRECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.email,'.'),IFNULL(T1.name,'.'))) AS RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id = T3.InspectorManagerID AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.email,'.'),IFNULL(T1.name,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.InspectorManagerID IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData,
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM inspector_manager_grouped T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Checkmark" = T2.Description
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_inspector_manager_dim T3 ON T1.id = T3.InspectorManagerID and T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (-- flags new data        
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.ID = T3.InspectorManagerID AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.email,'.'),IFNULL(T1.name,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T3.InspectorManagerID IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        -- flags deleted data
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.id IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )

# Dataset is created that contains changed data and corresponding target data
- This script combines data that has been updated, Deleted or is new, with corresponding target data
- View **SXO_dim_new** is unioned to the target data filter to only those rows where changes have been detected
## View SXO_dim_changed_rows is created

%%sql
-- Create new and updated dataset

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY  VIEW inspector_manager_dim_changed_rows

    AS

-- gets updated, deleted and new rows 

Select
    InspectorManagerDimID,
    InspectorManagerID,
    Email,
    Name,
    Type,
    Specialism,
    ReportList,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
From inspector_manager_dim_new WHERE HistoricIsActive = 'Y' or HistoricIsActive IS NULL

    UNION ALL

-- gets original versions of updated rows so we can update EndDate and set IsActive flag to 'N'

SELECT
    InspectorManagerDimID,
    InspectorManagerID,
    Email,
    Name,
    Type,
    Specialism,
    ReportList,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_inspector_manager_dim
WHERE Name IN (SELECT Name FROM inspector_manager_dim_new WHERE InspectorManagerID IS NULL)
AND IsActive = 'Y';

# View SXO_dim_changed_rows is used in a merge (Upsert) statement into the target table
- **WHEN MATCHED** ON the Business Key (i.e. SxO from Personal Characteristics), EndDate is set to today -1 day and the IsActive flag is set to 'N'
- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the business key, insert rows
## Table odw_harmonised.SXO_dim is updated

%%sql

-- merge into fact table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_inspector_manager_dim AS Target
USING inspector_manager_dim_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.InspectorManagerID = Target.InspectorManagerID

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.ValidTo = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (sap hr) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_inspector_manager_fact)
- **New Data:** where a Pers_No in the source does not exist as an EmployeeNumber in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Pers_No in source and EmployeeNumber in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an EmployeeNumber in the target exists but the same Pers_No doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View checkmark_inspector_manager_fact_new is created

%%sql  

-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW checkmark_inspector_manager_fact_new 

    AS

-- gets data that matches of InspectorManagerDimID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.InspectorManagerDimID IS NULL
        THEN T5.InspectorManagerFactID
        ELSE NULL
    END as InspectorManagerFactID, -- surrogate 
    T7.EmployeeID,
    T1.InspectorManagerDimID,
    T6.ManagerTypeReferenceID,

    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.InspectorManagerDimID,'.'),IFNULL(T7.EmployeeID,'.'),IFNULL(T1.InspectorManagerDimID,'.'),IFNULL(T6.ManagerTypeReferenceID,'.'))) AS RowID,
    'Y' AS IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.InspectorManagerDimID = T5.InspectorManagerDimID AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.InspectorManagerDimID,'.'),IFNULL(T7.EmployeeID,'.'),IFNULL(T1.InspectorManagerDimID,'.'),IFNULL(T6.ManagerTypeReferenceID,'.'))) <> T5.RowID-- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T5.InspectorManagerDimID IS NULL -- new comment
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.InspectorManagerDimID IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T1.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_inspector_manager_dim T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_inspector_manager_fact T5 ON T1.InspectorManagerDimID = T5.InspectorManagerDimID AND T5.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_manager_type_reference_dim T6 ON T1.Type = T6.ManagerTypeReferenceID AND T6.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_employee_dim T7 ON T1.Email = T7.EmailAddress AND T7.IsActive = 'Y'

WHERE
    (
        
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.InspectorManagerDimID = T5.InspectorManagerDimID AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.InspectorManagerDimID,'.'),IFNULL(T7.EmployeeID,'.'),IFNULL(T1.InspectorManagerDimID,'.'),IFNULL(T6.ManagerTypeReferenceID,'.'))) <> T5.RowID    -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T5.InspectorManagerDimID IS NULL -- new employee
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.InspectorManagerDimID IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    )

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (checkmark) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.comment_fact)
- **New Data:** where a InvalidNullityMarkID in the source does not exist as an id in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on InvalidNullityMarkID in source and id in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an id in the target exists but the same InvalidNullityMarkID doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View comment_type_reference_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build comment_type_reference_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW invalid_nullity_reference_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN T3.InvalidNullityReferenceID
        ELSE NULL
    END AS InvalidNullityReferenceID, -- surrogate key
    T1.id AS InvalidNullityMarkID,
    T1.value AS Value,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID, -- NOT CORRECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) AS RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id = T3.InvalidNullityMarkID AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.InvalidNullityMarkID IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData,
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM invalid_nullity_reference_grouped T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Checkmark" = T2.Description
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_invalid_nullity_reference_dim T3 ON T1.id = T3.InvalidNullityMarkID and T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (-- flags new data        
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.ID = T3.InvalidNullityMarkID AND md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T3.InvalidNullityMarkID IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        -- flags deleted data
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.id IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )

- **Changes tolerance levels:** if the total amount to be added and deleted surpasses the tolerance limit, it will interrupt the proces of loading the data

-- Build comment_type_reference_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

        THEN T3.ManagerTypeReferenceID
        ELSE NULL
    END AS ManagerTypeReferenceID, -- surrogate key
    T1.id AS InspectorManagerTypeID,
    T1.value AS Value,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID, -- NOT CORRECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) AS RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id = T3.InspectorManagerTypeID AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.InspectorManagerTypeID IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData,
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM manager_type_reference_grouped T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Checkmark" = T2.Description
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_manager_type_reference_dim T3 ON T1.id = T3.InspectorManagerTypeID and T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (-- flags new data

            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T3.InspectorManagerTypeID IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        -- flags deleted data
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.id IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )

## View SXO_dim_changed_rows is created

%%sql
-- Create new and updated dataset

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY  VIEW manager_type_reference_dim_changed_rows

    AS

-- gets updated, deleted and new rows 

Select
    ManagerTypeReferenceID,
    InspectorManagerTypeID,
    Value, 
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
From manager_type_reference_dim_new WHERE HistoricIsActive = 'Y' or HistoricIsActive IS NULL

    UNION ALL

-- gets original versions of updated rows so we can update EndDate and set IsActive flag to 'N'

SELECT
    ManagerTypeReferenceID,
    InspectorManagerTypeID,
    Value,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_manager_type_reference_dim
WHERE Value IN (SELECT Value FROM manager_type_reference_dim_new WHERE InspectorManagerTypeID IS NULL)
AND IsActive = 'Y';

# View SXO_dim_changed_rows is used in a merge (Upsert) statement into the target table
- **WHEN MATCHED** ON the Business Key (i.e. SxO from Personal Characteristics), EndDate is set to today -1 day and the IsActive flag is set to 'N'
- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the business key, insert rows
## Table odw_harmonised.SXO_dim is updated

%%sql

-- merge into fact table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_manager_type_reference_dim AS Target
USING manager_type_reference_dim_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.InspectorManagerTypeID = Target.InspectorManagerTypeID

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.ValidTo = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (checkmark) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.comment_fact)
- **New Data:** where a PresentationAccuracyDetailID in the source does not exist as an id in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on PresentationAccuracyDetailID in source and id in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an id in the target exists but the same PresentationAccuracyDetailID doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View comment_type_reference_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build comment_type_reference_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW presentation_accuracy_detail_reference_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN T3.PresentationAccuracyDetailReferenceID
        ELSE NULL
    END AS PresentationAccuracyDetailReferenceID, -- surrogate key
    T1.id AS PresentationAccuracyDetailID,
    T1.value AS Value,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID, -- NOT CORRECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) AS RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id = T3.PresentationAccuracyDetailID AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.PresentationAccuracyDetailID IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData,
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM presentation_accuracy_detail_reference_grouped T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Checkmark" = T2.Description
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_presentation_accuracy_detail_reference_dim T3 ON T1.id = T3.PresentationAccuracyDetailID and T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (-- flags new data        
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.ID = T3.PresentationAccuracyDetailID AND md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T3.PresentationAccuracyDetailID IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        -- flags deleted data
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.id IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (checkmark) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.comment_fact)
- **New Data:** where a TypeId in the source does not exist as an id in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on TypeId in source and id in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an id in the target exists but the same TypeId doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View comment_type_reference_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build reading_case_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW reading_case_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.case_reference IS NULL
        THEN T3.ReadingCaseID
        ELSE NULL
    END AS ReadingCaseID, -- surrogate key
    T1.case_reference AS CaseReference,
    T1.inspector_email AS InspectorEmail,
    T1.inspector_name AS InspectorName,
    T1.reader_email AS ReaderEmail,
    T1.reader_name AS ReaderName,
    T1.case_level AS CaseLevel,
    T1.date_submitted_by_inspector AS DateSubmittedByInspector,
    T1.event_date AS EventDate,
    T1.type_of_reading AS TypeOfReading,
    T1.procedure AS Procedure,
    T1.case_target_date AS CaseTargetDate,
    T1.reading_status AS ReadingStatus,
    T1.able_to_read_decision AS AbleToReadDecision,
    T1.advertisement AS Advertisement,
    T1.appeal_against_conditions AS AppealAgainstConditions,
    T1.bespoke AS Bespoke,
    T1.case_team_officer_email AS CaseTeamOfficerEmail,
    T1.case_team_officer_name AS CaseTeamOfficerName,
    T1.costs_decision AS CostsDecision,
    T1.green_belt AS GreenBelt,
    T1.kiosk AS Kiosk,
    T1.linked AS Linked,
    T1.neighbourhood_plan AS NeibourhoodPlan,
    T1.nsi_email AS NSIEmail,
    T1.nsi_name AS NSIName,
    T1.prior_approval AS PriorApproval,
    T1.reason_for_delay AS ReasonForDelay,
    T1.redetermination AS Redetermination,
    T1.secretary_of_state_report AS SecretaryOfStateReport,
    T1.spa_sac_eps AS SPASACEPS,
    T1.special_category_data AS SpecialCategoryData,
    T1.specialisms AS Specialisms,
    T1.telecommunications AS Telecommunications,
    T1.urgent AS Urgent,
    T1.amendments_received_notification_needed AS AmendmentsReceivedNotificationsNeeded,
    T1.able_to_check_amendments AS AbleToCheckAmendments,
    T1.amendments_cycles AS AmendmentsCycles,
    T1.amendments_target_date AS AmendmentsTargetDate,
    T1.amendments_timeliness_review_flag AS AmendmentsTimelineReviewFlag,
    T1.date_amendments_checked AS DateAmendmentsChecked,
    T1.date_amendments_received AS DateAmendmentsReceived,
    T1.date_cleared AS DateCleared,
    T1.date_decision_sent_for_issue AS DateDecisionSentForIssue,
    T1.date_read AS DateRead,
    T1.date_read_started AS DateReadStarted,
    T1.decision_read AS DecisionRead,
    T1.delayed_amendments_submission AS DelayedAmendmentsSubmission,
    T1.delayed_submission AS DelayedSubmission,
    T1.document_version AS DocumentVersion,
    T1.document_version_needed AS DocumentVersionNeeded,
    T1.final_decision_notification_needed AS FinalDecisionNotificationNeeded,
    T1.notification_sent_flag AS NotificationSentFlag,
    T1.on_hold_notification_needed AS OnHoldNotificationNeeded,
    T1.on_hold_status AS OnHoldStatus,
    T1.reading_complete_notification_needed AS ReadingCompleteNotificationNeeded,
    T1.reading_needed_flag AS ReadingNeededFlag,
    T1.ready_for_issue AS ReadyForIssue,
    T1.reason_for_amendments_delay AS ReasonForAmendmentsDelay,
    T1.recall_notification_needed AS RecallNotificationNeeded,
    T1.replacement_decision_flag AS ReplacementDecisionFlag,
    T1.return_count AS ReturnCount,
    T1.revised_decision_notification_needed AS RevisedDecisionNotificationNeeded,
    T1.skim_read AS SkimRead,
    T1.source AS Source,
    T1.timeliness_review_flag AS TimelinessReviewFlag,
    T1.date_modified AS DateModified,


    T2.SourceSystemID AS SourceSystemID, -- NOT CORRECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.case_reference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.reader_email,'.'), IFNULL(T1.reader_name,'.'))) AS RowID,
    'Y' AS IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.case_reference = T3.CaseReference AND md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.case_reference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.reader_email,'.'), IFNULL(T1.reader_name,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.CaseReference IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.case_reference IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData,
    T3.IsActive AS HistoricIsActive

FROM reading_case_grouped T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Checkmark" = T2.Description
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_reading_case_dim T3 ON T1.case_reference = T3.CaseReference and T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (-- flags new data        
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.case_reference = T3.CaseReference AND md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.case_reference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.reader_email,'.'), IFNULL(T1.reader_name,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T3.CaseReference IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        -- flags deleted data
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.case_reference IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )

# View SXO_dim_changed_rows is used in a merge (Upsert) statement into the target table
- **WHEN MATCHED** ON the Business Key (i.e. SxO from Personal Characteristics), EndDate is set to today -1 day and the IsActive flag is set to 'N'
- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the business key, insert rows
## Table odw_harmonised.SXO_dim is updated

%%sql

-- merge into fact table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_reading_case_dim AS Target
USING reading_case_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.CaseReference = Target.CaseReference

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.ValidTo = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (sap hr) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_comments_fact)
- **New Data:** where a Pers_No in the source does not exist as an EmployeeNumber in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Pers_No in source and EmployeeNumber in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an EmployeeNumber in the target exists but the same Pers_No doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View checkmark_case_reading_case_bridge__new is created

%%sql  

-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW checkmark_case_reading_case_bridge_new 

    AS

-- gets data that matches of CaseReference and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    T1.CommentsDimID,
    T1.CaseReference, -- source system id
    T1.StateReferenceID,
    T1.TypeReferenceID,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.CaseReference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.StateReferenceID,'.'), IFNULL(T1.TypeReferenceID,'.'))) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.CaseReference = T1.CaseReference AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.CaseReference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.StateReferenceID,'.'), IFNULL(T1.TypeReferenceID,'.'))) <> T1.RowID    -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T1.CaseReference IS NULL -- new comment
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.CaseReference IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T1.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_case_reading_case_bridge T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_reading_case_fact T3 ON T3.ReadingCaseID = T1.ReadingCaseID and T3.IsActive= 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_case_fact T4 ON T4.CaseID = T1.CaseID and T4.IsActive= 'Y'

WHERE
    (
        
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.CaseReference = T1.CaseReference AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.CaseReference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.StateReferenceID,'.'), IFNULL(T1.TypeReferenceID,'.'))) <> T1.RowID    -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T1.CaseReference IS NULL -- new employee
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.CaseReference IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    )
