# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (sap hr) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_comments_fact)
- **New Data:** where a Pers_No in the source does not exist as an EmployeeNumber in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Pers_No in source and EmployeeNumber in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an EmployeeNumber in the target exists but the same Pers_No doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View checkmark_reading_case_fact_new is created

%%sql  

-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW checkmark_reading_case_fact_new 

    AS

-- gets data that matches of ReadingCaseID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T5.ReadingCaseID IS NULL
        THEN T1.ReadingCaseFactID
        ELSE NULL
    END as ReadingCaseFactID, -- surrogate 
    T5.ReadingCaseID, -- source system id
    T5.CaseLevel AS LevelReferenceID,
    TNSI.NSIID,
    T5.Source AS SourceReferenceID,
    T5.TypeOfReading AS ReadingTypeReferenceID,
    T5.ReadingStatus AS ReadingStatusReferenceID,
    T5.Procedure AS ProcedureReferenceID,
    T5.CaseReference,
    
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.ReadingCaseID,'.'), IFNULL(T5.CaseLevel,'.'), IFNULL(    TNSI.NSIID,'.'), IFNULL(T5.Source,'.'),IFNULL(T5.TypeOfReading,'.'),IFNULL(T5.ReadingStatus,'.'),IFNULL(T5.Procedure,'.'),IFNULL(T5.CaseReference,'.'))) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.ReadingCaseID = T5.ReadingCaseID AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.ReadingCaseID,'.'), IFNULL(T5.CaseLevel,'.'), IFNULL(    TNSI.NSIID,'.'), IFNULL(T5.Source,'.'),IFNULL(T5.TypeOfReading,'.'),IFNULL(T5.ReadingStatus,'.'),IFNULL(T5.Procedure,'.'),IFNULL(T5.CaseReference,'.'))) <> T5.RowID    -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T5.ReadingCaseID IS NULL -- new comment
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.ReadingCaseID IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T5.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_reading_case_fact T1
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_reading_case_dim T5 ON T1.ReadingCaseID = T5.ReadingCaseID AND T5.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_level_reference_dim TLR ON TLR.LevelReferenceID = T1.LevelReferenceID AND TLR.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_source_reference_dim TSR ON TSR.SourceReferenceID = T1.SourceReferenceID AND TSR.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_reading_type_reference_dim TRTR ON TRTR.ReadingTypeReferenceID = T1.ReadingTypeReferenceID AND TRTR.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_reading_status_reference_dim TRSR ON TRSR.ReadingStatusReferenceID = T1.ReadingStatusReferenceID AND TRSR.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_procedure_reference_dim TPR ON TPR.ProcedureReferenceID = T1.ProcedureReferenceID AND TLR.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_nsi_dim TNSI ON TNSI.Email = T5.NSIEmail AND TNSI.IsActive = 'Y'

WHERE
    (
        
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.ReadingCaseID = T5.ReadingCaseID AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.ReadingCaseID,'.'), IFNULL(T5.CaseLevel,'.'), IFNULL(    TNSI.NSIID,'.'), IFNULL(T5.Source,'.'),IFNULL(T5.TypeOfReading,'.'),IFNULL(T5.ReadingStatus,'.'),IFNULL(T5.Procedure,'.'),IFNULL(T5.CaseReference,'.'))) <> T5.RowID    -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T5.ReadingCaseID IS NULL -- new employee
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.ReadingCaseID IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    )

%%sql
-- Build comment_type_reference_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW reading_status_reference_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of ReadingStatusID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN T3.ReadingStatusReferenceID
        ELSE NULL
    END AS ReadingStatusReferenceID, -- surrogate key
    T1.id AS ReadingStatusID,
    T1.value AS Value,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID, -- NOT CORRECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) AS RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id = T3.ReadingStatusID AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.ReadingStatusID IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData,
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM reading_status_reference_grouped T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Checkmark" = T2.Description
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_reading_status_reference_dim T3 ON T1.id = T3.ReadingStatusID and T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (-- flags new data        
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.ID = T3.ReadingStatusID AND md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T3.ReadingStatusID IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        -- flags deleted data
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.id IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )

%%sql
-- Create new and updated dataset

    AS

-- gets updated, deleted and new rows 

Select
    ReadingTypeReferenceID,
    ReadingTypeID,
    Value, 
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,

From reading_type_reference_dim_new WHERE HistoricIsActive = 'Y' or HistoricIsActive IS NULL

    UNION ALL

-- gets original versions of updated rows so we can update EndDate and set IsActive flag to 'N'

SELECT
    ReadingTypeReferenceID,
    ReadingTypeID,
    Value,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,

WHERE Value IN (SELECT Value FROM reading_type_reference_dim_new WHERE ReadingTypeID IS NULL)

# View SXO_dim_changed_rows is used in a merge (Upsert) statement into the target table
- **WHEN MATCHED** ON the Business Key (i.e. SxO from Personal Characteristics), EndDate is set to today -1 day and the IsActive flag is set to 'N'
- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the business key, insert rows

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (checkmark) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.comment_fact)
- **New Data:** where a SourceID in the source does not exist as an id in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on SourceID in source and id in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an id in the target exists but the same SourceID doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View comment_type_reference_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build comment_type_reference_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW source_reference_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN T3.SourceReferenceID
        ELSE NULL
    END AS SourceReferenceID, -- surrogate key
    T1.id AS SourceID,
    T1.value AS Value,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID, -- NOT CORRECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) AS RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id = T3.SourceID AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.SourceID IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData,
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM source_reference_grouped T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Checkmark" = T2.Description
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.checkmark_source_reference_dim T3 ON T1.id = T3.SourceID and T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (-- flags new data        
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.ID = T3.SourceID AND md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.value,'.'))) <> T3.RowID
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T3.SourceID IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        -- flags deleted data
        (CASE
            WHEN T1.id IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )

- **Changes tolerance levels:** if the total amount to be added and deleted surpasses the tolerance limit, it will interrupt the proces of loading the data

# Employee Publish
Checks the Service Bus for topics last accessed timestamp, gets all changes from the Change Data Feed and sends each record to the service bus topic. 
See https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/samples/azure/azure-sdk-for-python/servicebus-samples/ for servicebus samples
## Sets the notebook variables

secret_name="servicebus-connectionstring"
kv_linked_service="ls_kv"
topic_name="employee"
table_name="odw_curated_db.employee"
custom_props_attributes=["_change_type"]
## Get Servicebus connectionstring from Key Vault

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()
akv_name=spark.sparkContext.environment.get('keyVaultName', 'get')
from notebookutils import mssparkutils
conn_str = mssparkutils.credentials.getSecret(akv_name, secret_name, kv_linked_service)
## Get Topic Accessed At timestamp

from azure.servicebus.management import ServiceBusAdministrationClient
with ServiceBusAdministrationClient.from_connection_string(conn_str) as servicebus_mgmt_client:
    topic_accessed_at=get_topic_accessed_at(servicebus_mgmt_client)
print(topic_accessed_at)
## Check the table history
%%sql
DESCRIBE HISTORY odw_curated_db.employee
## Get the latest changes from CDF and send messages

from azure.servicebus import ServiceBusClient, ServiceBusMessage
servicebus_client = ServiceBusClient.from_connection_string(conn_str=conn_str, logging_enable=True)

try:
    cdf_df=(spark.read.format("delta")
        .option("readChangeFeed", "true")
        .option("startingTimestamp", topic_accessed_at)
        .table(table_name))
    cdf_df=cdf_df.filter("_change_type != 'update_preimage'") #CDF provides preimage and postimage records
    with servicebus_client:
        sender = servicebus_client.get_topic_sender(topic_name=topic_name)
        with sender:
            df_json = cdf_df.toJSON()
            row_count=df_json.count()
            for row in df_json.collect(): 
                send_single_message(sender,row,custom_props_attributes)
            print("Sent {} messages.".format(row_count))

except Exception as e:  
        print(f"{e}")

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (hr_record_fact) against the target (odw_curated_db.employee)
- **New Data:** where an EmployeeID in the source does not exist as an EmployeeID in the target, data is inserted
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on EmployeeID in source and EmployeeID in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns, data is updated
- **Deleted data:** where an EmployeeID in the target exists but the same EmployeeID doesn't exist in the source, data is deleted

# View employee_new is used in a merge (Upsert) statement into the target table
- **WHEN MATCHED** ON the Business Key (i.e. EmployeeID), update rows
- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the business key, insert rows
## Table odw_harmonised.employee_dim is updated

%%sql

-- merge into employee table

MERGE INTO odw_curated_db.employee AS Target
USING employee_new AS Source

ON Source.EmployeeID = Target.EmployeeID

WHEN MATCHED AND Source.RowID<>Target.RowID
    THEN
    UPDATE SET *
WHEN NOT MATCHED
    THEN
    INSERT *

# absence_dim
# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data view (vw_absences) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.absence_dim)
- **New Data:** where a PA in the source does not exist as an EmployeeID in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on PA in source and EmployeeID in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an EmployeeID in the target exists but the same PA doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View absence_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build absence_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW absence_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Staff_Number IS NULL
        THEN T3.AbsenceID
        ELSE NULL
    END as AbsenceID, -- surrogate key
    T3.ROWID as a,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.Staff_Number,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Attendance_or_Absence_Type,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Start_Date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.End_Date,'.'))) as b,
    T1.Staff_Number AS EmployeeID,
    T1.Attendance_or_Absence_Type AS AbsenceType,
    T1.Sickness_Group AS SicknessGroup,
    T1.Start_Date AS AbsenceStartDate,
    T1.End_Date AS AbsenceEndDate,
    T1.Days as Days,
    T1.hrs AS Hours,
    T1.Cal_Days as CalendarDays,
    T4.WorkScheduleID as WorkScheduleID,
    T1.Annual_Leave_Start AS AnnualLeaveStart,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.Staff_Number,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Attendance_or_Absence_Type,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Start_Date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.End_Date,'.'))) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Attendance_or_Absence_Type = T3.AbsenceType AND 
                T1.Start_Date = T3.AbsenceStartDate AND 
                T1.End_Date = T3.AbsenceEndDate AND 
                md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.Staff_Number,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Attendance_or_Absence_Type,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Start_Date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.End_Date,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.EmployeeID IS NULL -- new employee
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Staff_Number IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM absence_dim_new_non_null T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_work_schedule_dim T4 ON T4.WorkScheduleRule = T1.Work_Schedule_Rule AND 
                                                        T4.WorkWeekDays = T1.WkDys AND 
                                                        T4.WorkWeekHours = T1.Wk_hrs AND   
                                                        T4.WorkDayHours = T1.Hrs_Day
                                                        AND T4.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_absence_dim T3 ON T1.Staff_Number = T3.EmployeeID AND 
                                                T1.Attendance_or_Absence_Type = T3.AbsenceType AND 
                                                T1.Start_Date = T3.AbsenceStartDate AND 
                                                T1.End_Date = T3.AbsenceEndDate
                                                AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.Staff_Number = T3.EmployeeID AND 
                    T1.Attendance_or_Absence_Type = T3.AbsenceType AND 
                    T1.Start_Date = T3.AbsenceStartDate AND 
                    T1.End_Date = T3.AbsenceEndDate AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.Staff_Number,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Attendance_or_Absence_Type,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Start_Date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.End_Date,'.'))) <> T3.RowID    -- same employee, changed data
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T3.EmployeeID IS NULL -- new employee
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.Staff_Number IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )

# Dataset is created that contains changed data and corresponding target data
- This script combines data that has been updated, Deleted or is new, with corresponding target data
- View **absence_dim_new** is unioned to the target data filter to only those rows where changes have been detected
## View absence_dim_changed_rows is created

%%sql
-- Creating new and updated dataset

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW absence_dim_changed_rows

    AS

SELECT 
    AbsenceID,
    EmployeeID,
    AbsenceType,
    SicknessGroup,
    AbsenceStartDate,
    AbsenceEndDate,
    Days,
    Hours,
    CalendarDays,
    WorkScheduleID,
    AnnualLeaveStart,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM absence_dim_new T5 WHERE HistoricIsActive = 'Y' or HistoricIsActive IS NULL

    UNION ALL

SELECT
    T4.AbsenceID,
    T4.EmployeeID,
    T4.AbsenceType,
    T4.SicknessGroup,
    T4.AbsenceStartDate,
    T4.AbsenceEndDate,
    T4.Days,
    T4.Hours,
    T4.CalendarDays,
    T4.WorkScheduleID,
    T4.AnnualLeaveStart,
    T4.SourceSystemID,
    T4.IngestionDate,
    T4.ValidTo,
    T4.RowID,
    T4.IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.hr_absence_dim T4
INNER JOIN absence_dim_new T5 ON T4.EmployeeID = T5.EmployeeID AND T4.AbsenceType = T5.AbsenceType AND
 T4.AbsenceStartDate = T5.AbsenceStartDate AND T4.AbsenceEndDate = T5.AbsenceEndDate AND 
 T5.AbsenceID IS NULL AND T5.IsActive = 'Y'

# View absence_dim_changed_rows is used in a merge (Upsert) statement into the target table
- **WHEN MATCHED** ON the Business Key (i.e. Staff_Number from vw_absences), EndDate is set to today -1 day and the IsActive flag is set to 'N'
- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the business key, insert rows
## Table odw_harmonised.absence_dim is updated

%%sql
-- merge into fact table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.hr_absence_dim AS Target
USING absence_dim_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.AbsenceID = Target.AbsenceID 

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.ValidTo = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;

# Fix the IDs
- No auto-increment feature is available in delta tables, therefore we need to create new IDs for the inserted rows
- This is done by select the target data and using INSERT OVERWRITE to re-insert the data is a new Row Number
## Table odw_harmonised.absence_dim is updated

%%sql
-- Insert new WorkScheduleID

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.hr_absence_dim

SELECT 
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY AbsenceID NULLS LAST) AS AbsenceID,
    EmployeeID,
    AbsenceType,
    SicknessGroup,
    AbsenceStartDate,
    AbsenceEndDate,
    Days,
    Hours,
    CalendarDays,
    WorkScheduleID,
    AnnualLeaveStart,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.hr_absence_dim;

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (sap hr) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.contract_dim)
- **New Data:** where a workc in the source does not exist as an ContractCode in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on workc in source and ContractCode in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an ContractCode in the target exists but the same workc doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View contract_dim_new is created

%%sql

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW contract_grouped

    AS

SELECT  WorkC as ContractCode,
        First(Work_Contract) as Description, 
        CASE 
            WHEN CT IS NULL
            THEN 'N/A'
            ELSE CT
        END as ContractTypeCode,
        First(Contract_Type) as ContractType
       
FROM odw_standardised_db.vw_saphr
WHERE WorkC IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY WorkC, CT;

%%sql

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW contract_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"
SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.ContractCode IS NULL
        THEN T7.ContractID
        ELSE NULL
    END as ContractID, 
    T1.ContractCode,
    T1.Description,
    T1.ContractTypeCode,
    T1.ContractType,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.ContractCode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Description,'.'), IFNULL(T1.ContractTypeCode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.ContractType,'.'))) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.ContractCode = T7.ContractCode AND T1.ContractTypeCode = T7.ContractTypeCode
            AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.ContractCode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Description,'.'), IFNULL(T1.ContractTypeCode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.ContractType,'.'))) <> T7.RowID   -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T7.ContractCode IS NULL -- new employee
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.ContractCode IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T7.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM contract_grouped T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_contract_dim T7 ON T1.ContractCode = T7.ContractCode AND
                                                T1.ContractTypeCode = T7.ContractTypeCode AND 
                                                T7.IsActive = 'Y'     
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (  CASE
                WHEN T1.ContractCode = T7.ContractCode AND T1.ContractTypeCode = T7.ContractTypeCode
                    AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.ContractCode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Description,'.'), IFNULL(T1.ContractTypeCode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.ContractType,'.'))) <> T7.RowID   -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T7.ContractCode IS NULL -- new contract code
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.ContractCode IS NULL

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (sap hr) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.cost_center_dim)
- **New Data:** where a Cost_Ctr in the source does not exist as a CostCenterCode in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Cost_Ctr in source and CostCenterCode in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an CostCenterCode in the target exists but the same Cost_Ctr doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View costcenter_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build costcenter_dim_new table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW costcenter_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.CostCenterCode IS NULL
        THEN T7.CostCenterID
        ELSE NULL
    END as CostCenterID, -- surrogate key
    T1.CostCenterCode,
    T1.Description,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS StartDate,
    NULL AS EndDate,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.CostCenterCode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Description,'.'))) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.CostCenterCode = T7.CostCenterCode AND  md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.CostCenterCode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Description,'.'))) <> T7.RowID    -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T7.CostCenterCode IS NULL -- new employee
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.CostCenterCode IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T7.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM costcentre_grouped T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description and T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_costcenter_dim T7 ON T1.CostCenterCode = T7.CostCenterCode  AND 
                                                T7.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.CostCenterCode = T7.CostCenterCode AND  md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.CostCenterCode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Description,'.'))) <> T7.RowID    -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T7.CostCenterCode IS NULL -- new employee
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.CostCenterCode IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    )
;

%%sql
-- Build disability_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW disability_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.DisabilityCode IS NULL
        THEN T3.DisabilityID
        ELSE NULL
    END as DisabilityID, 
    T1.DisabilityCode,
    T1.Description,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(CONCAT(IFNULL(T1.DisabilityCode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Description,'.'))) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.DisabilityCode = T3.DisabilityCode AND 
                md5(CONCAT(IFNULL(T1.DisabilityCode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Description,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.DisabilityCode IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.DisabilityCode IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM disability_grouped T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_disability_dim T3 ON T1.DisabilityCode = T3.DisabilityCode and T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE  
    (
        
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.DisabilityCode = T3.DisabilityCode AND 
                        md5(CONCAT(IFNULL(T1.DisabilityCode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Description,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.DisabilityCode IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.DisabilityCode IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )

%%sql
-- Build diversity_dim table


-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW diversity_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Description IS NULL
        THEN T3.DiversityID
        ELSE NULL
    END as DiversityID, -- surrogate key
    T1.Description AS Description,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID, -- NOT CORRECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(IFNULL(T1.Description, '.')) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Description = T3.Description AND md5(IFNULL(t1.Description, '.')) <> T3.RowID
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.Description IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Description IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM diversity_grouped T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description and T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_diversity_dim T3 ON T1.Description = T3.Description AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE  
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.Description = T3.Description AND md5(IFNULL(t1.Description, '.')) <> T3.RowID
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T3.Description IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.Description IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
;

%%sql
-- Build Employee_Dim table -- merge

-- Notes - Addresses are only supplied for Inspectors - need to check inspector count against addresses data

-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW employee_dim_new 

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT DISTINCT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Pers_No IS NULL
        THEN T7.EmployeeInfoID
        ELSE NULL
    END as EmployeeInfoID, -- surrogate key
    T1.Pers_No AS EmployeeID,
    T1.First_name AS FirstName,
    T1.Last_name AS LastName,
    T1.Gender_Key AS Gender,
    T2.Street_and_House_Number AS AddressLine1,
    T2.`2nd_Address_Line` AS AddressLine2,
    T2.District AS AddressLine3,
    T2.City AS City,
    T2.Region_State_Province_Count AS County,
    T2.Postal_Code AS PostCode,
    T3.Email_Address AS EmailAddress,
    T2.Personal_Mobile AS TelephoneNumberPersonal,
    T2.Work_Mobile AS TelephoneNumberWork,
    T1.FTE AS FTE,
    T1.Wk_hrs AS WorkHours,
    T1.Indicator_Part_Time_Employee AS PartTimeEmployee,
    T1.Employment_Status AS EmploymentStatus,
    to_timestamp(T1.Civil_Service_Start) AS CivilServiceStart,
    to_timestamp(T1.Date_to_Current_Job) AS DateToCurrentJob,
    to_timestamp(T1.Seniority_Date) AS SeniorityDate,
    to_timestamp(T1.Org_Start_Date) AS OrgStartDate,
    to_timestamp(T1.Fix_Term_End_Date) AS FixTermEndDate,
    to_timestamp(T1.Loan_Start_Date) AS LoanStartDate,
    to_timestamp(T1.Loan_End_Date) AS LoanEndDate,
    T1.Assignment_Number AS AssignmentNumber,
    T1.Annual_salary AS AnnualSalary, -- T1.Annual_salary
    T1.curr AS Currency,
    T1.Reason_For_Action AS ReasonForAction,
    to_timestamp(T1.Date_to_Subst_Grade) AS DateToSubstantiveGrade,
    T4.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL as ValidTo,
    md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.First_name,'.'),IFNULL(T1.Last_name,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Gender_Key, '.'), IFNULL(T2.Street_and_House_Number, '.'),IFNULL(T2.`2nd_Address_Line`, '.'),IFNULL(T2.District, '.'),
                IFNULL(T2.City, '.'),IFNULL(T2.Region_State_Province_Count, '.'),IFNULL(T2.Postal_Code, '.'),IFNULL(T3.Email_Address, '.'),IFNULL(T2.Personal_Mobile, '.'), IFNULL(T2.Work_Mobile, '.'),
                IFNULL(T1.FTE,'.'),IFNULL(T1.Wk_hrs,'.'),IFNULL(T1.Indicator_Part_Time_Employee,'.'),T1.Employment_Status,IFNULL(T1.Civil_Service_Start, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Date_to_Current_Job, '.'),
                IFNULL(T1.Seniority_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Org_Start_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Fix_Term_End_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Loan_Start_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Loan_End_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Payroll_Area,'.'),
                IFNULL(T1.Assignment_Number, '.'), IFNULL(T1.Employee_Group,'.'),IFNULL(T1.curr,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Date_to_Subst_Grade,'.'))) as RowID, 
    'Y' as IsActive, 
    T7.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.vw_saphr T1
LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.vw_addresses T2 ON T1.Pers_No = T2.Staff_Number
LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.vw_email T3 ON T1.Pers_No = T3.Staff_Number
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T4 ON "SAP HR" = T4.Description and T4.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT staff_number, max(ded_from) as AnnualLeaveStartDate
            FROM odw_standardised_db.vw_leave
            GROUP BY Staff_Number) T5 ON T1.Pers_No = T5.staff_number   
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_employee_fact T8 ON T1.Pers_No = T8.PersNumber AND T8.IsActive = 'Y' 
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_employee_dim T7 ON T8.EmployeeID = T7.EmployeeID AND T7.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.Pers_No = T7.EmployeeID AND md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.First_name,'.'),IFNULL(T1.Last_name,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Gender_Key, '.'), IFNULL(T2.Street_and_House_Number, '.'),
                IFNULL(T2.`2nd_Address_Line`, '.'),IFNULL(T2.District, '.'), IFNULL(T2.City, '.'),IFNULL(T2.Region_State_Province_Count, '.'),IFNULL(T2.Postal_Code, '.'),IFNULL(T3.Email_Address, '.'),
                IFNULL(T2.Personal_Mobile, '.'), IFNULL(T2.Work_Mobile, '.'), IFNULL(T1.FTE,'.'),IFNULL(T1.Wk_hrs,'.'),IFNULL(T1.Indicator_Part_Time_Employee,'.'),T1.Employment_Status,
                IFNULL(T1.Civil_Service_Start, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Date_to_Current_Job, '.'), IFNULL(T1.Seniority_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Org_Start_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Fix_Term_End_Date, '.'),
                IFNULL(T1.Loan_Start_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Loan_End_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Payroll_Area,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Assignment_Number, '.'), IFNULL(T1.Employee_Group,'.'),IFNULL(T1.curr,'.'), 
                IFNULL(T1.Date_to_Subst_Grade,'.')))  <> T7.RowID     
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T7.EmployeeInfoID IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.Pers_No IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )
    AND T1.Pers_No IS NOT NULL
;

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (sap hr) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.employee_fact)
- **New Data:** where a Pers_No in the source does not exist as an EmployeeNumber in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Pers_No in source and EmployeeNumber in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an EmployeeNumber in the target exists but the same Pers_No doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View employee_fact_new is created

%%sql
-- Build Employee_fact table -- merge

-- Notes - Addresses are only supplied for Inspectors - need to check inspector count against addresses data

-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW employee_fact_new 

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT DISTINCT
    T1.Pers_No as EmployeeID,
    T1.Birth_date as DOB,
    T1.NI_number as NINumber,
    T1.Pers_No as PersNumber,
    T2.Staff_Number as EmployeeNumber,
    T1.Employee_No as LegacyEmployeeNumber,
    NULL as NewSAPEmployeeNumber,
    T4.SourceSystemID,
    current_timestamp as IngestionDate,
    NULL as ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.Birth_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.NI_number, '.'), IFNULL(T1.Pers_No, '.'),IFNULL(T2.Staff_Number, '.'), IFNULL(T1.Employee_No,'.'))) as RowID, 
    'Y' as IsActive, 
    T7.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.vw_saphr T1
LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.vw_addresses T2 ON T1.Pers_No = T2.Staff_Number
LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.vw_email T3 ON T1.Pers_No = T3.Staff_Number
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T4 ON "SAP HR" = T4.Description and T4.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT staff_number, max(ded_from) as AnnualLeaveStartDate
            FROM odw_standardised_db.vw_leave
            GRoup BY Staff_Number) T5 ON T1.Pers_No = T5.staff_number    
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_employee_fact T7 ON T1.Pers_No = T7.PersNumber AND T7.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.Pers_No = T7.PersNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.Birth_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.NI_number, '.'), IFNULL(T1.Pers_No, '.'),IFNULL(T2.Staff_Number, '.'), IFNULL(T1.Employee_No,'.')))  <> T7.RowID     
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T7.PersNumber IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.Pers_No IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )
;

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (sap hr) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.Employee_HR_Hierarchy_Dim)
- **New Data:** where an EmployeeID in the source does not exist as an EmployeeID in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on EmployeeID in source and EmployeeID in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an EmployeeID in the target exists but the same EmployeeID doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View employee_hr_hierarchy_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build employee_hr_hierarchy_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW employee_hr_hierarchy_dim_new
    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT DISTINCT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Pers_No IS NULL
        THEN T7.EmployeeHRHierarchyID
        ELSE NULL
    END as EmployeeHRHierarchyID, -- surrogate key
    T1.Pers_No AS EmployeeID,
    T1.Pers_No_1 as ManagerEmployeeID,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.Pers_No,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Pers_No_1,'.'))) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Pers_No = T7.EmployeeID AND  md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.Pers_No,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Pers_No_1,'.'))) <> T7.RowID    -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T7.EmployeeID IS NULL -- new employee
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Pers_No IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData,
    CASE    
        WHEN T1.Pers_No = T7.EmployeeID AND T7.IsActive IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS HistoricData, 
    T7.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.vw_saphr T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_employee_hr_hierarchy_dim T7 ON T1.Pers_No = T7.EmployeeID AND T7.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE /** (T7.IsActive = 'Y' or T7.IsActive IS NULL)
    
--         AND  **/ (
--         -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.Pers_No = T7.EmployeeID AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.Pers_No,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Pers_No_1,'.'))) <> T7.RowID    -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T7.EmployeeID IS NULL -- new employee
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.Pers_No IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    ) AND T1.Pers_No IS NOT NULL
;

FROM odw_harmonised_db.hr_employee_hr_hierarchy_dim;

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (sap hr) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.hr_employee_leavers_dim)
- **New Data:** where a workc in the source does not exist as an EmployeeID in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on workc in source and EmployeeID in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an EmployeeID in the target exists but the same workc doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View hr_employee_leavers_dim_new is created

%%sql

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW hr_employee_leavers_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"
SELECT DISTINCT
    CASE
        WHEN T3.EmployeeID IS NULL
        THEN T7.EmployeeLeaversID
        ELSE NULL
    END as EmployeeLeaversID,     
    T1.Pers_No AS EmployeeID,
    T1.Pers_No AS EmployeeNumber,
    T1.Reason_For_Action AS ReasonForLeaving, 
    CASE 
        WHEN T1.Org_Start_Date = '00/00/0000'
        THEN '1900-01-01 00:00:00'
        ELSE T1.Org_Start_Date
    END AS EmploymentStartDate,
    T1.Leaving AS EmploymentEndDate,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T3.EmployeeID,'.'),IFNULL(T1.Reason_For_Action,'.'),IFNULL(T1.Org_Start_Date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Leaving,'.'))) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T3.EmployeeID = T7.EmployeeID AND 
             T1.Org_Start_Date = T7.EmploymentStartDate AND
             T1.Leaving = T7.EmploymentEndDate AND
             md5(concat(IFNULL(T3.EmployeeID,'.'),IFNULL(T1.Reason_For_Action,'.'),IFNULL(T1.Org_Start_Date,'.'),IFNULL(T1.Leaving,'.'))) <> T7.RowID  -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T7.EmployeeID  IS NULL -- new employee
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T3.EmployeeID IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData,
    T7.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.vw_leavers T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_employee_fact T3 ON T1.Pers_No = T3.PersNumber
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_employee_leavers_dim T7 ON   T3.EmployeeID = T7.EmployeeID AND 
                                                        T1.Org_Start_Date = T7.EmploymentStartDate AND
                                                        T1.Leaving = T7.EmploymentEndDate

WHERE  (T7.IsActive = 'Y' or T7.IsActive IS NULL)
    
        AND (
        
        -- flags new data        
        (       CASE
                    WHEN T3.EmployeeID = T7.EmployeeID AND 
                            T1.Org_Start_Date = T7.EmploymentStartDate AND
                            T1.Leaving = T7.EmploymentEndDate AND
                            md5(concat(IFNULL(T3.EmployeeID,'.'),IFNULL(T1.Reason_For_Action,'.'),IFNULL(T1.Org_Start_Date,'.'),IFNULL(T1.Leaving,'.'))) <> T7.RowID  -- same employee, changed data
                    THEN 'Y'
                    WHEN T7.EmployeeID  IS NULL -- new employee
                    THEN 'Y'
                    ELSE 'N'
                END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T3.EmployeeID IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
);

-- select count(*) from hr_employee_leavers_dim_new;
-- select * from hr_employee_leavers_dim_new;

# Dataset is created that contains changed data and corresponding target data
- This script combines data that has been updated, Deleted or is new, with corresponding target data
- View **hr_employee_leavers_dim_new** is unioned to the target data filter to only those rows where changes have been detected
## View hr_employee_leavers_dim_changed_rows is created

%%sql

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW hr_employee_leavers_dim_changed_rows

    AS

Select 
    EmployeeLeaversID,
    EmployeeID,
    ReasonForLeaving, 
    EmploymentStartDate,
    EmploymentEndDate,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
From hr_employee_leavers_dim_new WHERE HistoricIsActive = 'Y' or HistoricIsActive IS NULL

    UNION ALL

SELECT
    T1.EmployeeLeaversID,
    T1.EmployeeID,
    T1.ReasonForLeaving, 
    T1.EmploymentStartDate,
    T1.EmploymentEndDate,
    T1.SourceSystemID,
    T1.IngestionDate,
    T1.ValidTo,
    T1.RowID,
    T1.IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.hr_employee_leavers_dim T1
INNER JOIN hr_employee_leavers_dim_new T2 ON T1.EmployeeID = T2.EmployeeID AND 
                                            T1.EmploymentStartDate = T2.EmploymentStartDate AND
                                            T1.EmploymentEndDate = T2.EmploymentEndDate AND 
                                            T2.EmployeeLeaversID IS NULL AND 
                                            T1.IsActive = 'Y'
;

# View hr_employee_leavers_dim_changed_rows is used in a merge (Upsert) statement into the target table
- **WHEN MATCHED** ON the Business Key (i.e. workc from SAPHR), EndDate is set to today -1 day and the IsActive flag is set to 'N'
- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the business key, insert rows
## Table odw_harmonised.hr_employee_leavers_dim is updated

%%sql

-- merge into fact table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.hr_employee_leavers_dim AS Target
USING hr_employee_leavers_dim_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.EmployeeID = Target.EmployeeID

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.ValidTo = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;

# Fix the IDs
- No auto-increment feature is available in delta tables, therefore we need to create new IDs for the inserted rows
- This is done by select the target data and using INSERT OVERWRITE to re-insert the data is a new Row Number
## Table odw_harmonised.hr_employee_leavers_dim is updated

%%sql

-- Insert new ContractID

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.hr_employee_leavers_dim

SELECT 
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY EmployeeID NULLS LAST) AS EmployeeLeaversID,
    EmployeeID,
    ReasonForLeaving, 
    EmploymentStartDate,
    EmploymentEndDate,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.hr_employee_leavers_dim;

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (sap hr) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.payband_dim)
- **New Data:** where a PA in the source does not exist as an PSGroupCode in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on PA in source and PSGroupCode in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an PSGroupCode in the target exists but the same PA doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View employeegroup_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build payband_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW employeegroup_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.EEGrp IS NULL
        THEN T7.EmployeeGroupID
        ELSE NULL
    END as EmployeeGroupID, -- surrogate key
    T1.EEGrp, -- source system id
    T1.EmployeeGroup, 
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.EEGrp,'.'), IFNULL(T1.EmployeeGroup,'.'))) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.EEGrp = T7.EEGrp AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.EEGrp,'.'), IFNULL(T1.EmployeeGroup,'.')))  <> T7.RowID   -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T7.EEGrp IS NULL -- new employee
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.EEGrp IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T7.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM employeegroup_grouped T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description and T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_employeegroup_dim T7 ON T1.EEGrp = T7.EEGrp AND T7.IsActive = 'Y' 
WHERE
    ( 
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.EEGrp = T7.EEGrp AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.EEGrp,'.'), IFNULL(T1.EmployeeGroup,'.')))  <> T7.RowID   -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T7.EEGrp IS NULL -- new employee
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.EEGrp IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    )

# Dataset is created that contains changed data and corresponding target data
- This script combines data that has been updated, Deleted or is new, with corresponding target data
- View **employeegroup_dim_new** is unioned to the target data filter to only those rows where changes have been detected

%%sql

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW staff_cost

     AS

SELECT DISTINCT
    h.pers_no as EmployeeID,
    h.ps_group as Grade, 
	h.annual_salary as Salary, 
    cast(cast(h.annual_salary as float)/(365.0*7.4) as float) as HourlyRate,
    cast(le.ExpectedFrom as date) as ReportMonthEndDate,
    le.LeaveDaysPerYear as LeaveAllowance,
    cast(case sign(datediff(day, cast(le.LeaveYearStart as date), le.expectedfrom))
				when 1 then le.LeaveYearStart
				when 0 then le.LeaveYearStart
				else dateadd(year, -1, le.LeaveYearStart)
			end as date) as LeaveStartDate,
    le.leavedaysperyear*(1 - abs((((datediff(day, cast(
                                                    CASE sign(datediff(day, cast(le.leaveyearstart AS date), le.expectedfrom))
                                                    WHEN 1 THEN
                                                    le.leaveyearstart
                                                    ELSE dateadd(year, -1, le.leaveyearstart)
                                                    END
                                                    AS date), le.expectedfrom))/364.25)%1))) AS ExpectedLeaveHoursRemaining
    
FROM odw_standardised_db.hr_saphr h
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_leave_entitlement_dim le on h.pers_no = le.EmployeeID
WHERE
    le.AbsenceQuotaType = 'Annual Leave / P&P';

%%sql

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW carried_over
    
    AS

SELECT DISTINCT
    h.pers_no as EmployeeID,
    case sign(le.LeaveDaysPerYear - 148)
        when 1 then 148
        when 0 then 148
        else le.LeaveDaysPerYear
    end as CarriedOverHours

FROM odw_standardised_db.hr_saphr h
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_leave_entitlement_dim le on h.pers_no = le.EmployeeID
WHERE
    le.AbsenceQuotaType = 'Brought Forward';

import pandas as pd
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession

def get_england_and_wales(data_frame):
    return (
        pd
        .json_normalize(
            data_frame.to_dict(),
            record_path=[['england-and-wales', 'events']]
        )
        .astype({
            'title': 'string',
            'date': 'datetime64[ns]',
            'notes': 'string',
            'bunting': 'bool'
        })
    )

bank_holidays = pd.read_json(path_or_buf = 'https://www.gov.uk/bank-holidays.json')
bh = get_england_and_wales(bank_holidays)

spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()
sparkDF=spark.createDataFrame(bh) 

sparkDF.createOrReplaceTempView('bank_holidays')

%%sql

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW leave_taken

     AS

SELECT DISTINCT
    a.AbsenceID,
    a.EmployeeID,
    CASE
        WHEN sc.ReportMonthEndDate >= a.AbsenceEndDate
        THEN a.Hours
        ELSE a.Hours - (w.WorkDayHours * datediff(a.AbsenceEndDate, sc.ReportMonthEndDate))
    END AS LeaveHours,
    a.Days, 
    a.Hours,
    a.CalendarDays,
    a.AbsenceStartDate,
    a.AbsenceEndDate,
    sc.LeaveStartDate,
    bh.title as HolidayTitle,
    CASE 
        WHEN a.Days = 0 AND a.Hours = 0 
        THEN w.WorkDayHours * a.CalendarDays
        ELSE NULL
    END AS BankHolidaysHours


FROM odw_harmonised_db.hr_absence_dim a
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_work_schedule_dim w on a.WorkScheduleID = w.WorkScheduleID
LEFT JOIN staff_cost sc ON a.EmployeeID = sc.EmployeeID
LEFT JOIN bank_holidays bh ON a.AbsenceStartDate = bh.Date
WHERE
    a.AbsenceType IN ('PT Annual / P&P Leave', 'FT Annual / Priv Leave')
    AND 
    a.AbsenceStartDate  BETWEEN sc.LeaveStartDate AND sc.ReportMonthEndDate
GROUP BY 
    a.EmployeeID,a.AbsenceID,a.Days,a.Hours,a.CalendarDays,a.AbsenceStartDate,a.AbsenceEndDate,sc.LeaveStartDate,bh.title,w.WorkDayHours,sc.ReportMonthEndDate
Order by AbsenceStartDate

%%sql
CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW leave_taken_fixed -- adding bank holidays in leave_hours_taken

    AS

SELECT
EmployeeID,
SUM(CASE
        WHEN Days = 0 AND Hours = 0 AND HolidayTitle is not null AND LeaveStartDate <= AbsenceStartDate 
        THEN LeaveHours + BankHolidaysHours
        ELSE LeaveHours
    END) AS LeaveHoursTaken

FROM leave_taken
Where EmployeeID is not null and LeaveStartDate <= AbsenceStartDate
GROUP BY EmployeeID;

    h.disability_code	AS	DisabilityCode	,
    h.disability_text	AS	DisabilityText	,
    h.disability_code_description	AS	DisabilityCodeDescription	,
    h.parea	AS	Parea	,
    h.payroll_area	AS	PayrollArea	,
    h.assignment_number	AS	AssignmentNumber	,
    h.fte_2	AS	Fte2	,
    h.Report_MonthEnd_Date	AS	ReportMonthendDate	,
    h.leave_entitlement_hrs	AS	LeaveEntitlementHrs	,
    h.leave_taken_hrs	AS	LeaveTakenHrs	,
    h.leave_remaining_hours	AS	LeaveRemainingHours	,
    h.leave_remaining_prorata_hours	AS	LeaveRemainingProrataHours,

    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(h.pers_no,'.'),IFNULL(h.employee_no,'.'))) AS RowID,
    'Y' AS IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN h.pers_no = T5.PersNo AND md5(concat(IFNULL(h.pers_no,'.'),IFNULL(h.employee_no,'.'))) <> T5.RowID-- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T5.PersNo IS NULL -- new comment
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN h.pers_no IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T5.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM sap_hr_historic h
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_historic_sap_hr T5 ON h.pers_no = T5.PersNo AND T5.IsActive = 'Y'


WHERE
    (
        
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN h.pers_no = T5.PersNo AND md5(concat(IFNULL(h.pers_no,'.'),IFNULL(h.employee_no,'.'))) <> T5.RowID    -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T5.PersNo IS NULL -- new employee
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN h.pers_no IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    )

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW leaveentitlement_dim_non_null

    AS

SELECT DISTINCT
    Staff_Number,
    number,
    deduction,
    ded_from,
    ded_to,
    absence_quota_type,
    Expected_From

FROM odw_standardised_db.vw_leave
WHERE Staff_Number IS NOT NULL AND absence_quota_type IS NOT NULL;

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (sap hr) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.leave_entitlement_dim)
- **New Data:** where a EmployeeID in the source does not exist as an EmployeeID in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on EmployeeID in source and ContracEmployeeIDtCode in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an EmployeeID in the target exists but the same workc doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View leave_entitlement_dim_new is created

%%sql

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW leaveentitlement_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"
SELECT DISTINCT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Staff_Number IS NULL
        THEN T3.LeaveEntitlementID
        ELSE NULL
    END as LeaveEntitlementID,     
    T1.Staff_Number AS EmployeeID, -- FK to employee_fact
    T1.number AS LeaveDaysPerYear,
    T1.deduction AS LeaveDeduction,
    T1.ded_from AS LeaveYearStart,
    T1.ded_to AS LeaveYearEnd,
    T1.absence_quota_type AS AbsenceQuotaType,
    date_add(T1.Expected_From, -1) AS ExpectedFrom,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.Staff_Number,'.'),IFNULL(T1.number,'.'),IFNULL(T1.deduction,'.'),IFNULL(cast(T1.ded_from as varchar(20)),'.'),IFNULL(T1.absence_quota_type,'.'))) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Staff_Number = T3.EmployeeID AND T1.absence_quota_type = T3.AbsenceQuotaType
            AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.Staff_Number,'.'),IFNULL(T1.number,'.'),IFNULL(T1.deduction,'.'),IFNULL(cast(T1.ded_from as varchar(20)),'.'),IFNULL(T1.absence_quota_type,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T3.EmployeeID  IS NULL -- new employee
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Staff_Number IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM leaveentitlement_dim_non_null T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_leave_entitlement_dim T3 ON T1.Staff_Number = T3.EmployeeID AND 
                                                        T1.absence_quota_type = T3.AbsenceQuotaType AND
                                                        T3.IsActive = 'Y'

WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (      CASE
                    WHEN T1.Staff_Number = T3.EmployeeID AND T1.absence_quota_type = T3.AbsenceQuotaType
                        AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.Staff_Number,'.'),IFNULL(T1.number,'.'),IFNULL(T1.deduction,'.'),IFNULL(cast(T1.ded_from as varchar(20)),'.'),IFNULL(T1.absence_quota_type,'.'))) <> T3.RowID  -- same employee, changed data
                    THEN 'Y'
                    WHEN T3.EmployeeID  IS NULL -- new employee
                    THEN 'Y'
                    ELSE 'N'
                END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.Staff_Number IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    )
AND T1.Staff_Number IS NOT NULL;

# Dataset is created that contains changed data and corresponding target data
- This script combines data that has been updated, Deleted or is new, with corresponding target data
- View **leave_entitlement_dim_new** is unioned to the target data filter to only those rows where changes have been detected

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW leaveentitlement_dim_changed_rows

    AS

Select 
    LeaveEntitlementID,
    EmployeeID,
    LeaveDaysPerYear,
    LeaveDeduction,
    LeaveYearStart,
    LeaveYearEnd,
    AbsenceQuotaType,
    ExpectedFrom,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
From leaveentitlement_dim_new WHERE HistoricIsActive = 'Y' or HistoricIsActive IS NULL

    UNION ALL

SELECT
    T1.LeaveEntitlementID,
    T1.EmployeeID,
    T1.LeaveDaysPerYear,
    T1.LeaveDeduction,
    T1.LeaveYearStart,
    T1.LeaveYearEnd,
    T1.AbsenceQuotaType,
    T1.ExpectedFrom,
    T1.SourceSystemID,
    T1.IngestionDate,
    T1.ValidTo,
    T1.RowID,
    T1.IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.hr_leave_entitlement_dim T1
INNER JOIN leaveentitlement_dim_new T2 ON   T1.EmployeeID = T2.EmployeeID AND
                                            T1.AbsenceQuotaType = T2.AbsenceQuotaType AND
                                            T2.LeaveEntitlementID IS NULL AND 
                                            T2.IsActive = 'Y'
;

- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the business key, insert rows

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (sap hr) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.OrganisationUnit_dim)
- **New Data:** where a Org_unit in the source does not exist as a OrganisationUnit in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Org_unit in source and OrganisationUnit in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an OrganisationUnit in the target exists but the same Org_unit doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View OrganisationUnit_dim_new is created

%%sql
-- Build OrganisationUnit_dim_new table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW OrganisationUnit_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.OrganisationUnit IS NULL
        THEN T7.OrganisationUnitID
        ELSE NULL
    END as OrganisationUnitID, -- surrogate key
    T1.OrganisationUnit,
    T1.Description,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.OrganisationUnit,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Description,'.'))) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.OrganisationUnit = T7.OrganisationUnit AND T1.Description = T7.Description AND  
        md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.OrganisationUnit,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Description,'.'))) <> T7.RowID    -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T7.OrganisationUnit IS NULL -- new organisational unit
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.OrganisationUnit IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T7.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM organisation_grouped T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description and T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_organisation_unit_dim T7 ON T1.OrganisationUnit = T7.OrganisationUnit AND
                                                        T1.Description = T7.Description AND
                                                        T7.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.OrganisationUnit = T7.OrganisationUnit AND T1.Description = T7.Description AND  
                md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.OrganisationUnit,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Description,'.'))) <> T7.RowID    -- same unit, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T7.OrganisationUnit IS NULL -- new organisational unit
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.OrganisationUnit IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    )

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.PSGroupCode IS NULL
        THEN T7.PayBandID
        ELSE NULL
    END as PayBandID, -- surrogate key
    T1.PSGroupCode, -- source system id
    T1.Description, 
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.PSGroupCode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Description,'.'))) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.PSGroupCode = T7.PSGroupCode AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.PSGroupCode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Description,'.')))  <> T7.RowID   -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T7.PSGroupCode IS NULL -- new employee
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.PSGroupCode IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T7.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM payband_grouped T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description and T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_payband_dim T7 ON T1.PSGroupCode = T7.PSGroupCode AND
                                                T7.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.PSGroupCode = T7.PSGroupCode AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.PSGroupCode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Description,'.')))  <> T7.RowID   -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T7.PSGroupCode IS NULL -- new employee
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        (   CASE
                WHEN T1.PSGroupCode IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )

%%sql
-- Build personnelarea_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW personnelarea_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.PA IS NULL
        THEN T7.PersonnelAreaID
        ELSE NULL
    END as PersonnelAreaID, -- surrogate key
    CASE
        WHEN T1.PA IS NULL
        THEN T7.PersonnelAreaCode
        ELSE T1.PA
    END as PersonnelAreaCode, -- source system id
    Personnel_Area AS Description, 
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.PA, '.'), IFNULL(T1.Personnel_Area,'.'))) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.PA = T7.PersonnelAreaCode AND  md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.PA, '.'), IFNULL(T1.Personnel_Area,'.'))) <> T7.RowID  -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T7.PersonnelAreaCode IS NULL -- new personnel area code
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.PA IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T7.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM personnelarea_grouped T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_personnel_area_dim T7 ON T1.PA = T7.PersonnelAreaCode AND T7.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.PA = T7.PersonnelAreaCode AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.PA, '.'), IFNULL(T1.Personnel_Area,'.'))) <> T7.RowID    -- same employee, changed data
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T7.PersonnelAreaCode IS NULL -- new personnel area code
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.PA IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )
;

%%sql
-- Build personnelarea_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW personnelsubarea_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.PersonnelSubAreaCode IS NULL
        THEN T7.PersonnelSubAreaID
        ELSE NULL
    END as PersonnelSubAreaID, -- surrogate key
    T1.PersonnelSubAreaCode, -- source system id
    T1.Description, 
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.PersonnelSubAreaCode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Description,'.'))) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.PersonnelSubAreaCode = T7.PersonnelSubAreaCode AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.PersonnelSubAreaCode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Description,'.'))) <> T7.RowID    -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T7.PersonnelSubAreaCode IS NULL -- new employee
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.PersonnelSubAreaCode IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData, 
    T7.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM personnelsubarea_grouped T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description and T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_personnel_sub_area_dim T7 ON T1.PersonnelSubAreaCode = T7.PersonnelSubAreaCode AND T1.Description = T7.Description AND T7.IsActive = 'Y'
WHERE
    (
        
        -- flags new data        
        ( CASE
                WHEN T1.PersonnelSubAreaCode = T7.PersonnelSubAreaCode AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.PersonnelSubAreaCode,'.'), IFNULL(T1.Description,'.'))) <> T7.RowID    -- same employee, changed data
                THEN 'Y'
                WHEN T7.PersonnelSubAreaCode IS NULL -- new employee
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        ( CASE
                WHEN T1.PersonnelSubAreaCode IS NULL
                THEN 'Y'
                ELSE 'N'
            END = 'Y' )
    )
;

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (sap hr) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.hr_record_fact)
- **New Data:** where a Pers_No in the source does not exist as an EmployeeNumber in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Pers_No in source and EmployeeNumber in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an EmployeeNumber in the target exists but the same Pers_No doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View hr_record_fact_new is created

%%sql

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW hr_record_fact_new 

    AS

SELECT DISTINCT

    CASE
        WHEN T1.Pers_No IS NULL
        THEN T15.HRRecordID
        ELSE NULL
    END as HRRecordID, -- surrogate key
    T2.EmployeeID AS EmployeeID,
    T1.CoCd,
    T1.Company_Code as CompanyCode,
    T3.PersonnelAreaID AS PersonnelAreaID,
    T4.PersonnelSubAreaID AS PersonnelSubAreaID,
    T5.OrganisationUnitID AS OrganisationalUnitID,
    T6.ContractID AS ContractID,
    T7.PayBandID AS PayBandID, -- NULLS occur due to contractors
    T8.CostCenterID AS CostCenterID,
    T9.PositionID AS PositionID,
    T10.ManagerEmployeeID AS ManagerEmployeeID,
    TempMPID.PositionID AS ManagerPositionID,
    T11.LocationID AS LocationID,
    T12.WorkScheduleID AS WorkScheduleID,
    T13.EmployeeGroupID,
    T13b.PayrollAreaID,
    T14.SourceSystemID,
    current_timestamp as IngestionDate,
    NULL as ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T2.EmployeeID,'.'), IFNULL(T3.PersonnelAreaID, '.'), IFNULL(T4.PersonnelSubAreaID, '.'), IFNULL(T5.OrganisationUnitID, '.'),IFNULL(T6.ContractID, '.'),
                IFNULL(T7.PayBandID, '.'),IFNULL(T8.CostCenterID, '.'),IFNULL(T9.PositionID, '.'),IFNULL(T10.ManagerEmployeeID, '.'),IFNULL(TempMPID.PositionID, '.'),
                 IFNULL(T11.LocationID, '.'),IFNULL(T12.WorkScheduleID, '.'),IFNULL(T13.EmployeeGroupID, '.'),IFNULL(T13b.PayrollAreaID, '.'))) as RowID, 
    'Y' as IsActive, 
    T15.IsActive as HistoricIsActive


FROM odw_standardised_db.vw_saphr T1 -- COUNT is 997
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_employee_fact T2 ON T1.Pers_No = T2.PersNumber AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_personnel_area_dim T3 ON T1.PA = T3.PersonnelAreaCode AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_personnel_sub_area_dim T4 ON T1.PSubArea = T4.PersonnelSubAreaCode AND T1.Personnel_SubArea = T4.Description AND T4.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_organisation_unit_dim T5 ON T1.Org_unit = T5.OrganisationUnit and
                                                         T1.Organizational_Unit = T5.Description AND T5.IsActive = 'Y' --64 nulls
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_contract_dim T6 ON T1.WorkC = T6.ContractCode AND 
                                                CASE 
                                                        WHEN T1.CT IS NULL
                                                        THEN 'N/A'
                                                        ELSE T1.CT
                                                END = T6.ContractTypeCode AND T6.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_payband_dim T7 ON T1.PS_group = T7.PSGroupCode AND T7.IsActive = 'Y' -- NULLS occur due to contractors
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_costcenter_dim T8 ON T1.Cost_Ctr = T8.CostCenterCode AND T8.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_position_dim T9 ON T1.Position= T9.PositionCode AND T9.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_position_dim TempMPID ON T1.Manager_Position = TempMPID.PositionCode AND TempMPID.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_employee_hr_hierarchy_dim T10 ON T2.EmployeeID = T10.EmployeeID AND T10.IsActive = 'Y' --447 no manager
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_pins_location_dim T11 ON T1.Loc = T11.LocationCode AND T11.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN (
            SELECT T1.EmployeeID, T1.WorkScheduleID
            FROM odw_harmonised_db.hr_absence_dim T1
            INNER JOIN ( SELECT EmployeeID, Max(AbsenceEndDate) as Max_AbsenceEndDate
                         FROM odw_harmonised_db.hr_absence_dim
                         Where IsActive = 'Y'
                         GROUP BY EmployeeID ) T3        ON  T1.EmployeeID = T3.EmployeeID AND
                                                             T1.AbsenceEndDate = T3.Max_AbsenceEndDate
            where IsActive = 'Y'
            GROUP BY T1.EmployeeID, T1.WorkScheduleID
            
    ) T12 ON T2.EmployeeID = T12.EmployeeID  -- NULLS occur as no data for some employees in the absence file, -577 no workscheduleid

LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_employeegroup_dim T13 ON T1.EEGrp = T13.EEGrp and T13.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_payroll_area_dim T13b ON T1.PArea = T13b.PayrollAreaCode and T13b.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T14 ON "SAP HR" = T14.Description AND T14.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_record_fact T15 ON T1.Pers_No = T15.EmployeeID AND T15.IsActive = 'Y'

WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        ( CASE
            WHEN T2.EmployeeID = T15.EmployeeID AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T2.EmployeeID,'.'), IFNULL(T3.PersonnelAreaID, '.'), IFNULL(T4.PersonnelSubAreaID, '.'), IFNULL(T5.OrganisationUnitID, '.'),IFNULL(T6.ContractID, '.'),
                IFNULL(T7.PayBandID, '.'),IFNULL(T8.CostCenterID, '.'),IFNULL(T9.PositionID, '.'),IFNULL(T10.ManagerEmployeeID, '.'),IFNULL(TempMPID.PositionID, '.'),
                 IFNULL(T11.LocationID, '.'),IFNULL(T12.WorkScheduleID, '.'),IFNULL(T13.EmployeeGroupID, '.'),IFNULL(T13b.PayrollAreaID, '.'))) <> T15.RowID
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T15.EmployeeID IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.Pers_No IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )
    AND T2.EmployeeID IS NOT NULL
;
