@logging_to_appins
def ingest_raw_to_standardised():
    '''
    Function reads all the schedules for all files, and processes any new files into standardised, and adds outstanding files into an outstanding files table
    Parameters:
    None

    Returns:
    None

    Actions:
    Processes files from raw to standardised based on a schedule, and will also keep track of files that haven't arrived and attempt to process those

    '''
    ### module imports
    from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
    import logging
    spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()
    import json
    from notebookutils import mssparkutils
    import pandas as pd
    logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
    from datetime import datetime, timedelta, date
    from pyspark.sql.types import StringType,BooleanType,DateType,TimestampType,IntegerType, FloatType, StructType
    from delta.tables import DeltaTable
    from croniter import croniter
    import re
    from pyspark.sql.functions import col, lit
    import calendar

    ### use the ADLS gen2 assoicated with the synapse resource in any environment (DR/Dev/Stage/Prod)
    storage_acc_name = spark.sparkContext.environment.get('dataLakeAccountName', 'get')

    ### create outstanding files table
    outstanding_files_table_json = spark.read.text("abfss://odw-config@"+storage_acc_name+".dfs.core.windows.net/orchestration/scheduling_outstanding_files_table.json", wholetext=True).first().value
    create_table_from_schema(outstanding_files_table_json, "odw_config_db", "raw_to_std_outstanding_files", "abfss://odw-standardised@"+storage_acc_name+".dfs.core.windows.net/", "config/raw_to_std_outstanding_files" )

    ### loads json for scheduling
    orchestration_json = spark.read.text("abfss://odw-config@"+storage_acc_name+".dfs.core.windows.net/orchestration/orchestration.json", wholetext=True).first().value
    json_config_dict = json.loads(orchestration_json)
    
    ### process outstanding files
    outstanding_df = spark.read.format("delta").load("abfss://odw-standardised@"+storage_acc_name+".dfs.core.windows.net/config/raw_to_std_outstanding_files")
    ### make sure there are entries in the outstanding files table
    if outstanding_df.count() > 0: 
        outstanding_df_pd = outstanding_df.toPandas()
        for pdidx, pdrow in outstanding_df_pd.iterrows():
            time_now = pdrow['Expected_Datetime'] 
            outstanding_source_id = pdrow['DefinitionID'] 
            definitions = json_config_dict['definitions']
            for defs in definitions:
                ### isolate the scheduling config for the entry in the oustanding files table
                if defs['Source_ID'] == outstanding_source_id: 
                    standardised_container = "abfss://odw-standardised@"+storage_acc_name+".dfs.core.windows.net/" # defs['Standardised_Container'] + "/"
                    standardised_table_name = defs['Standardised_Table_Name']
                    standardised_path = defs['Standardised_Path'] + "/"
                    standardised_table_loc = "abfss://odw-config@"+storage_acc_name+".dfs.core.windows.net/" + defs['Standardised_Table_Definition']
                    standardised_table_def_json = spark.read.text(standardised_table_loc, wholetext=True).first().value
                    create_table_from_schema(standardised_table_def_json, "odw_standardised_db", standardised_table_name,standardised_container , standardised_path+standardised_table_name)
                    deltadays = defs['Expected_Within_Weekdays']

                    ### expected from - change from normal process
                    last_start_dt = time_now 
                    
                    ### expected to - change from normal process
                    next_end_dt = last_start_dt + timedelta(days=deltadays) 

                    if last_start_dt <= time_now < next_end_dt: 
                        standardised_table_df = spark.read.format("delta").load(standardised_container+standardised_path+standardised_table_name)
                        ### check if the file has already been ingested
                        rows = standardised_table_df.filter((standardised_table_df.expected_from == last_start_dt) &  (standardised_table_df.expected_to == next_end_dt)).count()
                        
                        if rows > 0 :
                            logger.info("File has already been ingested")
                        else:
                            source_container_path = "abfss://odw-raw@"+storage_acc_name+".dfs.core.windows.net/" 
                            if defs["Source_Frequency_Folder"] == "":
                                source_folder =  defs['Source_Folder'] +"/"
                            ### handle weekly / monthly sub folders
                            else:                            
                                source_folder =  defs['Source_Folder'] +"/"+ defs["Source_Frequency_Folder"] + "/"
                            ### find correct weekly folder 
                            date_folders = mssparkutils.fs.ls(source_container_path+source_folder)
                            for datex in date_folders:
                                date_string = datex.name 
                                ### handle YYYY-MM-DD dates
                                if len(date_string) == 10:
                                    folder_date = datetime.strptime(date_string, "%Y-%m-%d")
                                ### handle YYYY-MM dates
                                elif len(date_string) == 7:
                                    folder_date = datetime.strptime(date_string, "%Y-%m")
                                    
                                    folder_date = date(folder_date.year, folder_date.month, calendar.monthrange(folder_date.year, folder_date.month)[-1]) + timedelta(days=1)
                                    folder_date = datetime.combine(folder_date, datetime.min.time())
                                else:
                                    raise ValueError("Date format in raw folder is incorrect, should be YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM")
                                if last_start_dt <= folder_date < next_end_dt:
                                    source_folder_with_date = mssparkutils.fs.ls(source_container_path+source_folder+date_string)
                                    if source_folder_with_date == []:
                                        error_folder_string = source_container_path+source_folder+date_string
                                        raise RuntimeError(f"Folder is empty within {error_folder_string}")
                                    for file in source_folder_with_date:
                                        filename = file.name 
                                        ### isolate the correct file
                                        if defs['Source_Filename_Start'] in filename:
                                            jobId = mssparkutils.env.getJobId()
                                            ### mount the data lake storage in Synapse to the Synapse File Mount API
                                            mssparkutils.fs.unmount("/temp_raw") 
                                            mssparkutils.fs.mount( 
                                            source_container_path+source_folder+date_string, 
                                            "/temp_raw", 
                                            {"linkedService":"ls_storage"} 
                                            )   
                                            ### open .csv and .xlsx files using pandas
                                            if ".xlsx" in filename.lower():
                                                sheet_name = defs['Source_Sheet_Name'] if 'Source_Sheet_Name' in defs else 0
                                                df = pd.read_excel(f"/synfs/{jobId}/temp_raw/{filename}", dtype=str, sheet_name=sheet_name)
                                            elif '.csv' in filename.lower():
                                                df = pd.read_csv(f"/synfs/{jobId}/temp_raw/{filename}", quotechar='"',escapechar='\\',encoding="utf8",dtype=str)
                                            else:
                                                raise RuntimeError(f"This file type for {filename} is unsupported")
                                            ### drop headerless columns
                                            df = df.loc[:, ~df.columns.str.contains('^Unnamed')]
                                            rows_raw = len(df.index)
                                            mssparkutils.fs.unmount("/temp_raw") 
                                            ### convert to pandas dataframe
                                            sparkDF=spark.createDataFrame(df)
                                            ### add date columns included with every standardised table
                                            sparkDF = sparkDF.withColumn("ingested_datetime",lit(datetime.now()))
                                            sparkDF = sparkDF.withColumn("expected_from",lit(last_start_dt))
                                            sparkDF = sparkDF.withColumn("expected_to",lit(next_end_dt))
                                            schema = StructType.fromJson(json.loads(standardised_table_def_json))
                                            
                                            ### remove characters that Delta can't allow in headers and add numbers to repeated column headers
                                            cols_orig = sparkDF.schema.names
                                            cols=[re.sub('[^0-9a-zA-Z]+', '_', i).lower() for i in cols_orig]
                                            cols=[colm.rstrip('_') for colm in cols]
                                            newlist = []
                                            for i, v in enumerate(cols):
                                                totalcount = cols.count(v)
                                                count = cols[:i].count(v)
                                                newlist.append(v + str(count + 1) if totalcount > 1 else v)
                                            for colix in range(len(cols_orig)):
                                                sparkDF = sparkDF.toDF(*newlist) 

                                            ### mappings for Json schema definitions to Pyspark data types
                                            mapping = {
                                                'string': StringType(),
                                                'timestamp': TimestampType(),
                                                'integer': IntegerType(),
                                                'date': DateType(),
                                                'float': FloatType()
                                            }

                                            ### column data type casting
                                            for field in json.loads(standardised_table_def_json)['fields']:
                                                sparkDF = sparkDF.withColumn(field['name'], col(field['name']).cast(mapping[field['type']]))
                                            colheaders = []
                                            for field in json.loads(standardised_table_def_json)['fields']:
                                                colheaders.append(field['name'])
                                            sparkDF = sparkDF.select(colheaders)
                                            sparkDF2 = spark.createDataFrame(sparkDF.rdd, schema=schema)
                                            ### writing the dataframe to the existing standardised table
                                            sparkDF2.write.format("delta").mode("append").saveAsTable(f"odw_standardised_db.{standardised_table_name}")

                                            standardised_table_df_new = spark.read.format("delta").load(standardised_container+standardised_path+standardised_table_name)
                                            rows_new = standardised_table_df.filter((standardised_table_df.expected_from == last_start_dt) &  (standardised_table_df.expected_to == next_end_dt)).count()

                                            ### test correct number of rows have written
                                            if rows_raw == rows_new:
                                                mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(source_container_path+"archive"+"/"+source_folder+date_string+"/")
                                                mssparkutils.fs.cp(source_container_path+source_folder+date_string+"/"+filename,source_container_path+"archive"+"/"+source_folder+date_string+"/"+filename)
                                                spark.sql(f"DELETE FROM odw_config_db.raw_to_std_outstanding_files WHERE Expected_Datetime = '{time_now}' and DefinitionID = {outstanding_source_id}")
                                                logger.info('All rows have successfully written')
                                            ### delete transaction if incorrect number of rows has written and raise an error
                                            else:
                                                deltaTable_standardised = DeltaTable.forPath(spark, standardised_container+standardised_path+standardised_table_name)
                                                fullHistoryDF = deltaTable_standardised.history()
                                                fullHistoryDF.select("version").first()['version']
                                                deltaTable_standardised.restoreToVersion(fullHistoryDF.select("version").first()['version'] - 1)
                                                raise RuntimeError(f"Incorrect number of rows have been written to the standardised table {standardised_table_name}, rolled back to original version")

    ### regular ingestion process 


    time_now = datetime.now() ### ingested_datetime
    definitions = json_config_dict['definitions']
    for defs in definitions:
        standardised_container = "abfss://odw-standardised@"+storage_acc_name+".dfs.core.windows.net/" 
        standardised_table_name = defs['Standardised_Table_Name']
        standardised_path = defs['Standardised_Path'] + "/"
        standardised_table_loc = "abfss://odw-config@"+storage_acc_name+".dfs.core.windows.net/" + defs['Standardised_Table_Definition']
        standardised_table_def_json = spark.read.text(standardised_table_loc, wholetext=True).first().value
        create_table_from_schema(standardised_table_def_json, "odw_standardised_db", standardised_table_name,standardised_container , standardised_path+standardised_table_name)
        
        cronstart = defs['Completion_Frequency_CRON']
        deltadays = defs['Expected_Within_Weekdays']
        
        ### ignore any adhoc file being ingested
        if cronstart == 'Adhoc':
            continue

        iter_start = croniter(cronstart, time_now)
        last_start_dt = iter_start.get_prev(datetime) ### expected from
        
        next_end_dt = last_start_dt + timedelta(days=deltadays) ### expected to
    
        ### check if the file is being expected right now, less than with the expected_to value means no overlaps in expected periods
        if last_start_dt <= time_now < next_end_dt: 
            folder_available = False
            standardised_table_df = spark.read.format("delta").load(standardised_container+standardised_path+standardised_table_name)
            rows = standardised_table_df.filter((standardised_table_df.expected_from == last_start_dt) &  (standardised_table_df.expected_to == next_end_dt)).count()
            ### check if the file has already been ingested
            if rows > 0 :
                folder_available = True
                logger.info("File has already been ingested")
            else:
                source_container_path = "abfss://odw-raw@"+storage_acc_name+".dfs.core.windows.net/" # defs['Source_Container_Path'] + "/"
                if defs["Source_Frequency_Folder"] == "":
                    source_folder =  defs['Source_Folder'] +"/"
                ### handle weekly / monthly sub folders
                else:                            
                    source_folder =  defs['Source_Folder'] +"/"+ defs["Source_Frequency_Folder"] + "/"
                ### find correct weekly folder 
                date_folders = mssparkutils.fs.ls(source_container_path+source_folder)
                for datex in date_folders:
                    date_string = datex.name
                    ### handle YYYY-MM-DD dates
                    if len(date_string) == 10:
                        folder_date = datetime.strptime(date_string, "%Y-%m-%d")
                    ### handle YYYY-MM dates
                    elif len(date_string) == 7:
                        folder_date = datetime.strptime(date_string, "%Y-%m")
                        folder_date = date(folder_date.year, folder_date.month, calendar.monthrange(folder_date.year, folder_date.month)[-1]) + timedelta(days=1)
                        folder_date = datetime.combine(folder_date, datetime.min.time())
                    else:
                        raise ValueError("Date format in raw folder is incorrect, should be YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM")
                    
                    if last_start_dt <= folder_date < next_end_dt:
                        folder_available = True
                        source_folder_with_date = mssparkutils.fs.ls(source_container_path+source_folder+date_string)
                        if source_folder_with_date == []:
                            error_folder_string = source_container_path+source_folder+date_string
                            raise RuntimeError(f"Folder is empty within {error_folder_string}")
                        file_available = False
                        for file in source_folder_with_date:
                            ### isolate the correct file
                            filename = file.name 
                            if defs['Source_Filename_Start'] in filename:
                                file_available = True
                                
                                ### mount the data lake storage in Synapse to the Synapse File Mount API
                                jobId = mssparkutils.env.getJobId()
                                mssparkutils.fs.unmount("/temp_raw") 
                                mssparkutils.fs.mount( 
                                source_container_path+source_folder+date_string, 
                                "/temp_raw", 
                                {"linkedService":"ls_storage"} 
                                )   
                                ### open .csv and .xlsx files using pandas
                                if ".xlsx" in filename.lower():
                                    sheet_name = defs['Source_Sheet_Name'] if 'Source_Sheet_Name' in defs else 0
                                    df = pd.read_excel(f"/synfs/{jobId}/temp_raw/{filename}", dtype=str, sheet_name=sheet_name)
                                elif '.csv' in filename.lower():
                                    df = pd.read_csv(f"/synfs/{jobId}/temp_raw/{filename}", quotechar='"',escapechar='\\',encoding="utf8",dtype=str)
                                else:
                                    raise RuntimeError(f"This file type for {filename} is unsupported")
                                ### drop headerless columns
                                df = df.loc[:, ~df.columns.str.contains('^Unnamed')]
                                rows_raw = len(df.index)
                                mssparkutils.fs.unmount("/temp_raw") 
                                ### convert to pandas dataframe
                                sparkDF=spark.createDataFrame(df)
                                ### add date columns included with every standardised table
                                sparkDF = sparkDF.withColumn("ingested_datetime",lit(datetime.now()))
                                sparkDF = sparkDF.withColumn("expected_from",lit(last_start_dt))
                                sparkDF = sparkDF.withColumn("expected_to",lit(next_end_dt))
                                schema = StructType.fromJson(json.loads(standardised_table_def_json))

                                
                                ### remove characters that Delta can't allow in headers and add numbers to repeated column headers
                                cols_orig = sparkDF.schema.names
                                cols=[re.sub('[^0-9a-zA-Z]+', '_', i).lower() for i in cols_orig] 
                                cols=[colm.rstrip('_') for colm in cols]
                                newlist = []
                                for i, v in enumerate(cols):
                                    totalcount = cols.count(v)
                                    count = cols[:i].count(v)
                                    newlist.append(v + str(count + 1) if totalcount > 1 else v)
                                for colix in range(len(cols_orig)):
                                    sparkDF = sparkDF.toDF(*newlist) 
                                
                                ### mappings for Json schema definitions to Pyspark data types
                                mapping = {
                                    'string': StringType(),
                                    'timestamp': TimestampType(),
                                    'integer': IntegerType(),
                                    'date': DateType(),
                                    'float': FloatType()
                                }

                                ### column data type casting
                                for field in json.loads(standardised_table_def_json)['fields']:
                                    sparkDF = sparkDF.withColumn(field['name'], col(field['name']).cast(mapping[field['type']]))
                                colheaders = []
                                for field in json.loads(standardised_table_def_json)['fields']:
                                    colheaders.append(field['name'])
                                sparkDF = sparkDF.select(colheaders)
                                sparkDF2 = spark.createDataFrame(sparkDF.rdd, schema=schema)
                                ### writing the dataframe to the existing standardised table
                                sparkDF2.write.format("delta").mode("append").saveAsTable(f"odw_standardised_db.{standardised_table_name}")

                                standardised_table_df_new = spark.read.format("delta").load(standardised_container+standardised_path+standardised_table_name)
                                rows_new = standardised_table_df.filter((standardised_table_df.expected_from == last_start_dt) &  (standardised_table_df.expected_to == next_end_dt)).count()
                                ### test correct number of rows have written
                                if rows_raw == rows_new:
                                    mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(source_container_path+"archive"+"/"+source_folder+date_string+"/")
                                    mssparkutils.fs.cp(source_container_path+source_folder+date_string+"/"+filename,source_container_path+"archive"+"/"+source_folder+date_string+"/"+filename)
                                    logger.info('All rows have successfully written')
                                
                                ### delete transaction if incorrect number of rows has written and raise an error
                                else:
                                    ### add to outstanding files table?
                                    deltaTable_standardised = DeltaTable.forPath(spark, standardised_container+standardised_path+standardised_table_name)
                                    fullHistoryDF = deltaTable_standardised.history()    # get the full history of the table
                                    fullHistoryDF.select("version").first()['version']
                                    deltaTable_standardised.restoreToVersion(fullHistoryDF.select("version").first()['version'] - 1)
                                    raise RuntimeError(f"Incorrect number of rows have been written to the standardised table {standardised_table_name}, rolled back to original version")

                        if file_available==False:
                            outstanding_struct_schema = StructType.fromJson(json.loads(outstanding_files_table_json))
                            new_outst_file = spark.createDataFrame([[last_start_dt, defs['Source_ID']]], outstanding_struct_schema)
                            outstanding_df = spark.read.format("delta").load("abfss://odw-standardised@"+storage_acc_name+".dfs.core.windows.net/config/raw_to_std_outstanding_files")
                            outstanding_df = outstanding_df.union(new_outst_file).dropDuplicates()
                            outstanding_df.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").save("abfss://odw-standardised@"+storage_acc_name+".dfs.core.windows.net/config/raw_to_std_outstanding_files")
            if folder_available==False:
                outstanding_struct_schema = StructType.fromJson(json.loads(outstanding_files_table_json))
                new_outst_file = spark.createDataFrame([[last_start_dt, defs['Source_ID']]], outstanding_struct_schema)
                outstanding_df = spark.read.format("delta").load("abfss://odw-standardised@"+storage_acc_name+".dfs.core.windows.net/config/raw_to_std_outstanding_files")
                outstanding_df = outstanding_df.union(new_outst_file).dropDuplicates()
                outstanding_df.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").save("abfss://odw-standardised@"+storage_acc_name+".dfs.core.windows.net/config/raw_to_std_outstanding_files")
ingest_raw_to_standardised()

        THEN CONCAT('00',Staff_Number)
        WHEN LENGTH(Staff_Number) = 6 AND SUBSTR(Staff_Number,1,1) = 4
        THEN CONCAT('50',Staff_Number)        
        ELSE Staff_Number
    END as Staff_Number,
    Street_and_House_Number,
    `2nd_Address_Line`,

INNER JOIN (SELECT MAX(expected_from) AS Max_expectedfrom FROM odw_standardised_db.hr_addresses) MEF ON T1.expected_from = MEF.Max_expectedfrom

from notebookutils import mssparkutils

json_schema_path = harmonised_storage_container + '/' + json_schema_folder

print('json_schema_path '+json_schema_path)

files = mssparkutils.fs.ls(json_schema_path)

json_schema_files = []

for fi in files:
  json_schema_files.append(fi.name)

json_string_list=[]

for file_name in json_schema_files:
    json_schema_file_path = json_schema_path + '/' + file_name
    df=spark.read.text(json_schema_file_path)

    json_string = ""

    for item in table:
        json_string += item

    json_string_list.append(json_string)

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, DataType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, IntegerType, StringType ,DoubleType
from delta.tables import DeltaTable
from notebookutils import mssparkutils
import sys, traceback
import json

schema_list=[]
i=0

archive_folder = harmonised_storage_container + '/json_schema/amend/old' 

for json_string in json_string_list:
    json_file = ''
    try:
        json_file = json_schema_path+json_schema_files[i]
        table_name= json_schema_files[i].split('.')[0]
        print('---------Amending table '+table_name)
        print('---------from file '+json_file)
        schema = StructType.fromJson(json.loads(json_string))

        harmonised_storage_delta_table_path = harmonised_storage_container + '/' + harmonised_storage_delta_folder + '/' + table_name
        mssparkutils.fs.rm(harmonised_storage_delta_table_path, True)
        spark.sql("DROP TABLE IF EXISTS {0}.{1}".format(delta_lake_database_name,table_name))
        
        harmonisationInspectordf = spark.createDataFrame([], schema)
        harmonisationInspectordf.write.option("mergeSchema", "true").format('delta').mode('overwrite').save(harmonised_storage_delta_table_path)
        spark.sql("CREATE TABLE {0}.{1} USING DELTA LOCATION '{2}'".format(delta_lake_database_name,table_name,harmonised_storage_delta_table_path))
        mssparkutils.fs.mv(json_file, archive_folder)
        print('---------Table is amended')
    except Exception as e:
        print('------------Error in File '+json_file)
        traceback.print_exc(file=sys.stdout)
    i += 1

from notebookutils import mssparkutils

json_schema_path = harmonised_storage_container + '/' + json_schema_folder

print('json_schema_path '+json_schema_path)

files = mssparkutils.fs.ls(json_schema_path)

json_schema_files = []

for fi in files:
  json_schema_files.append(fi.name)

json_string_list=[]

for file_name in json_schema_files:
    json_schema_file_path = json_schema_path + '/' + file_name
    df=spark.read.text(json_schema_file_path)
    table = [x["value"] for x in df.rdd.collect()]
    json_string = ""

    for item in table:
        json_string += item

    json_string_list.append(json_string)

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, DataType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, IntegerType, StringType ,DoubleType
from delta.tables import DeltaTable
from notebookutils import mssparkutils
import sys, traceback
import json

schema_list=[]
i=0

archive_folder = harmonised_storage_container + '/json_schema/create_table/old' 

for json_string in json_string_list:
    json_file = ''
    try:
        json_file = json_schema_path+json_schema_files[i]
        table_name= json_schema_files[i].split('.')[0]
        print('---------creating table '+table_name)
        print('---------from file '+json_file)
        schema = StructType.fromJson(json.loads(json_string))
        harmonised_storage_delta_table_path = harmonised_storage_container + '/' + harmonised_storage_delta_folder + '/' + table_name

        if not (DeltaTable.isDeltaTable(spark,harmonised_storage_delta_table_path)):
            harmonisationInspectordf = spark.createDataFrame([], schema)
            harmonisationInspectordf.write.option("mergeSchema", "true").format('delta').mode('overwrite').save(harmonised_storage_delta_table_path)
            spark.sql("CREATE TABLE {0}.{1} USING DELTA LOCATION '{2}'".format(delta_lake_database_name,table_name,harmonised_storage_delta_table_path))
            mssparkutils.fs.mv(json_file, archive_folder)
    except Exception as e:
        print('------------Error in File '+json_file)
        traceback.print_exc(file=sys.stdout)
    i += 1

This notebook creates views over the SAP HR data to ensure all Staff_Number or Pers_No columns are aligned.

**Method**

1. If the 6-digit SAP code starts with a 4, it can also be found prefixed with 50
2. If the 6-digit SAP code starts with a 5, it can also be found prefixed with 00


**SQL Code**

```
    CASE 
        WHEN LENGTH(Staff_Number) = 6 AND SUBSTR(Staff_Number,1,1) = 5 
        THEN concat('00',Staff_Number) 
        WHEN LENGTH(Staff_Number) = 6 AND SUBSTR(Staff_Number,1,1) = 4 
        THEN concat('50',Staff_Number)
        ELSE Staff_Number
    End as Staff_Number
```

%%sql

-- Creates view odw_standardised_db.vw_absences

CREATE VIEW odw_standardised_db.vw_absences
    AS 
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN LENGTH(Staff_Number) = 6 AND SUBSTR(Staff_Number,1,1) = 5 
            THEN concat('00',Staff_Number) 
            WHEN LENGTH(Staff_Number) = 6 AND SUBSTR(Staff_Number,1,1) = 4 
            THEN concat('50',Staff_Number)
            ELSE Staff_Number
        End as Staff_Number,
        Abs_Type,
        Sickness_Group,
        Start_Date,
        End_Date,
        Attendance_or_Absence_Type,
        Days,
        Hrs,
        Start,
        End_time,
        Cal_days,
        Work_Schedule_Rule,
        Wk_Hrs,
        Hrs_Day,
        WkDys,
        Annual_Leave_Start 
    FROM odw_standardised_db.absences;

%%sql

-- Creates view odw_standardised_db.vw_addresses

CREATE VIEW odw_standardised_db.vw_addresses
    AS 
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN LENGTH(Staff_Number) = 6 AND SUBSTR(Staff_Number,1,1) = 5 
            THEN concat('00',Staff_Number) 
            WHEN LENGTH(Staff_Number) = 6 AND SUBSTR(Staff_Number,1,1) = 4 
            THEN concat('50',Staff_Number)
            ELSE Staff_Number
        End as Staff_Number,
        Street_and_House_Number,
        `2nd_Address_Line`,
        City,
        District,
        Postal_Code,
        Region_State_Province_Count,
        Start_Date,
        End_Date,
        Charting_Officer,
        Charting_Officer_for_Inspector,
        Subs_PS_Group,
        Tel_No,
        Personal_Mobile,
        Work_Mobile,
        Chngd_on
        
    FROM odw_standardised_db.addresses;

%%sql

    AS

            WHEN LENGTH(Staff_Number) = 6 AND SUBSTR(Staff_Number,1,1) = 4

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, IntegerType, StringType
pipeline_run_folder_path = config_storage_container + '/' + config_storage_audit_folder + '/' + confi_storage_audit_table_name 

schema = StructType([
    StructField("sourceName", StringType(), True), StructField("LastRun", StringType(), False)
])

# or df = sc.parallelize([]).toDF(schema)

# Spark < 2.0 
# sqlContext.createDataFrame([], schema)

%%sql
select 'sap_hr' as source_name , max(PDAC_ETL_Date ) as max_PDAC_ETL_Date from odw_workspace_db.sap_hr_layer1_harmonised

%%sql
drop table if exists odw_workspace_db.sap_hr_layer1_harmonised;
create table odw_workspace_db.sap_hr_layer1_harmonised as 
SELECT
        SHR.Pers_No
        ,case LEFT( SHR.Pers_No, 2)
		when '50' then case char_length(SHR.Pers_No) 
			when 6 then  SHR.Pers_No
			else substring(cast( SHR.Pers_No as varchar(50)), 3, char_length(cast( SHR.Pers_No as varchar(50))))
				end
			else  SHR.Pers_No
					end as PINS_Join_staff_number
        ,case when SHR.PS_group = 'BAND 1' and SHR.Contract_Type = 'Fixed Term Contract' then 'FTC-B1'
		  when SHR.PS_group = 'BAND 2' and SHR.Contract_Type = 'Fixed Term Contract' then 'FTC-B2'
		  when SHR.PS_group = 'BAND 3' and SHR.Contract_Type = 'Fixed Term Contract' then 'FTC-B3'
		  when SHR.PS_group = 'BAND 1' and SHR.Contract_Type <> 'Fixed Term Contract' then 'B1'
		  when SHR.PS_group = 'BAND 2' and SHR.Contract_Type <> 'Fixed Term Contract' then 'B2'
		  when SHR.PS_group = 'BAND 3' and SHR.Contract_Type <> 'Fixed Term Contract' then 'B3'
		  else SHR.PS_group end as PINS_join_grade
        ,Pers_No as pins_staff_number
		,First_name  given_names
        ,Last_name family_name
        ,Employment_Status active_status
		,ROUND(SHR.FTE,2) FTE
		,case 
              when SHR.Position1 = 'Inspector Manager' then 1 
             else 0 end as is_sgl
		,SHR.Work_Contract
		,case SHR.Work_Contract
	        when 'Non-Sal. Inspec' then 'Non-Salaried Inspector'
	        else SHR.Organizational_Unit
	    end as resource_code
		,case left(SHR.PS_group, 3)
		when 'FTC' then 'FTC'
		when 'NSI' then 'NSI'
		else 'Salaried'		
	    end as emp_type ,
		PDAC_ETL_Date         	
	FROM default.sap_hr as SHR
	where PDAC_ETL_Date > (select LastRun from odw_config_db.pipeline_runs where sourceName ='sap_hr' )	;
%%sql
select 'sap_hr' as source_name , max(PDAC_ETL_Date ) as max_PDAC_ETL_Date from odw_workspace_db.sap_hr_layer1_harmonised

%%sql
merge into odw_config_db.pipeline_runs target
using (select 'sap_hr' as source_name , max(PDAC_ETL_Date ) as max_PDAC_ETL_Date from odw_workspace_db.sap_hr_layer1_harmonised ) updates
on target.sourceName=updates.source_name
WHEN MATCHED THEN
  UPDATE SET target.LastRun = updates.max_PDAC_ETL_Date
WHEN NOT MATCHED
  THEN INSERT (sourceName,LastRun) VALUES (source_name, max_PDAC_ETL_Date)
%%sql
select * from odw_config_db.pipeline_runs
%%sql
delete from odw_config_db.pipeline_runs

%%sql
merge into odw_harmonised_db.inspector target
using (SELECT 
case when inspector_raw.id is null then ROW_NUMBER() over (order by sap_hr.Pers_No,sap_hr.given_names,sap_hr.family_name) +1000000 
else inspector_raw.id end as source_id 
,sap_hr.pins_staff_number
,sap_hr.given_names
,sap_hr.family_name as family_names
,concat(sap_hr.given_names,' ',sap_hr.family_name) as inspector_name
,inspector_address.inspector_postcode as inspector_postcode
,sap_hr.active_status
,inspector_address.date_in
,inspector_address.date_out
,inspector_address.Charting_Officer_for_Inspector as eo_responsible
,sap_hr.PINS_join_grade as grade
,sap_hr.FTE as FTE
,inspector_address.Inspector_Address
,inspector_address.Telephone_no
,inspector_address.Work_Mobile
,sap_hr.is_sgl
,case when (sap_hr.Work_Contract = 'Non-Sal. Inspec' and sap_hr.active_status = 'ACTIVE') then 'nsi.planning@planninginspectorate.gov.uk'
      else coalesce(vw_sap_hr_email.email_address, vw_sap_hr_email_weekly.email_address ,sap_pins_email.Email_Address, NULL) 
 end as pins_email_address
,sap_hr.resource_code
,sap_hr.emp_type
 FROM 
 odw_workspace_db.sap_hr_layer1_harmonised sap_hr
 LEFT OUTER JOIN
 odw_workspace_db.inspector_address_layer1_harmonised inspector_address
 ON sap_hr.pins_staff_number = inspector_address.PINS_Join_staff_number
 LEFT OUTER JOIN
 odw_workspace_db.inspector_raw_layer1_harmonised inspector_raw
 ON sap_hr.pins_join_staff_number = inspector_raw.PINS_Join_staff_number
 and sap_hr.PINS_join_grade = inspector_raw.Grade
 LEFT OUTER JOIN
 odw_workspace_db.sap_pins_email_layer1_harmonised sap_pins_email
 ON sap_hr.PINS_Join_staff_number = sap_pins_email.Staff_Number
 LEFT OUTER JOIN
 odw_workspace_db.vw_sap_hr_email_layer1_harmonised vw_sap_hr_email
 ON sap_hr.pins_staff_number = vw_sap_hr_email.PINS_Join_staff_number 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN
 odw_workspace_db.vw_sap_hr_email_weekly_layer1_harmonised vw_sap_hr_email_weekly
 ON sap_hr.pins_staff_number = vw_sap_hr_email_weekly.PINS_Join_staff_number ) updates
on target.source_id=updates.source_id
WHEN MATCHED THEN
  UPDATE SET *
WHEN NOT MATCHED
  THEN INSERT *

from notebookutils import mssparkutils
path_to_file = "abfss://odw-config@pinsstodwdevuks9h80mb.dfs.core.windows.net/schema_creation/"
file = mssparkutils.fs.ls(path_to_file)
path_to_target = "abfss://odw-config@pinsstodwdevuks9h80mb.dfs.core.windows.net/standardised_table_definitions/Casework_Adhoc/"

# array of file names with corresponding sheet name
files_with_specific_sheets = [{"filename": "Specialist_TPO.xlsx", "sheet": "MiPINS-SQL"}]

import pandas as pd
import json
import re

jobId = mssparkutils.env.getJobId()
mssparkutils.fs.unmount("/schema") 
mssparkutils.fs.unmount("/source") 
mssparkutils.fs.unmount("/target") 
mssparkutils.fs.mount(path_to_file, 
"/source", 
{"linkedService":"ls_storage"} 
)   
mssparkutils.fs.mount(path_to_target, 
"/target", 
{"linkedService":"ls_storage"} 
)   
for fi in file:
    f = fi.path
    print(f)
    if '.csv' in f:
        ext = '.csv'
        filename = f.split("/")[-1]
        df = pd.read_csv(f"/synfs/{jobId}/source/{filename}", quotechar='"',escapechar='\\',encoding="utf8",dtype=str)
    elif '.xlsx' in f:
        ext = '.xlsx'
        filename = f.split("/")[-1]
        file_with_specific_sheet = next(filter(lambda fs: fs['filename'] == filename, files_with_specific_sheets), None)
        sheet_name = file_with_specific_sheet['sheet'] if file_with_specific_sheet else 0
        df = pd.read_excel(f"/synfs/{jobId}/source/{filename}", dtype=str, sheet_name=sheet_name)
    else:
        continue
    df = df.loc[:, ~df.columns.str.contains('^Unnamed')]
    cols_orig = list(df.columns)
    cols=[re.sub('[^0-9a-zA-Z]+', '_', i).lower() for i in cols_orig]
    cols=[colm.rstrip('_') for colm in cols]
    newlist = []
    for i, v in enumerate(cols):
        totalcount = cols.count(v)
        count = cols[:i].count(v)
        newlist.append(v + str(count + 1) if totalcount > 1 else v)

    jsonex = {"fields":[
            {
            "metadata": {},
            "name": "ingested_datetime",
            "type": "timestamp",
            "nullable": False
            },
            {
            "metadata": {},
            "name": "expected_from",
            "type": "timestamp",
            "nullable": False
            },
            {
            "metadata": {},
            "name": "expected_to",
            "type": "timestamp",
            "nullable": False
            }]}
    for col in newlist:
        obj = {
            "metadata": {},
            "name": col,
            "type": "string",
            "nullable": True
            }
        jsonex['fields'].append(obj)
    filename_no_ext = f.split("/")[-1].split(ext)[0]
    json_to_write = json.dumps(jsonex)
    f = open(f"/synfs/{jobId}/target/{filename_no_ext}.json", "w")
    f.write(json_to_write)
    f.close()

%%sql
drop table if exists odw_workspace_db.inspector_raw_layer1_harmonised;
create table odw_workspace_db.inspector_raw_layer1_harmonised as 
SELECT
		id
		,case LEFT( r.PINS_Staff_Number, 2)
		when '50' then case char_length(r.PINS_Staff_Number) 
		when 6 then  r.PINS_Staff_Number
		else substring(cast( r.PINS_Staff_Number as varchar(50)), 3, char_length(cast( r.PINS_staff_Number as varchar(50))))
			end
		else  r.PINS_Staff_Number
			end PINS_Join_staff_number
		, r.Family_Name 
		,left(r.given_names
		, case when instr(' ', r.Given_Names)=0 then char_length(r.Given_Names) else instr(' ', r.Given_Names)- 1 end) as JOIN_Last_Name
		,r.Grade
		,r.PDAC_ETL_Date
 FROM odw_standardised_db.inspector_raw r
where r.PDAC_ETL_Date > (select LastRun from odw_config_db.pipeline_runs where sourceName ='inspector_raw' )

using (select 'inspector_raw' as source_name , max(PDAC_ETL_Date ) as max_PDAC_ETL_Date from odw_workspace_db.sap_hr_layer1_harmonised ) updates
on target.sourceName=updates.source_name
WHEN MATCHED THEN
  UPDATE SET target.LastRun = updates.max_PDAC_ETL_Date
WHEN NOT MATCHED
  THEN INSERT (sourceName,LastRun) VALUES (source_name, max_PDAC_ETL_Date)

def logging_to_appins(func):
    import functools
    from notebookutils import mssparkutils
    from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
    spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()

    @functools.wraps(func)
    def wrapper(*args, **kwargs):
        from notebookutils import mssparkutils
        

        import logging
        from opencensus.ext.azure.log_exporter import AzureLogHandler
        
        logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
        logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)
        if True in [type(handle) == AzureLogHandler for handle in logger.handlers]:
            pass
        else:
            kvname = "example"
            key = mssparkutils.credentials.getSecretWithLS("ls_kv", "application-insights-connection-string")
            logger.addHandler(AzureLogHandler(
            connection_string=key.split(";")[0])
            )
        args_repr = [repr(a) for a in args]
        kwargs_repr = [f"{k}={v!r}" for k, v in kwargs.items()]
        signature = ", ".join(args_repr + kwargs_repr)
        logger.info(f"function {func.__name__} called with args {signature}")
        try:
            result = func(*args, **kwargs)
            return result
        except mssparkutils.handlers.notebookHandler.NotebookExit as e:
            logger.info(f"Notebook exited with value {e}")
            mssparkutils.notebook.exit(e)
        except Exception as e:
            logger.exception(e)
            raise e
    return wrapper

properties.description: This is a python script which automates the creation of tables, for data which was moved from odw_harmoised to odw_config

source: %run "utils/py_logging_decorator"
%run  /0-odw-source-to-raw/Fileshare/SAP_HR/py_0_source_to_raw_hr_functions

@logging_to_appins
def automation_table_creation():
    '''
    This function check for existing table for specific json file in a delta folder and if the data has been already used, 
    the message Table already exists with correct location will be displayed.
    Otherwise, the tables will be created using the create_table_from_schema schema 
    '''


    ### establish connection to azure files and create client
    from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
    spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()


    from notebookutils import mssparkutils
    storage_account= spark.sparkContext.environment.get('dataLakeAccountName', 'get') + ".dfs.core.windows.net"

   
    #asigning the location of the container and the folder for the parquete files 
    harmonised_storage_container = 'abfss://odw-harmonised@' + storage_account
    harmonised_storage_delta_folder = 'lib/'
    delta_lake_database_name = "odw_harmonised_db"


    #asigning a value/loaction for the schemas
    config_storage_container = 'abfss://odw-config@' + storage_account
    json_schema_folder='harmonised_table_definitions'


    #import of utilities
    from notebookutils import mssparkutils
    #asigning a path to find the schema files 
    json_schema_path = config_storage_container + '/' + json_schema_folder


    #print('json_schema_path '+json_schema_path)


    files = mssparkutils.fs.ls(json_schema_path)
    #looping through the files 
    for file in files:
        #print(file)
        #json_schema=spark.read.text("abfss://odw-config@"+storage_acc_name+".dfs.core.windows.net/[enter path here]", wholetext=True).first().value
        #asigning the path to each json_schema from the contents of the each file
        json_schema=spark.read.text(file.path, wholetext=True).first().value
        #creating table while looping through the files so we can change the schemas, file name, and folder based on the file info
        create_table_from_schema(json_schema, delta_lake_database_name,file.name.lower().split('.json')[0],harmonised_storage_container+"/",harmonised_storage_delta_folder+file.name.lower().split('.json')[0]) 

   
#calling the function 
automation_table_creation()

%%sql

-- Build SourceSystem_Fact table
-- INSERT OVERWRITE achieves the same as a TRUNCATE TABLE and INSERT INTO but in one statement

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.sourcesystem_fact (
    SourceSystemID,
    Description,
    StartDate,
    EndDate,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID
)

SELECT
    NULL AS SourceSystemID,
    "SAP HR" AS Description,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS StartDate, 
    NULL AS EndDate,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5("SAP HR") as RowID
;

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.sourcesystem_fact (
    SourceSystemID,
    Description,
    StartDate,
    EndDate,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID
)

SELECT
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY Description NULLS LAST) AS SourceSystemID,
    Description,
    StartDate, 
    EndDate,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID
FROM odw_harmonised_db.sourcesystem_fact

%%sql
-- Build diversity_dim table


-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW diversity_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Ethnic_Origin IS NULL
        THEN first(T3.DiversityID)
        ELSE NULL
    END as DiversityID, -- surrogate key
    Ethnic_Origin AS Description,
    first(T2.SourceSystemID) as SourceSystemID, -- NOT CORRECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS StartDate,
    NULL AS EndDate,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(Ethnic_Origin) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Ethnic_Origin = first(T3.Description) AND md5(concat(T1.Ethnic_Origin)) <> first(T3.RowID)     
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN first(T3.Description) IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Ethnic_Origin IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData

FROM odw_standardised_db.personal_characteristics T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.diversity_dim T3 ON T1.Ethnic_Origin = T3.Description
WHERE  (T3.IsActive = 'Y' or T3.IsActive IS NULL)
    
        AND (
        
        -- flags new data        
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.Ethnic_Origin = T3.Description AND md5(concat(T1.Ethnic_Origin)) <> T3.RowID
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T3.Description IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.Ethnic_Origin IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )

    AND

        T1.Ethnic_Origin IS NOT NULL

GROUP BY T1.Ethnic_Origin

;

-- Create new and updated dataset

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY  VIEW diversity_dim_changed_rows

    AS

-- gets updated, deleted and new rows 

Select 

    DiversityID,
    Description, 
    SourceSystemID,
    StartDate,
    EndDate,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
From diversity_dim_new

    UNION ALL

-- gets original versions of updated rows so we can update EndDate and set IsActive flag to 'N'

SELECT
    DiversityID,
    Description,
    SourceSystemID,
    StartDate,
    EndDate,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.diversity_dim
WHERE Description IN (SELECT Description FROM diversity_dim_new); -- gets original versions of updated rows

-- merge into fact table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.diversity_dim AS Target
USING diversity_dim_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.DiversityID = Target.DiversityID

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.EndDate = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;   

-- Insert new DiversityID

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.diversity_dim

SELECT 
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY DiversityID NULLS LAST) AS DiversityID, 
    Description, 
    SourceSystemID,
    StartDate,
    EndDate,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.diversity_dim;

Select * FROM odw_harmonised_db.diversity_dim;

%%sql
-- Build disability_dim table
INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.disability_dim (
    DisabilityID,
    DisabilityCode,
    Description,
    SourceSystemID,
    StartDate,
    EndDate,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo
)

SELECT
    uuid() AS DisabilityID,
    Disability_Text AS DisabilityCode,
    Disability_Code_Description AS Description, 
    first(T2.SourceSystemID) as SourceSystemID, 
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS StartDate,
    '9999-12-31' AS EndDate,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo
FROM odw_standardised_db.personal_characteristics T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description
GROUP BY Disability_Text, Disability_Code_Description;

FROM odw_standardised_db.personal_characteristics T1

GROUP BY Religion, Religious_Denomination_Key;

%%sql
-- Build and merge secureinfo_fact table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.secureinfo_fact AS Target
USING ( SELECT
            uuid() AS SecureInfoID, -- surrogate key
            T1.Ref_No AS SourceID, -- source system id
            T3.DisabilityID,
            T4.DiversityID,
            T5.ReligionID,
            T6.SXOID, 
            T2.SourceSystemID,
            CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS StartDate,
            '9999-12-31' AS EndDate,
            CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
            NULL AS ValidTo,
            md5(concat(Ref_No,DisabilityID,DiversityID,ReligionID,SXOID)) as RowID,
            'Y' as IsActive

        FROM odw_standardised_db.personal_characteristics T1
        LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description
        LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.disability_dim T3 ON (T1.Disability_Text = T3.DisabilityCode  AND T1.Disability_Code_Description = T3.Description)
        LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.diversity_dim T4 ON T1.Ethnic_Origin = T4.Description
        LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.religion_dim T5 ON (T1.Religion = T5.ReligionCode  AND T1.Religious_Denomination_Key = T5.Description)
        LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sxo_dim T6 ON T1.SxO = T6.Description
    ) AS Source

ON Source.SourceID = Target.SourceID

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED AND Target.RowID <> Source.RowID
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.EndDate = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;    

-- Insert changed data as new row

INSERT INTO odw_harmonised_db.secureinfo_fact (
    SecureInfoID,
    SourceID,
    DisabilityID,
    DiversityID,
    ReligionID,
    SXOID,
    SourceSystemID,
    StartDate,
    EndDate,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
)

SELECT
    uuid() AS SecureInfoID, -- surrogate key
    T1.Ref_No AS SourceID, -- source system id
    T3.DisabilityID,
    T4.DiversityID,
    T5.ReligionID,
    T6.SXOID, 
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS StartDate,
    'null' AS EndDate,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(T1.Ref_No, T3.DisabilityID, T4.DiversityID, T5.ReligionID, T6.SXOID)) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive
FROM odw_standardised_db.personal_characteristics T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.disability_dim T3 ON (T1.Disability_Text = T3.DisabilityCode  AND T1.Disability_Code_Description = T3.Description)
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.diversity_dim T4 ON T1.Ethnic_Origin = T4.Description
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.religion_dim T5 ON (T1.Religion = T5.ReligionCode  AND T1.Religious_Denomination_Key = T5.Description)
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sxo_dim T6 ON T1.SxO = T6.Description
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.secureinfo_fact T7 ON T1.Ref_No = T7.SourceID
WHERE T1.Ref_No = T7.SourceID AND md5(concat(T1.Ref_No, T3.DisabilityID, T4.DiversityID, T5.ReligionID, T6.SXOID)) <> T7.RowID;

-- Deactivate old rows

UPDATE odw_harmonised_db.secureinfo_fact
    SET T1.IsActive = 'N',
        T1.EndDate = date_sub(current_timestamp,1)
    FROM odw_harmonised_db.secureinfo_fact T1
        LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.personal_characteristics T2 ON T1.SourceID = T2.Ref_No
        WHERE T2.Ref_No IS NULL 
    
    -- Where SourceID IN 
    -- (
    --     SELECT SourceID
    --     FROM odw_harmonised_db.secureinfo_fact T1
    --     LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.personal_characteristics T2 ON T1.SourceID = T2.Ref_No
    --     WHERE T2.Ref_No IS NULL
    -- )

%%sql  

-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW secureinfo_fact_new 

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Ref_No IS NULL
        THEN T7.SecureInfoID
        ELSE NULL
    END as SecureInfoID, -- surrogate key
    T1.Ref_No AS SourceID, -- source system id
    T3.DisabilityID,
    T4.DiversityID,
    T5.ReligionID,
    T6.SXOID, 
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS StartDate,
    'null' AS EndDate,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(T1.Ref_No, T3.DisabilityID, T4.DiversityID, T5.ReligionID, T6.SXOID)) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Ref_No = T7.SourceID AND md5(concat(T1.Ref_No, T3.DisabilityID, T4.DiversityID, T5.ReligionID, T6.SXOID)) <> T7.RowID    -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T7.SourceID IS NULL -- new employee
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Ref_No IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData

FROM odw_standardised_db.personal_characteristics T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.disability_dim T3 ON (T1.Disability_Text = T3.DisabilityCode  AND T1.Disability_Code_Description = T3.Description)
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.diversity_dim T4 ON T1.Ethnic_Origin = T4.Description
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.religion_dim T5 ON (T1.Religion = T5.ReligionCode  AND T1.Religious_Denomination_Key = T5.Description)
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sxo_dim T6 ON T1.SxO = T6.Description
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.secureinfo_fact T7 ON T1.Ref_No = T7.SourceID
WHERE  (T7.IsActive = 'Y' or T7.IsActive IS NULL)
    
        AND (
        
        -- flags new data        
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.Ref_No = T7.SourceID AND md5(concat(T1.Ref_No, T3.DisabilityID, T4.DiversityID, T5.ReligionID, T6.SXOID)) <> T7.RowID     
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T7.SourceID IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.Ref_No IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
)
;

-- Create new and updated dataset

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY  VIEW secureinfo_fact_changed_rows

    AS

-- gets updated, deleted and new rows 

Select 

    SecureInfoID, -- surrogate key
    SourceID, -- source system id
    DisabilityID,
    DiversityID,
    ReligionID,
    SXOID, 
    SourceSystemID,
    StartDate,
    EndDate,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
From secureinfo_fact_new

    UNION ALL

-- gets original versions of updated rows so we can update EndDate and set IsActive flag to 'N'

SELECT
    SecureInfoID, -- surrogate key
    SourceID, -- source system id
    DisabilityID,
    DiversityID,
    ReligionID,
    SXOID, 
    SourceSystemID,
    StartDate,
    EndDate,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.secureinfo_fact
WHERE SourceID IN (SELECT SourceID FROM secureinfo_fact_new); -- gets original versions of updated rows

-- merge into fact table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.secureinfo_fact AS Target
USING secureinfo_fact_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.SecureInfoID = Target.SecureInfoID

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.EndDate = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;   

-- Insert new SecureInfoID

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.secureinfo_fact 

SELECT 
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SecureInfoID NULLS LAST) AS SecureInfoID, 
    SourceID, 
    DisabilityID,
    DiversityID,
    ReligionID,
    SXOID, 
    SourceSystemID,
    StartDate,
    EndDate,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.secureinfo_fact;

SELECT * from odw_harmonised_db.secureinfo_fact where sourceID = '2210-1102';

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW employee_dim_new 

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT 
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Pers_No IS NULL
        THEN T7.EmployeeID
        ELSE NULL
    END as EmployeeID, -- surrogate key
    T1.First_name as FirstName,
    T1.Last_name as LastName,
    T1.Birth_date as DOB,
    T1.NI_number as NINumber,
    T1.Gender_Key as Gender,
    T2.Street_and_House_Number as AddressLine1,
    T2.`2nd_Address_Line` as AddressLine2,
    T2.District as AddressLine3,
    T2.City as City,
    T2.Region_State_Province_Count as County,
    T2.Postal_Code as PostCode,
    T3.Email_Address as EmailAddress,
    T2.Personal_Mobile as TelephoneNumberPersonal,
    T2.Work_Mobile as TelephoneNumberWork,
    T2.Staff_Number as PersNumber,
    T1.Pers_No as EmployeeNumber,
    T1.FTE,
    T1.Wk_hrs as WorkHours,
    T1.`Indicator_Part-Time_Employee` as PartTimeEmployee,
    T1.Employment_Status as EmploymentStatus,
    T1.Civil_Service_Start as CivilServiceStart,
    T1.Date_to_Current_Job as DateToCurrentJob,
    T1.Seniority_Date as SeniorityDate,
    T1.Org_Start_Date as OrgStartDate,
    T1.Fix_Term_End_Date as FixTermEndDate,
    T1.Loan_Start_Date as LoanStartDate,
    T1.Loan_End_Date as LoanEndDate,
    T1.Payroll_Area as PayrollArea,
    T1.Assignment_Number as AssignmentNumber,
    T1.Employee_Group as EmployeeGroup,
    T1.Annual_salary as AnnualSalary,
    T4.SourceSystemID,
    current_timestamp as StartDate,
    NULL as EndDate,
    current_timestamp as IngestionDate,
    NULL as ValidTo,
    md5(concat(T1.First_name,T1.Last_name,T1.Birth_date, IFNULL(T1.NI_number, '.'), IFNULL(T1.Gender_Key, '.'), IFNULL(T2.Street_and_House_Number, '.'),IFNULL(T2.`2nd_Address_Line`, '.'),
                IFNULL(T2.District, '.'),IFNULL(T2.City, '.'),IFNULL(T2.Region_State_Province_Count, '.'),IFNULL(T2.Postal_Code, '.'),IFNULL(T3.Email_Address, '.'),IFNULL(T2.Personal_Mobile, '.'),
                IFNULL(T2.Work_Mobile, '.'),IFNULL(T2.Staff_Number, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Pers_No, '.'),T1.FTE,T1.Wk_hrs,IFNULL(T1.`Indicator_Part-Time_Employee`,'.'),T1.Employment_Status,IFNULL(T1.Civil_Service_Start, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Date_to_Current_Job, '.'),
                IFNULL(T1.Seniority_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Org_Start_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Fix_Term_End_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Loan_End_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Loan_Start_Date, '.'),T1.Payroll_Area,IFNULL(T1.Assignment_Number, '.'),
                T1.Employee_Group,T1.Annual_salary)) as RowID, 
    'Y' as IsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.vw_saphr T1
LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.vw_addresses T2 ON T1.Pers_No = T2.Staff_Number
LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.vw_email T3 ON T2.Staff_Number = T3.Staff_Number
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sourcesystem_fact T4 ON "SAP HR" = T4.Description
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.employee_dim T7 ON T1.Pers_No = T7.EmployeeNumber
WHERE  (T7.IsActive = 'Y' or T7.IsActive IS NULL)
    
        AND (
        
        -- flags new data        
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.Pers_No = T7.EmployeeNumber AND md5(concat(T1.First_name,T1.Last_name,T1.Birth_date, IFNULL(T1.NI_number, '.'), IFNULL(T1.Gender_Key, '.'), IFNULL(T2.Street_and_House_Number, '.'),IFNULL(T2.`2nd_Address_Line`, '.'),
                                                                IFNULL(T2.District, '.'),IFNULL(T2.City, '.'),IFNULL(T2.Region_State_Province_Count, '.'),IFNULL(T2.Postal_Code, '.'),IFNULL(T3.Email_Address, '.'),IFNULL(T2.Personal_Mobile, '.'),
                                                                IFNULL(T2.Work_Mobile, '.'),IFNULL(T2.Staff_Number, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Pers_No, '.'),T1.FTE,T1.Wk_hrs,IFNULL(T1.`Indicator_Part-Time_Employee`,'.'),T1.Employment_Status,IFNULL(T1.Civil_Service_Start, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Date_to_Current_Job, '.'),
                                                                IFNULL(T1.Seniority_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Org_Start_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Fix_Term_End_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Loan_End_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Loan_Start_Date, '.'),T1.Payroll_Area,IFNULL(T1.Assignment_Number, '.'),
                                                                T1.Employee_Group,T1.Annual_salary)) <> T7.RowID     
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T7.EmployeeNumber IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.Pers_No IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
)
;

    md5(concat(T1.First_name,T1.Last_name,T1.Birth_date, IFNULL(T1.NI_number, '.'), IFNULL(T1.Gender_Key, '.'), IFNULL(T2.Street_and_House_Number, '.'),IFNULL(T2.`2nd_Address_Line`, '.'),
                IFNULL(T2.District, '.'),IFNULL(T2.City, '.'),IFNULL(T2.Region_State_Province_Count, '.'),IFNULL(T2.Postal_Code, '.'),IFNULL(T3.Email_Address, '.'),IFNULL(T2.Personal_Mobile, '.'),
                IFNULL(T2.Work_Mobile, '.'),IFNULL(T2.Staff_Number, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Pers_No, '.'),T1.FTE,T1.Wk_hrs,IFNULL(T1.`Indicator_Part-Time_Employee`,'.'),T1.Employment_Status,IFNULL(T1.Civil_Service_Start, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Date_to_Current_Job, '.'),
                IFNULL(T1.Seniority_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Org_Start_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Fix_Term_End_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Loan_End_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Loan_Start_Date, '.'),T1.Payroll_Area,IFNULL(T1.Assignment_Number, '.'),
                T1.Employee_Group,T1.Annual_salary)) as RowID, 
    'Y' as IsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.vw_saphr T1
LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.vw_addresses T2 ON T1.Pers_No = T2.Staff_Number
LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.vw_email T3 ON T2.Staff_Number = T3.Staff_Number
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sourcesystem_fact T4 ON "SAP HR" = T4.Description
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.employee_dim T7 ON T1.Pers_No = T7.EmployeeNumber
WHERE  (T7.IsActive = 'Y' or T7.IsActive IS NULL)
    
        AND (
        
        -- flags new data        
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.Pers_No = T7.EmployeeNumber AND md5(concat(T1.First_name,T1.Last_name,T1.Birth_date, IFNULL(T1.NI_number, '.'), IFNULL(T1.Gender_Key, '.'), IFNULL(T2.Street_and_House_Number, '.'),IFNULL(T2.`2nd_Address_Line`, '.'),
                                                                IFNULL(T2.District, '.'),IFNULL(T2.City, '.'),IFNULL(T2.Region_State_Province_Count, '.'),IFNULL(T2.Postal_Code, '.'),IFNULL(T3.Email_Address, '.'),IFNULL(T2.Personal_Mobile, '.'),
                                                                IFNULL(T2.Work_Mobile, '.'),IFNULL(T2.Staff_Number, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Pers_No, '.'),T1.FTE,T1.Wk_hrs,IFNULL(T1.`Indicator_Part-Time_Employee`,'.'),T1.Employment_Status,IFNULL(T1.Civil_Service_Start, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Date_to_Current_Job, '.'),
                                                                IFNULL(T1.Seniority_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Org_Start_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Fix_Term_End_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Loan_End_Date, '.'),IFNULL(T1.Loan_Start_Date, '.'),T1.Payroll_Area,IFNULL(T1.Assignment_Number, '.'),
                                                                T1.Employee_Group,T1.Annual_salary)) <> T7.RowID     
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T7.EmployeeNumber IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.Pers_No IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
)
;

where rowid is null

%%sql

-- Build SourceSystem_Fact table
-- INSERT OVERWRITE achieves the same as a TRUNCATE TABLE and INSERT INTO but in one statement

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.sourcesystem_fact (
    SourceSystemID,
    Description,
    StartDate,
    EndDate,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID
)

SELECT
    NULL AS SourceSystemID,
    "SAP HR" AS Description,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS StartDate, 
    NULL AS EndDate,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5("SAP HR") as RowID
;

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.sourcesystem_fact (
    SourceSystemID,
    Description,
    StartDate,
    EndDate,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID
)

SELECT
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY Description NULLS LAST) AS SourceSystemID,
    Description,
    StartDate, 
    EndDate,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID
FROM odw_harmonised_db.sourcesystem_fact

%%sql
-- Build diversity_dim table


-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW diversity_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Ethnic_Origin IS NULL
        THEN first(T3.DiversityID)
        ELSE NULL
    END as DiversityID, -- surrogate key
    Ethnic_Origin AS Description,
    first(T2.SourceSystemID) as SourceSystemID, -- NOT CORRECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS StartDate,
    NULL AS EndDate,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(Ethnic_Origin) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Ethnic_Origin = first(T3.Description) AND md5(concat(T1.Ethnic_Origin)) <> first(T3.RowID)     
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN first(T3.Description) IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Ethnic_Origin IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData

FROM odw_standardised_db.personal_characteristics T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.diversity_dim T3 ON T1.Ethnic_Origin = T3.Description
WHERE  (T3.IsActive = 'Y' or T3.IsActive IS NULL)
    
        AND (
        
        -- flags new data        
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.Ethnic_Origin = T3.Description AND md5(concat(T1.Ethnic_Origin)) <> T3.RowID
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T3.Description IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.Ethnic_Origin IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )

    AND

        T1.Ethnic_Origin IS NOT NULL

GROUP BY T1.Ethnic_Origin

;

-- Create new and updated dataset

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY  VIEW diversity_dim_changed_rows

    AS

-- gets updated, deleted and new rows 

Select 

    DiversityID,
    Description, 
    SourceSystemID,
    StartDate,
    EndDate,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
From diversity_dim_new

    UNION ALL

-- gets original versions of updated rows so we can update EndDate and set IsActive flag to 'N'

SELECT
    DiversityID,
    Description,
    SourceSystemID,
    StartDate,
    EndDate,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.diversity_dim
WHERE Description IN (SELECT Description FROM diversity_dim_new); -- gets original versions of updated rows

-- merge into fact table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.diversity_dim AS Target
USING diversity_dim_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.DiversityID = Target.DiversityID

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.EndDate = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;   

-- Insert new DiversityID

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.diversity_dim

SELECT 
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY DiversityID NULLS LAST) AS DiversityID, 
    Description, 
    SourceSystemID,
    StartDate,
    EndDate,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.diversity_dim;

Select * FROM odw_harmonised_db.diversity_dim;

-- SELECT

-- Build disability_dim table
-- INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.disability_dim (
--     DisabilityID,
--     DisabilityCode,
--     Description,
--     SourceSystemID,
--     StartDate,
--     EndDate,
--     IngestionDate,
--     ValidTo
-- )

-- SELECT
--     uuid() AS DisabilityID,
--     Disability_Text AS DisabilityCode,
--     Disability_Code_Description AS Description, 
--     first(T2.SourceSystemID) as SourceSystemID, 
--     CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS StartDate,
--     '9999-12-31' AS EndDate,
--     CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
--     NULL AS ValidTo
-- FROM odw_standardised_db.personal_characteristics T1
-- LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description
-- GROUP BY Disability_Text, Disability_Code_Description;

-- NEW
-- Build disability_dim table

-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW disability_dim_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Disability_Text IS NULL
        THEN first(T3.DisabilityID)
        ELSE NULL
    END as DisabilityID, -- surrogate key
    Disability_Text AS DisabilityCode,
    first(T1.Disability_Code_Description) AS Description,
    first(T2.SourceSystemID) as SourceSystemID, -- NOT CORRECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS StartDate,
    NULL AS EndDate,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(Disability_Text) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Disability_Text = first(T3.DisabilityCode) AND md5(concat(T1.Disability_Text)) <> first(T3.RowID)     
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN first(T3.DisabilityCode) IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Disability_Text IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData

FROM odw_standardised_db.personal_characteristics T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.disability_dim T3 ON T1.Disability_Text = T3.DisabilityCode
WHERE  (T3.IsActive = 'Y' or T3.IsActive IS NULL)
    
        AND (
        
        -- flags new data        
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.Disability_Text = T3.DisabilityCode AND md5(concat(T1.Disability_Text)) <> T3.RowID
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T3.DisabilityCode IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.Disability_Text IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )

    AND
        T1.Disability_Text IS NOT NULL

GROUP BY T1.Disability_Text

;

-- Create new and updated dataset

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW disability_dim_changed_rows

    AS

-- gets updated, deleted and new rows 

Select 
    DisabilityID,
    DisabilityCode,
    Description, 
    SourceSystemID,
    StartDate,
    EndDate,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
From disability_dim_new

    UNION ALL

-- gets original versions of updated rows so we can update EndDate and set IsActive flag to 'N'

SELECT
    DisabilityID,
    DisabilityCode,
    Description,
    SourceSystemID,
    StartDate,
    EndDate,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.disability_dim
WHERE DisabilityCode IN (SELECT DisabilityCode FROM disability_dim_new); -- gets original versions of updated rows

-- merge into fact table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.disability_dim AS Target
USING disability_dim_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.DisabilityID = Target.DisabilityID

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.EndDate = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;   

-- Insert new DisabilityID

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.disability_dim

SELECT 
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY DisabilityID NULLS LAST) AS DisabilityID, 
    DisabilityCode,
    Description, 
    SourceSystemID,
    StartDate,
    EndDate,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.disability_dim;

Select * FROM odw_harmonised_db.disability_dim;
