%%sql
-- Build and merge secureinfo_fact table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.secureinfo_fact AS Target
USING ( SELECT
            uuid() AS SecureInfoID, -- surrogate key
            T1.Ref_No AS SourceID, -- source system id
            T3.DisabilityID,
            T4.DiversityID,
            T5.ReligionID,
            T6.SXOID, 
            T2.SourceSystemID,
            CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS StartDate,
            '9999-12-31' AS EndDate,
            CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
            NULL AS ValidTo,
            md5(concat(Ref_No,DisabilityID,DiversityID,ReligionID,SXOID)) as RowID,
            'Y' as IsActive

        FROM odw_standardised_db.personal_characteristics T1
        LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description
        LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.disability_dim T3 ON (T1.Disability_Text = T3.DisabilityCode  AND T1.Disability_Code_Description = T3.Description)
        LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.diversity_dim T4 ON T1.Ethnic_Origin = T4.Description
        LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.religion_dim T5 ON (T1.Religion = T5.ReligionCode  AND T1.Religious_Denomination_Key = T5.Description)
        LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sxo_dim T6 ON T1.SxO = T6.Description
    ) AS Source

ON Source.SourceID = Target.SourceID

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED AND Target.RowID <> Source.RowID
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.EndDate = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;    

-- Insert changed data as new row

INSERT INTO odw_harmonised_db.secureinfo_fact (
    SecureInfoID,
    SourceID,
    DisabilityID,
    DiversityID,
    ReligionID,
    SXOID,
    SourceSystemID,
    StartDate,
    EndDate,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
)

SELECT
    uuid() AS SecureInfoID, -- surrogate key
    T1.Ref_No AS SourceID, -- source system id
    T3.DisabilityID,
    T4.DiversityID,
    T5.ReligionID,
    T6.SXOID, 
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS StartDate,
    'null' AS EndDate,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(T1.Ref_No, T3.DisabilityID, T4.DiversityID, T5.ReligionID, T6.SXOID)) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive
FROM odw_standardised_db.personal_characteristics T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.disability_dim T3 ON (T1.Disability_Text = T3.DisabilityCode  AND T1.Disability_Code_Description = T3.Description)
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.diversity_dim T4 ON T1.Ethnic_Origin = T4.Description
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.religion_dim T5 ON (T1.Religion = T5.ReligionCode  AND T1.Religious_Denomination_Key = T5.Description)
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sxo_dim T6 ON T1.SxO = T6.Description
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.secureinfo_fact T7 ON T1.Ref_No = T7.SourceID
WHERE T1.Ref_No = T7.SourceID AND md5(concat(T1.Ref_No, T3.DisabilityID, T4.DiversityID, T5.ReligionID, T6.SXOID)) <> T7.RowID;

-- Deactivate old rows

UPDATE odw_harmonised_db.secureinfo_fact
    SET T1.IsActive = 'N',
        T1.EndDate = date_sub(current_timestamp,1)
    FROM odw_harmonised_db.secureinfo_fact T1
        LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.personal_characteristics T2 ON T1.SourceID = T2.Ref_No
        WHERE T2.Ref_No IS NULL 
    
    -- Where SourceID IN 
    -- (
    --     SELECT SourceID
    --     FROM odw_harmonised_db.secureinfo_fact T1
    --     LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.personal_characteristics T2 ON T1.SourceID = T2.Ref_No
    --     WHERE T2.Ref_No IS NULL
    -- )

%%sql  

-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW secureinfo_fact_new 

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Ref_No IS NULL
        THEN T7.SecureInfoID
        ELSE NULL
    END as SecureInfoID, -- surrogate key
    T1.Ref_No AS SourceID, -- source system id
    T3.DisabilityID,
    T4.DiversityID,
    T5.ReligionID,
    T6.SXOID, 
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS StartDate,
    'null' AS EndDate,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(T1.Ref_No, T3.DisabilityID, T4.DiversityID, T5.ReligionID, T6.SXOID)) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Ref_No = T7.SourceID AND md5(concat(T1.Ref_No, T3.DisabilityID, T4.DiversityID, T5.ReligionID, T6.SXOID)) <> T7.RowID    -- same employee, changed data
        THEN 'Y'
        WHEN T7.SourceID IS NULL -- new employee
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END as NewData,
    CASE
        WHEN T1.Ref_No IS NULL
        THEN 'Y'
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS  DeletedData

FROM odw_standardised_db.personal_characteristics T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.disability_dim T3 ON (T1.Disability_Text = T3.DisabilityCode  AND T1.Disability_Code_Description = T3.Description)
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.diversity_dim T4 ON T1.Ethnic_Origin = T4.Description
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.religion_dim T5 ON (T1.Religion = T5.ReligionCode  AND T1.Religious_Denomination_Key = T5.Description)
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sxo_dim T6 ON T1.SxO = T6.Description
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.secureinfo_fact T7 ON T1.Ref_No = T7.SourceID
WHERE  (T7.IsActive = 'Y' or T7.IsActive IS NULL)
    
        AND (
        
        -- flags new data        
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.Ref_No = T7.SourceID AND md5(concat(T1.Ref_No, T3.DisabilityID, T4.DiversityID, T5.ReligionID, T6.SXOID)) <> T7.RowID     
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T7.SourceID IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.Ref_No IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
)
;

-- Create new and updated dataset

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY  VIEW secureinfo_fact_changed_rows

    AS

-- gets updated, deleted and new rows 

Select 

    SecureInfoID, -- surrogate key
    SourceID, -- source system id
    DisabilityID,
    DiversityID,
    ReligionID,
    SXOID, 
    SourceSystemID,
    StartDate,
    EndDate,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
From secureinfo_fact_new

    UNION ALL

-- gets original versions of updated rows so we can update EndDate and set IsActive flag to 'N'

SELECT
    SecureInfoID, -- surrogate key
    SourceID, -- source system id
    DisabilityID,
    DiversityID,
    ReligionID,
    SXOID, 
    SourceSystemID,
    StartDate,
    EndDate,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.secureinfo_fact
WHERE SourceID IN (SELECT SourceID FROM secureinfo_fact_new); -- gets original versions of updated rows

-- merge into fact table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.secureinfo_fact AS Target
USING secureinfo_fact_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.SecureInfoID = Target.SecureInfoID

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.EndDate = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;   

-- Insert new SecureInfoID

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.secureinfo_fact 

SELECT 
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SecureInfoID NULLS LAST) AS SecureInfoID, 
    SourceID, 
    DisabilityID,
    DiversityID,
    ReligionID,
    SXOID, 
    SourceSystemID,
    StartDate,
    EndDate,

LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sxo_dim T6 ON T1.SxO = T6.Description

%%sql
-- Build Employee_Dim table 

-- Notes - Addresses are only supplied for Inspectors - need to check inspector count against addresses data

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.employee_dim (
    EmployeeID,
    FirstName,
    LastName,
    DOB,
    NINumber,
    Gender,
    AddressLine1,
    AddressLine2,
    AddressLine3,
    City,
    County,
    PostCode,
    EmailAddress,
    TelephoneNumberPersonal,
    TelephoneNumberWork,
    PersNumber,
    EmployeeNumber,
    FTE,
    WorkHours,
    PartTimeEmployee,
    EmploymentStatus,
    CivilServiceStart,
    DateToCurrentJob,
    SeniorityDate,
    OrgStartDate,
    FixTermEndDate,
    LoanStartDate,
    LoanEndDate,
    PayrollArea,
    AssignmentNumber,
    EmployeeGroup,
    AnnualSalary,
    SourceSystemID,
    StartDate,
    EndDate,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo
)

SELECT 
    uuid(), --EmployeeID
    T1.First_name as FirstName,
    T1.Last_name as LastName,
    T1.Birth_date as DOB,
    T1.NI_number as NINumber,
    T1.Gender_Key as Gender,
    T2.Street_and_House_Number as AddressLine1,
    T2.`2nd_Address_Line` as AddressLine2,
    T2.District as AddressLine3,
    T2.City as City,
    T2.Region_State_Province_Count as County,
    T2.Postal_Code as PostCode,
    T3.Email_Address as EmailAddress,
    T2.Personal_Mobile as TelephoneNumberPersonal,
    T2.Work_Mobile as TelephoneNumberWork,
    T2.Staff_Number as PersNumber,
    T1.Pers_No as EmployeeNumber,
    T1.FTE,
    T1.Wk_hrs as WorkHours,
    T1.`Indicator_Part-Time_Employee` as PartTimeEmployee,
    T1.Employment_Status as EmploymentStatus,
    T1.Civil_Service_Start as CivilServiceStart,
    T1.Date_to_Current_Job as DateToCurrentJob,
    T1.Seniority_Date as SeniorityDate,
    T1.Org_Start_Date as OrgStartDate,
    T1.Fix_Term_End_Date as FixTermEndDate,
    T1.Loan_Start_Date as LoanStartDate,
    T1.Loan_End_Date as LoadEndDate,
    T1.Payroll_Area as PayrollArea,
    T1.Assignment_Number as AssignmentNumber,
    T1.Employee_Group as EmployeeGroup,
    T1.Annual_salary as AnnualSalary,
    T4.SourceSystemID,
    current_timestamp as StartDate,
    '9999-12-31' as EndDate,
    current_timestamp as IngestDate,
    null as ValidTo

FROM odw_standardised_db.vw_saphr T1
LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.vw_addresses T2 ON T1.Pers_No = T2.Staff_Number
LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.vw_email T3 ON T2.Staff_Number = T3.Staff_Number
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sourcesystem_fact T4 ON "SAP HR" = T4.Description

%%sql
-- Build absence_dim table 

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.Absence_dim (
    AbsenceID,
    EmployeeID,
    StaffNumber,
    Type,
    SicknessGroup,
    AbsenceStartDate,
    AbsenceEndDate,
    Days,
    CalendarDays,
    WorkScheduleID,
    AnnualLeaveStart,
    SourceSystemID,
    StartDate,
    EndDate,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo
)


SELECT
    uuid() AS AbsenceID,
    T4.EmployeeID,
    T1.Staff_Number as StaffNumber,
    T1.Attendance_or_Absence_Type as Type,
    T1.Sickness_Group as SicknessGroup,
    T1.Start_Date as AbsenceStartDate,
    T1.End_Date as AbsenceEndDate,
    T1.Days,
    T1.Cal_Days as CalendarDays,
    T3.WorkScheduleID,
    T1.Annual_Leave_Start AS AnnualLeaveStart,
    T2.SourceSystemID as SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS StartDate,
    NULL AS EndDate,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo
FROM odw_standardised_db.vw_absences T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "SAP HR" = T2.Description
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.workschedule_dim T3 ON  T1.Work_Schedule_Rule = T3.WorkScheduleRule AND  
                                                    T1.Wk_hrs = T3.WorkWeekHours AND
                                                    T1.Hrs_Day = T3.WorkDayHours AND
                                                    T1.WkDys = T3.WorkWeekDays
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.employee_dim T4 ON T1.Staff_Number = T4.PersNumber

from pyspark.sql.types import *

raw_storage_folder_path = raw_storage_container   + '/' + raw_storage_source_folder + '/' + raw_storage_source_name
curated_storage_folder_path = curated_storage_container + '/' + curated_storage_folder + '/' + curated_storage_table_name

rawsourceDF=spark.read.options(header='True', inferSchema='True', lineSep="§", quote="\"", escape="\\", quoteAll="true").csv(raw_storage_folder_path)

#Rename Columns with illegal Parquet characters
import re
cols=[re.sub("( |\#|\# |\.|\(|\)|\/)","_",i) for i in rawsourceDF.columns] # replace chars with _
cols=[re.sub("([\_]{2,})","_",i) for i in cols] #replace consecutive _ with one _
cols=[re.sub("(\_)$","",i) for i in cols] #remove trailing _
rawsourceDF=rawsourceDF.toDF(*cols)

rawsourceDF.write.option("header", "true").format('parquet').mode('overwrite').save(curated_storage_folder_path)

"HR PC 2022_08.xlsx":  "personal_characteristics", "Leave Entitlement_20220831.xlsx": "leave", "SAP_email_20220831.xlsx" : "email",
"SAP_Leavers_20220831.xlsx" : "leavers", "Specialisms - 220831.xlsx" : "specialisms"}


@logging_to_appins
def validate_data():
    print('---Validation started---')
    for file, table in file_table_mapping.items():
        try:
            full_path =raw_storage_folder_path + file
            print('-----Validating file '+file)
            df = ps.read_excel(full_path, dtype=str)
            file_count = len(df.index)
            sql_df= spark.sql("SELECT count(*) FROM odw_standardised_db."+table)
            table_count = sql_df.first()[0]

            if(table_count == file_count):
                print('------File count and Table counts are equal')
            else:
                print('------File count and Table counts are not equal')
                print('------File Count: '+str(file_count) +' Table Count: '+str(table_count))
                raise ValueError('File count and Table counts are not equal')

        except ValueError as err:
            print(err.args)
    print('---Validation finished---')


validate_data()

%%sql
drop table if exists odw_workspace_db.sap_hr_layer1_harmonised;
create table odw_workspace_db.sap_hr_layer1_harmonised as 
SELECT
        SHR.Pers_No
        ,case LEFT( SHR.Pers_No, 2)
		when '50' then case char_length(SHR.Pers_No) 
			when 6 then  SHR.Pers_No
			else substring(cast( SHR.Pers_No as varchar(50)), 3, char_length(cast( SHR.Pers_No as varchar(50))))
				end
			else  SHR.Pers_No
					end as PINS_Join_staff_number
        ,case when SHR.PS_group = 'BAND 1' and SHR.Contract_Type = 'Fixed Term Contract' then 'FTC-B1'
		  when SHR.PS_group = 'BAND 2' and SHR.Contract_Type = 'Fixed Term Contract' then 'FTC-B2'
		  when SHR.PS_group = 'BAND 3' and SHR.Contract_Type = 'Fixed Term Contract' then 'FTC-B3'
		  when SHR.PS_group = 'BAND 1' and SHR.Contract_Type <> 'Fixed Term Contract' then 'B1'
		  when SHR.PS_group = 'BAND 2' and SHR.Contract_Type <> 'Fixed Term Contract' then 'B2'
		  when SHR.PS_group = 'BAND 3' and SHR.Contract_Type <> 'Fixed Term Contract' then 'B3'
		  else SHR.PS_group end as PINS_join_grade
        ,Pers_No as pins_staff_number
		,First_name  given_names
        ,Last_name family_name
        ,Employment_Status active_status
		,ROUND(SHR.FTE,2) FTE
		,case 
              when SHR.Position1 = 'Inspector Manager' then 1 
             else 0 end as is_sgl
		,SHR.Work_Contract
		,case SHR.Work_Contract
	        when 'Non-Sal. Inspec' then 'Non-Salaried Inspector'
	        else SHR.Organizational_Unit
	    end as resource_code
		,case left(SHR.PS_group, 3)
		when 'FTC' then 'FTC'
		when 'NSI' then 'NSI'
		else 'Salaried'		
	    end as emp_type ,
		PDAC_ETL_Date         	
	FROM odw_standardised_db.sap_hr as SHR
	where PDAC_ETL_Date > (select LastRun from odw_config_db.pipeline_runs where sourceName ='sap_hr' )	;

%%sql
merge into odw_config_db.pipeline_runs target
using (select 'sap_hr' as source_name , max(PDAC_ETL_Date ) as max_PDAC_ETL_Date from odw_workspace_db.sap_hr_layer1_harmonised ) updates
on target.sourceName=updates.source_name
WHEN MATCHED THEN
  UPDATE SET target.LastRun = updates.max_PDAC_ETL_Date
WHEN NOT MATCHED
  THEN INSERT (sourceName,LastRun) VALUES (source_name, max_PDAC_ETL_Date)

def convertLowerCase(inputDF : DataFrame , inputColumnName) -> DataFrame:
    newColumnName = 'lower_' + inputColumnName
    transDF = inputDF.withColumn(newColumnName,lower(col(inputColumnName)))

%%sql   

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW odw_standardised_db.vw_saphr_historic

AS

SELECT DISTINCT
    CASE 
        WHEN LENGTH(T1.Pers_No) = 6 AND SUBSTR(T1.Pers_No,1,1) = 5
        THEN CONCAT('00',T1.Pers_No)
        WHEN LENGTH(T1.Pers_No) = 6 AND SUBSTR(T1.Pers_No,1,1) = 4
        THEN CONCAT('50',T1.Pers_No)        
        ELSE T1.Pers_No
    END as Pers_No,
    First_name,
    Last_name,
    Employee_No,
    CoCd,
    Company_Code,
    PA,
    Personnel_Area,
    PSubarea,
    Personnel_Subarea,
    Org_Unit,
    Organizational_Unit,
    Organizational_key,
    Organizational_key1,
    WorkC,
    Work_Contract,
    CT,
    Contract_Type,
    PS_Group,
    Pay_Band_Description,
    FTE,
    Wk_hrs,
    Indicator_Part_Time_Employee,
    S,
    Employment_Status,
    Gender_Key,
    TRA_Start_Date,
    TRA_End_Date,
    TRA_Status,
    TRA_Grade,
    Prev_PersNo,
    ActR,
    Reason_for_Action,
    Position,
    Position1,
    Cost_Ctr,
    Cost_Centre,
    to_timestamp(Civil_Service_Start) AS Civil_Service_Start,
    to_timestamp(Date_to_Current_Job) AS Date_to_Current_Job,
    to_timestamp(Seniority_Date) AS Seniority_Date,
    to_timestamp(Date_to_Subst_Grade) AS Date_to_Subst_Grade,
    Pers_No_1,
    Name_of_Manager_OM,
    Manager_Position,
    Manager_Position_Text,
    Counter_Sign_Manager,
    Loc,
    Location,
    to_timestamp(Org_Start_Date) AS Org_Start_Date,
    to_timestamp(Fix_Term_End_Date) AS Fix_Term_End_Date,
    to_timestamp(Loan_Start_Date) AS Loan_Start_Date,
    to_timestamp(Loan_End_Date) AS Loan_End_Date,
    EEGrp,
    Employee_Group,
    Annual_salary,
    Curr,
    NI_number,
    Birth_date,
    Age_of_employee,
    EO,
    Ethnic_origin,
    NID,
    Rel,
    Religious_Denomination_Key,
    SxO,
    Wage_Type,
    Employee_Subgroup,
    LOA_Abs_Type,
    LOA_Absence_Type_Text,
    Scheme_reference,
    Pension_Scheme_Name,
    Disability_Code,
    Disability_Text,
    Disability_Code_Description,
    PArea,
    Payroll_Area,
    Assignment_Number,
    FTE_2,
    ingested_datetime,
    expected_from,
    expected_to,
    report_monthend_date

FROM odw_standardised_db.sap_hr_historic T1
INNER JOIN (    SELECT MAX(expected_from) AS Max_expectedfrom FROM odw_standardised_db.sap_hr_historic) MEF ON T1.expected_from = MEF.Max_expectedfrom
INNER JOIN (    SELECT Pers_No, MAX(report_monthend_date) AS Max_Rpt_Monthend_Date
                FROM odw_standardised_db.sap_hr_historic
                Group by Pers_No) Rpt_Date ON T1.Pers_No = Rpt_Date.Pers_No AND
                                        T1.report_monthend_date = Rpt_Date.Max_Rpt_Monthend_Date

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (timesheets) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_minutes)
- **New Data:** where a segment_id in the source does not exist as an SegmentID in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on segment_id in source and SegmentID in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an SegmentID in the target exists but the same information doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View timesheets_minutes_new is created

%%sql
-- Build religion_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW timesheets_minutes_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.staff_number IS NULL
        THEN T5.StaffNumber
    END as TimesheetsMinutesID, -- surrogate key
    T1.staff_number AS StaffNumber,
    T4.EmployeeID AS EmployeeID,
    T1.business_area AS BusinessArea,
    T1.core_minutes AS CoreMinutes,
    T1.balance_minutes AS BalanceMinutes,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.staff_number,'.'), IFNULL(T1.business_area,'.'), IFNULL(T1.core_minutes,'.'), IFNULL(T1.balance_minutes,'.'))) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    T5.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.timesheets_employee T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Timesheets" = T2.Description AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_employee_fact T4 ON T1.staff_number = T4.EmployeeNumber AND T4.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_minutes_dim T5 ON T1.staff_number = T5.StaffNumber AND T5.IsActive = 'Y' 
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.staff_number = T5.StaffNumber AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.staff_number,'.'), IFNULL(T1.business_area,'.'), 
                IFNULL(T1.core_minutes,'.'), IFNULL(T1.balance_minutes,'.'))) <> T5.RowID
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T5.StaffNumber IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.staff_number IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )

# Run tests to check integrity of data by numbers
- This script checks for the total number of current codes in the harmonised table, and compare against the numbers for new data to be added and data to be set as inactive.
- **Changes tracking:** where it checks the data against active records in harmonised and compares with records to add and records to be set as inactive.
- **Changes tolerance levels:** if the total ammount to be added and deleted surpasses the tolerance limit, it will interrupt the proces of loading the data

# Run tests to check integrity of data by comparision of codes
- This script checks for the total list of current codes in the harmonised table, and compare against the list for new data to be added and data to be set as inactive.
- **Changes tracking:** where it checks the data against active records in harmonised and compares with records to add and records to be set as inactive.

# Dataset is created that contains changed data and corresponding target data
- This script combines data that has been updated, Deleted or is new, with corresponding target data
- View **table_new** is unioned to the target data filter to only those rows where changes have been detected
## View table_changed_rows is created

%%sql
-- Create new and updated dataset

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW timesheets_minutes_changed_rows

    AS

-- gets updated, deleted and new rows 

Select 
    TimesheetsMinutesID,
    StaffNumber,
    EmployeeID,
    BusinessArea,
    CoreMinutes,
    BalanceMinutes,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
From timesheets_minutes_new WHERE HistoricIsActive = 'Y' or HistoricIsActive IS NULL

    UNION ALL

-- gets original versions of updated rows so we can update EndDate and set IsActive flag to 'N'

SELECT
    TimesheetsMinutesID,
    StaffNumber,
    EmployeeID,
    BusinessArea,
    CoreMinutes,
    BalanceMinutes,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_minutes_dim
WHERE TimesheetsMinutesID IN (SELECT TimesheetsMinutesID FROM timesheets_minutes_new WHERE EmployeeID IS NULL)
AND IsActive = 'Y';

# View TABLE_dim_changed_rows is used in a merge (Upsert) statement into the target table
- **WHEN MATCHED** ON the Business Key, ValidTo is set to today -1 day and the IsActive flag is set to 'N'
- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the business key, insert rows
## Table odw_harmonised.XXX_dim is updated

%%sql
-- merge into fact table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_minutes_dim AS Target
USING timesheets_minutes_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.TimesheetsMinutesID = Target.TimesheetsMinutesID

-- For Updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.ValidTo = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT *

# Fix the IDs
- No auto-increment feature is available in delta tables, therefore we need to create new IDs for the inserted rows
- This is done by select the target data and using INSERT OVERWRITE to re-insert the data is a new Row Number
## Table odw_harmonised.TABLE_dim is updated

%%sql
-- Insert new ID

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_minutes_dim

SELECT 
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY StaffNumber NULLS LAST) AS TimesheetsMinutesID,
    StaffNumber,
    EmployeeID,
    BusinessArea,
    CoreMinutes,
    BalanceMinutes,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_minutes_dim;

Select * FROM odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_minutes_dim;

%%sql
-- Build TimeSheetsFact table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW timesheets_record_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.segment_id IS NULL
        THEN T9.SegmentID
    END as TimeSheetsFactID, -- surrogate key
    T1.segment_id AS SegmentID,
    T4.EmployeeID,
    T6.SegmentTypeReferenceID,
    T7.TimesheetsWorkSegmentID,
    T8.TimesheetsWorkSegmentLockID,
    T5.TimesheetsMinutesID,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.segment_id,'.'),IFNULL(T4.EmployeeID,'.'), IFNULL(T6.SegmentTypeReferenceID,'.'), IFNULL(T7.TimesheetsWorkSegmentID,'.'), 
    IFNULL(T8.TimesheetsWorkSegmentLockID,'.'))) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive, 
    T9.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.timesheets_work_segment T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Timesheets" = T2.Description and T2.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.timesheets_employee T3 ON T1.employee_id = T3.employee_id
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_employee_fact T4 ON T3.staff_number = T4.EmployeeNumber AND T4.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_minutes_dim T5 ON T4.EmployeeID = T5.EmployeeID AND T5.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_segment_type_reference_dim T6 ON T1.segment_type = T6.SegmentTypeID AND T6.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_work_segment_dim T7 ON T7.EmployeeID = T4.EmployeeID AND T1.case_reference = T7.CaseReference AND T7.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_work_segment_lock_dim T8 ON T8.EmployeeID = T4.EmployeeID AND T8.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_record_fact T9 ON T1.segment_id = T9.SegmentID AND T9.IsActive = 'Y' 

WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.segment_id = T9.SegmentID AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.segment_id,'.'),IFNULL(T4.EmployeeID,'.'), IFNULL(T6.SegmentTypeReferenceID,'.'), IFNULL(T7.TimesheetsWorkSegmentID,'.'), 
            IFNULL(T8.TimesheetsWorkSegmentLockID,'.')))  <> T5.RowID     
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T9.SegmentID IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.segment_id IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (sap hr) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_record_fact)
- **New Data:** where a Pers_No in the source does not exist as an EmployeeNumber in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Pers_No in source and EmployeeNumber in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an EmployeeNumber in the target exists but the same Pers_No doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View timesheets_record_fact_new is created

%%sql

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW timesheets_record_fact_new 

    AS

SELECT

    CASE
        WHEN T1.Pers_No IS NULL
        THEN T15.HRRecordID
        ELSE NULL
    END as TimeSheetsFactID, -- surrogate key
    EmployeeID,
    SegmentTypeReferenceID,
    TimesheetsWorkSegmentID,
    TimesheetsWorkSegmentLockID,
    TimesheetMinutesID,
    .SourceSystemID,
    current_timestamp as IngestionDate,
    NULL as ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T2.EmployeeID,'.'), IFNULL(T3.PersonnelAreaID, '.'), IFNULL(T4.PersonnelSubAreaID, '.'), IFNULL(T5.OrganisationUnitID, '.'),IFNULL(T6.ContractID, '.'),
                IFNULL(T7.PayBandID, '.'),IFNULL(T8.CostCenterID, '.'),IFNULL(T9.PositionID, '.'),IFNULL(T10.ManagerEmployeeID, '.'),IFNULL(TempMPID.PositionID, '.'),
                IFNULL(NULL, '.'), IFNULL(T11.LocationID, '.'),IFNULL(T12.WorkScheduleID, '.'),IFNULL(T13.EmployeeGroupID, '.'),IFNULL(T13b.PayrollAreaID, '.'))) as RowID, 
    'Y' as IsActive, 
    T7.IsActive as HistoricIsActive


FROM odw_standardised_db.vw_saphr T1 -- COUNT is 
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_employee_fact T2 ON T1.Pers_No = T2.EmployeeNumber AND T2.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_personnel_area_dim T3 ON T1.PA = T3.PersonnelAreaCode AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_personnel_sub_area_dim T4 ON T1.PSubArea = T4.PersonnelSubAreaCode AND T4.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_organisation_unit_dim T5 ON T1.Org_unit = T5.OrganisationUnit and
                                                         T1.Organizational_Unit = T5.Description AND T5.IsActive = 'Y' --64 nulls
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_contract_dim T6 ON T1.WorkC = T6.ContractCode AND 
                                                CASE 
                                                        WHEN T1.CT IS NULL
                                                        THEN 'N/A'
                                                        ELSE T1.CT
                                                END = T6.ContractTypeCode AND T6.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_payband_dim T7 ON T1.PS_group = T7.PSGroupCode AND T7.IsActive = 'Y' -- NULLS occur due to contractors
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_costcenter_dim T8 ON T1.Cost_Ctr = T8.CostCenterCode AND T8.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_position_dim T9 ON T1.Position= T9.PositionCode AND T9.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_position_dim TempMPID ON T1.Manager_Position = TempMPID.PositionCode AND TempMPID.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_employee_timesheets_hierarchy_dim T10 ON T2.EmployeeID = T10.EmployeeID AND T10.IsActive = 'Y' --447 no manager
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_pins_location_dim T11 ON T1.Loc = T11.LocationCode AND T11.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN (
            SELECT T1.EmployeeID, T1.WorkScheduleID
            FROM odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_absence_dim T1
            INNER JOIN ( SELECT EmployeeID, Max(AbsenceEndDate) as Max_AbsenceEndDate
                         FROM odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_absence_dim
                         Where IsActive = 'Y'
                         GROUP BY EmployeeID ) T3        ON  T1.EmployeeID = T3.EmployeeID AND
                                                             T1.AbsenceEndDate = T3.Max_AbsenceEndDate
            where IsActive = 'Y'
            GROUP BY T1.EmployeeID, T1.WorkScheduleID
            
    ) T12 ON T2.EmployeeID = T12.EmployeeID  -- NULLS occur as no data for some employees in the absence file, -577 no workscheduleid

LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_employeegroup_dim T13 ON T1.EEGrp = T13.EEGrp and T13.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_payroll_area_dim T13b ON T1.PArea = T13b.PayrollAreaCode and T13b.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T14 ON "SAP HR" = T14.Description AND T14.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_record_fact T15 ON T2.EmployeeID = T15.EmployeeID AND T15.IsActive = 'Y'

WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        ( CASE
            WHEN T2.EmployeeID = T15.EmployeeID AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T2.EmployeeID,'.'), IFNULL(T3.PersonnelAreaID, '.'), IFNULL(T4.PersonnelSubAreaID, '.'), IFNULL(T5.OrganisationUnitID, '.'),IFNULL(T6.ContractID, '.'),
                IFNULL(T7.PayBandID, '.'),IFNULL(T8.CostCenterID, '.'),IFNULL(T9.PositionID, '.'),IFNULL(T10.ManagerEmployeeID, '.'),IFNULL(TempMPID.PositionID, '.'),
                IFNULL(NULL, '.'), IFNULL(T11.LocationID, '.'),IFNULL(T12.WorkScheduleID, '.'),IFNULL(T13.EmployeeGroupID, '.'),IFNULL(T13b.PayrollAreaID, '.'))) <> T15.RowID
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T15.EmployeeID IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.Pers_No IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )
;

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (timesheets) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_segment_type_reference)
- **New Data:** where a Religion in the source does not exist as an ReligionCode in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on Religion in source and ReligionCode in targReligionet where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an ReligionCode in the target exists but the same Disability_Text doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View timesheets_segment_type_reference_new is created

%%sql
-- Build religion_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW timesheets_segment_type_reference_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.segment_type_id IS NULL
        THEN T3.SegmentTypeID
    END as SegmentTypeReferenceID, -- surrogate key
    T1.segment_type_id AS SegmentTypeID,
    T1.segment_type_description AS SegmentTypeDescription,
    T1.segment_type_shortname AS SegmentTypeShortName,
    T1.segment_type_validity AS SegmentTypeValidity,
    T1.future_selectable AS FutureSelectable,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.segment_type_id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.segment_type_description,'.'), IFNULL(T1.segment_type_shortname,'.'), IFNULL(T1.segment_type_validity,'.'),
                IFNULL(T1.future_selectable,'.'))) AS RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive, 
    T3.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.timesheets_segment_type_reference T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Timesheets" = T2.Description and T2.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_segment_type_reference_dim T3 ON T1.segment_type_id = T3.SegmentTypeID AND T3.IsActive = 'Y'

WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.segment_type_id = T3.SegmentTypeID AND md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.segment_type_id,'.'), IFNULL(T1.segment_type_description,'.'), 
            IFNULL(T1.segment_type_shortname,'.'), IFNULL(T1.segment_type_validity,'.'), IFNULL(T1.future_selectable,'.')))<> T3.RowID     
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T3.SegmentTypeID IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.segment_type_id IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )

# Check for new, updated or deleted data
- This script checks for new, updated or deleted data by checking the source data (timesheets) against the target (odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_work_segment)
- **New Data:** where a segment_id in the source does not exist as an SegmentID in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on segment_id in source and SegmentID in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Deleted data:** where an SegmentID in the target exists but the same information doesn't exist in the source. DeletedData flag is set to 'Y'

## View timesheets_work_segment_new is created

%%sql
-- Build religion_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW timesheets_work_segment_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.segment_id IS NULL
        THEN T5.SegmentID
    END as TimesheetsWorkSegmentID, -- surrogate key
    T1.segment_id AS SegmentID,
    T4.EmployeeID AS EmployeeID,
    T1.segment_date AS SegmentDate,
    T1.start_time AS StartTime,
    T1.end_time AS EndTime,
    T1.case_reference AS CaseReference,
    T1.segment_type AS SegmentType,
    T1.worked_minutes AS WorkedMinutes,
    T1.created_at AS CreatedAt,
    T1.updated_at AS UpdatedAt,
    T1.case_display_name AS CaseDisplayName,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    T1.segment_date AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat( IFNULL(T1.segment_id,'.'), IFNULL(T4.EmployeeID,'.'), IFNULL(T1.segment_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.start_time,'.'), IFNULL(T1.end_time,'.'), 
                IFNULL(T1.case_reference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.segment_type,'.'), IFNULL(T1.worked_minutes,'.'), IFNULL(T1.created_at,'.'), 
                IFNULL(T1.updated_at,'.'), IFNULL(T1.case_display_name,'.'))) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive, 
    T5.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.timesheets_work_segment T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Timesheets" = T2.Description and T2.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.timesheets_employee T3 ON T1.employee_id = T3.employee_id
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_employee_fact T4 ON T3.staff_number = T4.EmployeeNumber AND T4.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_work_segment_dim T5 ON T1.segment_id = T5.SegmentID AND T5.IsActive = 'Y'

WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.segment_id = T5.SegmentID AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.segment_id,'.'), IFNULL(T4.EmployeeID,'.'), IFNULL(T1.segment_date,'.'), IFNULL(T1.start_time,'.'), 
                    IFNULL(T1.end_time,'.'), IFNULL(T1.case_reference,'.'), IFNULL(T1.segment_type,'.'), IFNULL(T1.worked_minutes,'.'), IFNULL(T1.created_at,'.'), 
                    IFNULL(T1.updated_at,'.'), IFNULL(T1.case_display_name,'.')))  <> T5.RowID     
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T5.TimesheetsWorkSegmentID IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.segment_id IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )

- **New Data:** where a segment_id in the source does not exist as an SegmentID in the target. NewData flag is set to 'Y'
- **Updated data:** Comparison occurs on segment_id in source and SegmentID in target where the row hash is different i.e. there is a change in one of the columns. NewData flag is set to 'Y'

## View timesheets_work_segment_lock_new is created

%%sql
-- Build religion_dim table
-- Gets modified or deleted from source rows

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW timesheets_work_segment_lock_new

    AS

-- gets data that matches of SourceID and flags that it is modified based on a row (md5) hash. Flags as "NewData"
-- gets data that is in the target but not in source. Flags as "DeletedData"

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN T1.id IS NULL
        THEN T5.WorkSegmentLockID
    END as TimesheetsWorkSegmentLockID, -- surrogate key
    T1.id AS WorkSegmentLockID,
    T4.EmployeeID AS EmployeeID,
    T1.first_date_of_week AS FirstDateOfWeek,
    T1.created_at AS CreatedAt,
    T2.SourceSystemID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS IngestionDate,
    NULL AS ValidTo,
    md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T4.EmployeeID,'.'), IFNULL(T1.first_date_of_week,'.'), IFNULL(T1.created_at,'.'))) as RowID,
    'Y' as IsActive,
    T5.IsActive as HistoricIsActive

FROM odw_standardised_db.timesheets_work_segment_lock T1
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.main_sourcesystem_fact T2 ON "Timesheets" = T2.Description and T2.IsActive = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.timesheets_employee T3 ON T1.employee_id = T3.employee_id
LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.hr_employee_fact T4 ON T3.staff_number = T4.EmployeeNumber AND T4.IsActive = 'Y'
FULL JOIN odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_work_segment_lock_dim T5 ON T1.id = T5.WorkSegmentLockID AND T5.IsActive = 'Y' 
WHERE
    (
        -- flags new data        
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.id = T5.WorkSegmentLockID AND md5(concat(IFNULL(T1.id,'.'), IFNULL(T4.EmployeeID,'.'), 
            IFNULL(T1.first_date_of_week,'.'), IFNULL(T1.created_at,'.'))) <> T5.RowID
            THEN 'Y'
            WHEN T5.WorkSegmentLockID IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END  = 'Y' ) OR
        
        -- flags deleted data
        ( CASE
            WHEN T1.id IS NULL
            THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END = 'Y' )
    )

- **Changes tolerance levels:** if the total ammount to be added and deleted surpasses the tolerance limit, it will interrupt the proces of loading the data

# Dataset is created that contains changed data and corresponding target data
- This script combines data that has been updated, Deleted or is new, with corresponding target data
- View **table_new** is unioned to the target data filter to only those rows where changes have been detected
## View table_changed_rows is created

%%sql
-- Create new and updated dataset

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY VIEW timesheets_work_segment_lock_changed_rows

    AS

-- gets updated, deleted and new rows 

Select 
    TimesheetsWorkSegmentLockID,
    WorkSegmentLockID,
    EmployeeID,
    FirstDateOfWeek,
    CreatedAt,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
From timesheets_work_segment_lock_new WHERE HistoricIsActive = 'Y' or HistoricIsActive IS NULL

    UNION ALL

-- gets original versions of updated rows so we can update EndDate and set IsActive flag to 'N'

SELECT
    TimesheetsWorkSegmentLockID,
    WorkSegmentLockID,
    EmployeeID,
    FirstDateOfWeek,
    CreatedAt,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_work_segment_lock_dim
WHERE TimesheetsWorkSegmentLockID IN (SELECT TimesheetsWorkSegmentLockID FROM timesheets_work_segment_lock_new WHERE EmployeeID IS NULL)
AND IsActive = 'Y';

# View TABLE_dim_changed_rows is used in a merge (Upsert) statement into the target table
- **WHEN MATCHED** ON the Business Key, ValidTo is set to today -1 day and the IsActive flag is set to 'N'
- **WHEN NOT MATCHED** ON the business key, insert rows
## Table odw_harmonised.XXX_dim is updated

%%sql

-- merge into table

MERGE INTO odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_work_segment_lock_dim AS Target
USING timesheets_work_segment_lock_changed_rows AS Source

ON Source.TimesheetsWorkSegmentLockID = Target.TimesheetsWorkSegmentLockID

-- updates existing rows

WHEN MATCHED
    THEN 
    UPDATE SET
    Target.ValidTo = date_sub(current_timestamp,1),
    Target.IsActive = 'N'

-- Insert completely new rows
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT * ;

# Fix the IDs
- No auto-increment feature is available in delta tables, therefore we need to create new IDs for the inserted rows
- This is done by select the target data and using INSERT OVERWRITE to re-insert the data is a new Row Number
## Table odw_harmonised.TABLE_dim is updated

%%sql
-- Insert new ID

INSERT OVERWRITE odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_work_segment_lock_dim

SELECT 
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY WorkSegmentLockID NULLS LAST) AS TimesheetsWorkSegmentID,
    WorkSegmentLockID,
    EmployeeID,
    FirstDateOfWeek,
    CreatedAt,
    SourceSystemID,
    IngestionDate,
    ValidTo,
    RowID,
    IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_work_segment_lock_dim;

Select * FROM odw_harmonised_db.timesheets_work_segment_lock_dim;

# Zendesk Subscribe

Using a predefined subscription to a topic; read the messages and save them to the data lake

See https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/samples/azure/azure-sdk-for-python/servicebus-samples/ for servicebus samples
## Import Logging
%run /utils/py_logging_decorator
## Sets the notebook variables

from notebookutils import mssparkutils

#destination variables
jobId = mssparkutils.env.getJobId()
storage_account=mssparkutils.notebook.run('/utils/py_utils_get_storage_account')
raw_storage_container = 'abfss://odw-raw@' + storage_account
raw_storage_source_folder = 'ZenDesk/'
subfolder = 'ServiceBus'
raw_storage_folder_path = raw_storage_container + raw_storage_source_folder

#service bus variables
secret_name="esb-listen-connection-string"
kv_linked_service="ls_kv"
topic_name="zendesk"
subscription_name="zendesk"
max_records = 10

import json
from datetime import date
import os


def writeData(logger, filename, data):
    try:
        raw_storage_sub_folder = subfolder +'/' +str(date.today())
        destination_dir = '/synfs/' +jobId +'/temp_raw/' +raw_storage_sub_folder+'/'
        #create the destination_directory, if it doesn't already exist
        os.makedirs(destination_dir, exist_ok=True)

        with open(f"{destination_dir}{filename}", "w") as f:
            json.dump(data, f)
    except Exception as e:
        logger.exception(e)
        return False
    return True
## Get the latest messages from the subscription and write to the data lake

@logging_to_appins
def saveFromSubscription():
    from azure.servicebus import ServiceBusClient, ServiceBusMessage
    import json
    import logging
    logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

    from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
    spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()
    akv_name=spark.sparkContext.environment.get('keyVaultName', 'get')
    from notebookutils import mssparkutils
    conn_str = mssparkutils.credentials.getSecret(akv_name, secret_name, kv_linked_service)

    

    ### mount the data lake storage in Synapse to the Synapse File Mount API
    try:
        #connect to the service bus
        logger.info("Connecting to Service Bus")
        servicebus_client = ServiceBusClient.from_connection_string(conn_str=conn_str, logging_enable=True)
        logger.info("Mounting " +raw_storage_folder_path)
        mssparkutils.fs.unmount("/temp_raw")
        mssparkutils.fs.mount(raw_storage_folder_path, "/temp_raw", {"linkedService":"ls_storage"}) 
    except Exception as e:
        logger.exception(e)
        return False

    try:
        with servicebus_client:
            receiver = servicebus_client.get_subscription_receiver(
                topic_name=topic_name,
                subscription_name=subscription_name
            )

            with receiver:
                
                while True:
                    received_msgs = receiver.receive_messages(max_message_count=max_records, max_wait_time=5)
                    
                    if len(received_msgs) > 0:
                        logger.info("Reading " +str(len(received_msgs)) +" messages")

                        for message in received_msgs:
                            data = json.loads(str(message))
                            filename = message.subject +"-" +str(message.message_id) +'.json'

                            #save data to blob
                            if writeData(logger, filename, data):
                                receiver.complete_message(message)
                                logger.info("Wrote message to file " +filename)
                            else:
                                logger.error("Failed to write message " +filename)
                    else:
                        logger.info("No messages to process")
                        break
        return True        
    except Exception as e:
        logger.exception(e)
        return False
    finally:
        #cleanup
        logger.info("Unmounting " +raw_storage_folder_path)
        mssparkutils.fs.unmount("/temp_raw")
        logger.info("Finished")
saveFromSubscription()
